data.title: « Le foot, c’est ce qui nous rassemble ! » : dans un Paris survolté, récit d’une nuit d’euphorie et de tensions après le sacre du PSG en Ligue des champions
data.description: Jusqu’à 20 000 personnes se sont réunies sur les Champs-Elysées pour célébrer la victoire du Paris Saint-Germain, samedi, contre Arsenal (1-1, 4 t.a.b 3). En région parisienne, 283 interpellations avaient eu lieu à 1 h 30, dimanche matin, après des heurts avec les forces de l’ordre.
data.translatedTitle: “Football is what brings us together! »: in an excited Paris, story of a night of euphoria and tension after PSG's coronation in the Champions League
data.translatedDescription: Up to 20,000 people gathered on the Champs-Elysées to celebrate Paris Saint-Germain's victory on Saturday against Arsenal (1-1, 4 tab 3). In the Paris region, 283 arrests had taken place at 1:30 a.m. on Sunday morning, after clashes with the police.

data.title: « Trump et Nétanyahou ont érigé leur propre aveuglement au rang d’arme de destruction massive »
data.description: Que Mahmoud Ahmadinejad ait été envisagé pour diriger de nouveau l’Iran en dit long sur l’effondrement intellectuel de l’alliance israélo-américaine, observe l’historien Jean-Pierre Filiu dans sa chronique.
data.translatedTitle: “Trump and Netanyahu have elevated their own blindness to the rank of weapon of mass destruction”
data.translatedDescription: That Mahmoud Ahmadinejad was considered to lead Iran again says a lot about the intellectual collapse of the Israeli-American alliance, observes historian Jean-Pierre Filiu in his column.

data.title: Pour Emmanuel Macron, un dernier Choose France sur fond de réindustrialisation en panne
data.description: Pour la 9ᵉ édition de cet événement censé promouvoir l’attractivité économique du pays, le chef de l’Etat recevra, lundi, à Versailles, de nombreux patrons d’entreprises étrangères qui ont prévu d’investir dans l’Hexagone. Si le montant de ces projets s’annonce « record », selon l’Elysée, il ne pourra masquer les difficultés du secteur industriel français depuis deux ans.
data.translatedTitle: For Emmanuel Macron, one last Choose France against the backdrop of stalled reindustrialization
data.translatedDescription: For the 9th edition of this event intended to promote the economic attractiveness of the country, the Head of State will receive, on Monday, in Versailles, numerous bosses of foreign companies who plan to invest in France. If the amount of these projects promises to be "record", according to the Elysée, it will not be able to mask the difficulties of the French industrial sector for two years.

data.title: Gabriel Attal met en scène sa « force d’agir » lors de son premier meeting de campagne pour la présidentielle de 2027
data.description: Le secrétaire général de Renaissance a tenu samedi après-midi sa première démonstration de force en vue de 2027 au Parc des expositions à Paris, s’affichant en chantre de l’optimisme et multipliant les promesses.
data.translatedTitle: Gabriel Attal showcases his “strength to act” during his first campaign meeting for the 2027 presidential election
data.translatedDescription: The secretary general of Renaissance held his first show of force with a view to 2027 on Saturday afternoon at the Parc des Expositions in Paris, appearing as a champion of optimism and multiplying promises.

data.title: Feux de forêt : cinq leçons de la science pour éviter que les villes flambent aussi
data.description: Dans une expertise collective du CNRS, dix-sept chercheurs mettent en avant les meilleures stratégies de protection applicables à la France, alors que 70 % des incendies éclosent dans les « interfaces urbaines », où se mêlent bâti et nature.
data.translatedTitle: Forest fires: five lessons from science to prevent cities from burning too
data.translatedDescription: In a collective CNRS expertise, seventeen researchers highlight the best protection strategies applicable to France, while 70% of fires start in “urban interfaces”, where buildings and nature mingle.

data.title: Trois personnes tuées par une nouvelle frappe américaine dans le Pacifique contre un bateau attribué à des narcotrafiquants
data.description: L’administration Trump n’a jamais fourni de preuve solide permettant d’affirmer que les navires visés dans cette campagne, qui a tué plus de 200 personnes selon un décompte de l’Agence France-Presse, étaient effectivement impliqués dans des trafics.
data.translatedTitle: Three people killed by a new American strike in the Pacific against a boat attributed to drug traffickers
data.translatedDescription: The Trump administration has never provided solid evidence to support that the vessels targeted in this campaign, which killed more than 200 people according to a count by Agence France-Presse, were actually involved in trafficking.

data.title: Gel des allègements de cotisations sociales : le patronat dénonce une « double peine » au « pire moment pour les entreprises »
data.description: Les dirigeants des principales organisations patronales appellent, dans « La Tribune Dimanche », le gouvernement au « dialogue ». La hausse du smic de 2,4 % le 1ᵉʳ juin ne s’accompagnera pas de celle des allègements de cotisations sur les bas salaires, a annoncé récemment le ministre des comptes publics.
data.translatedTitle: Freezing of reductions in social security contributions: employers denounce a “double penalty” at the “worst time for businesses”
data.translatedDescription: The leaders of the main employers' organizations, in “La Tribune Dimanche”, call on the government for “dialogue”. The 2.4% increase in the minimum wage on June 1 will not be accompanied by reductions in contributions for low wages, the Minister of Public Accounts recently announced.

data.title: Roland-Garros 2026 : fin du conte de fées pour Moïse Kouamé, espoir du tennis tricolore devenu chouchou du public
data.description: Le Français de 17 ans a été battu par le Chilien Alejandro Tabilo, samedi, au troisième tour du tournoi du Grand Chelem parisien. En une semaine, il a conquis des fans en quête de nouvelles têtes d’affiche.
data.translatedTitle: Roland-Garros 2026: end of the fairy tale for Moïse Kouamé, hope of French tennis who has become a darling of the public
data.translatedDescription: The 17-year-old Frenchman was beaten by Chilean Alejandro Tabilo on Saturday in the third round of the Paris Grand Slam tournament. In one week, he won over fans looking for new headliners.

data.title: Anne Alombert, philosophe : « Léon XIV, à partir de l’IA, se livre à un véritable plaidoyer pour l’action publique »
data.description: La philosophe analyse, dans un entretien au « Monde », « Magnifica humanitas », l’encyclique que le pape vient de publier, où il se focalise particulièrement sur l’enjeu de l’IA, dont Anne Alombert est spécialiste. Selon elle, si ce texte souligne les dangers de cette industrie, il évite la facilité de considérer les technologies numériques comme un mal en soi.
data.translatedTitle: Anne Alombert, philosopher: “Leon XIV, based on AI, engages in real advocacy for public action”
data.translatedDescription: The philosopher analyzes, in an interview with “Le Monde”, “Magnifica humanitas”, the encyclical that the pope has just published, where he focuses particularly on the issue of AI, of which Anne Alomber is a specialist. According to her, while this text highlights the dangers of this industry, it avoids the ease of considering digital technologies as an evil in themselves.

data.title: Marcel Conche, ou l’appel au dépassement de soi : « Les Petites Méditations » d’Abdennour Bidar
data.description: « Les Petites Méditations » n° 4. Dans cette « Petite Méditation », Abdennour Bidar commente une phrase du philosophe Marcel Conche (1922-2022), qui invite à ne pas se laisser décourager par l’apparence au demeurant insignifiante de notre vie face à l’infini, mais d’y puiser au contraire l’énergie du dépassement.
data.translatedTitle: Marcel Conche, or the call to surpass oneself: “Les Petites Méditations” by Abdennour Bidar
data.translatedDescription: “Les Petites Méditations” n° 4. In this “Little Meditation”, Abdennour Bidar comments on a sentence from the philosopher Marcel Conche (1922-2022), which invites us not to let ourselves be discouraged by the otherwise insignificant appearance of our life in the face of infinity, but on the contrary to draw from it the energy of surpassing itself.

data.title: EN DIRECT, guerre en Ukraine : la Russie a attaqué l’Ukraine avec 229 drones dans la nuit
data.description: Selon l’armée ukrainienne, la défense antiaérienne a neutralisé 212 de ces appareils, mais l’attaque se poursuit. L’armée de l’air ajoute avoir enregistré l’impact de 14 drones d’attaque sur 11 sites, ainsi que la chute de débris de drones sur cinq sites.
data.translatedTitle: LIVE, war in Ukraine: Russia attacked Ukraine with 229 drones overnight
data.translatedDescription: According to the Ukrainian army, air defense has neutralized 212 of these aircraft, but the attack continues. The Air Force adds that it recorded the impact of 14 attack drones on 11 sites, as well as the fall of drone debris on five sites.

data.title: Carburant : le doublement de l’indemnité pour les « grands rouleurs » et des aides aux pêcheurs entérinés
data.description: Les décrets instaurant ces aides du gouvernement pour soutenir les travailleurs modestes et les entreprises de pêche face à la hausse des prix du carburant, à hauteur de 20 à 35 centimes d’euros par litre, ont été publiés au « Journal officiel » samedi.
data.translatedTitle: Fuel: doubling of compensation for “long-distance riders” and aid to fishermen approved
data.translatedDescription: The decrees establishing this government aid to support low-income workers and fishing businesses in the face of rising fuel prices, to the tune of 20 to 35 euro cents per liter, were published in the “Official Journal” on Saturday.

data.title: Une lune bleue sera visible ce week-end en France : nos explications sur les différents « types » de lune qui existent
data.description: A l’occasion de la lune bleue qui devrait briller dans nos ciels ce week-end, « Le Monde » fait le point sur ce que dit l’astronomie des différentes teintes ou tailles que peuvent prendre les pleines lunes.
data.translatedTitle: A blue moon will be visible this weekend in France: our explanations on the different “types” of moon that exist
data.translatedDescription: On the occasion of the blue moon which should shine in our skies this weekend, “Le Monde” takes stock of what astronomy says about the different hues or sizes that full moons can take.

data.title: Ebola-Ausbruch: Ein ehemaliger Patient berichtet - »Meine Ebola-Erkrankung war wie ein Münzwurf«
data.description: Craig Spencer war 2014 in Guinea, um Ebolakranke zu behandeln – und steckte sich an. Hier erzählt er, wie er dem Tod entkam. Und was den aktuellen Ausbruch so katastrophal macht.
data.translatedTitle: Ebola outbreak: A former patient reports - "My Ebola illness was like a coin toss"
data.translatedDescription: Craig Spencer was in Guinea in 2014 to treat Ebola patients - and became infected. Here he tells how he escaped death. And what makes the current outbreak so catastrophic.

data.title: News: Hendrik Wüst muss aufpassen. Kanzlerrivale ist keine günstige Position.
data.description: Die Schwäche von Kanzler Friedrich Merz weckt Fantasien. Aber das ist womöglich für ihn das kleinere Problem als für Hendrik Wüst. Das ist die Lage am Sonntag.
data.translatedTitle: News: Hendrik Wüst has to be careful. Rivaling the Chancellor is not a favorable position.
data.translatedDescription: Chancellor Friedrich Merz's weakness awakens fantasies. But that may be a smaller problem for him than for Hendrik Wüst. That is the situation on Sunday.

data.title: Israel: Angehörige ehemaliger Hamas-Geiseln ziehen gegen Benjamin Netanyahu in die Knesset
data.description: Israel wählt in diesem Jahr ein neues Parlament. In die Knesset will auch Danny Elgarat, Angehöriger einer ehemaligen Hamas-Geisel. Das ist seine Geschichte.
data.translatedTitle: Israel: Relatives of former Hamas hostages go to the Knesset against Benjamin Netanyahu
data.translatedDescription: Israel is electing a new parliament this year. Danny Elgarat, a relative of a former Hamas hostage, also wants to be in the Knesset. This is his story.

data.title: Vapes, Tabakerhitzer, Nikotinbeutel: Sind die Nachfolger der Zigarette weniger riskant? Wer sollte auf sie umsteigen - wer nicht?
data.description: Die Tabakindustrie gibt sich geläutert: Alternative Nikotinprodukte sind angeblich weniger gefährlich als Zigaretten. Experten widersprechen vehement.
data.translatedTitle: Vapes, tobacco heaters, nicotine pouches: are the successors to cigarettes less risky? Who should switch to them - who shouldn't?
data.translatedDescription: The tobacco industry has reformed itself: alternative nicotine products are supposedly less dangerous than cigarettes. Experts vehemently disagree.

data.title: Depression: Ein Berliner Arzt behandelt Patienten mit Hirn-Computer-Schnittstellen
data.description: Der Berliner Arzt Surjo Soekadar entwickelt Therapien gegen psychische Krankheiten und die Folgen von Schlaganfällen. Dafür geht er einen radikal neuen Weg: Er programmiert den Takt der Gehirnzellen um.
data.translatedTitle: Depression: A Berlin doctor treats patients with brain-computer interfaces
data.translatedDescription: The Berlin doctor Surjo Soekadar is developing therapies against mental illnesses and the consequences of strokes. To do this, he is taking a radically new approach: he is reprogramming the rhythm of the brain cells.

data.title: Meltem Seker: Wie eine Politik-Influencerin mit Videos über Friedrich Merz polarisiert
data.description: Meltem Seker war ziemlich links, heute sieht sie sich als Liberal-Konservative. Mit ihren Videos über Friedrich Merz und Migration polarisiert die Influencerin. Lässt sie sich instrumentalisieren?
data.translatedTitle: Meltem Seker: How a political influencer polarizes with videos about Friedrich Merz
data.translatedDescription: Meltem Seker was quite left-wing, today she sees herself as a liberal-conservative. The influencer polarizes people with her videos about Friedrich Merz and migration. Can it be exploited?

data.title: FDP: Wolfgang Kubicki will keine Rücksichtnahme auf Marie-Agnes Strack-Zimmermanns Gefolgschaft nehmen
data.description: Die Kampfabstimmung über den FDP-Vorsitz zeigt: Die Partei ist tief gespalten. Die unterlegene Marie-Agnes Strack-Zimmermann will dem Gewinner Wolfgang Kubicki die Hand reichen. Doch der schlägt harte Töne an.
data.translatedTitle: FDP: Wolfgang Kubicki doesn't want to take Marie-Agnes Strack-Zimmermann's followers into account
data.translatedDescription: The vote on the FDP chairmanship shows that the party is deeply divided. The defeated Marie-Agnes Strack-Zimmermann wants to shake hands with the winner Wolfgang Kubicki. But he strikes a harsh tone.

data.title: FDP: Wolfgang Kubicki setzt sich im überraschenden Duell um Vorsitz durch
data.description: Plötzlich kam es doch zum Duell: Weil Marie-Agnes Strack-Zimmermann kurzfristig gegen Wolfgang Kubicki kandidierte, wurde die Vorsitzendenwahl spannend. Der neue FDP-Chef startet mit Ballast.
data.translatedTitle: FDP: Wolfgang Kubicki prevails in the surprising duel for chairmanship
data.translatedDescription: Suddenly there was a duel: Because Marie-Agnes Strack-Zimmermann ran against Wolfgang Kubicki at short notice, the chairman election became exciting. The new FDP leader starts with ballast.

data.title: Sicherheitskonferenz »Shangri-La Dialog« in Singapur: Kann China im Irankrieg zu Trumps Nothelfer werden?
data.description: Die USA fordern von Peking mehr Einsatz im Nahen Osten. China gibt sich betont gelassen. Doch hinter den Kulissen der Sicherheitskonferenz in Singapur wird bereits über Irans Uran diskutiert.
data.translatedTitle: “Shangri-La Dialogue” security conference in Singapore: Can China become Trump’s emergency helper in the Iran war?
data.translatedDescription: The USA is calling on Beijing to do more in the Middle East. China is emphatically calm. But behind the scenes at the security conference in Singapore, Iran's uranium is already being discussed.

data.title: Iran drängt auf Freigabe eingefrorener Auslandsvermögen
data.description: Die iranische Wirtschaft steckt in der Krise, die Menschen ächzen unter der hohen Inflation. Eine Freigabe im Ausland blockierter Gelder ist für das Regime in Teheran essenziell. Für Donald Trump wäre sie ein peinliches Zugeständnis.
data.translatedTitle: Iran is pushing for the release of frozen foreign assets
data.translatedDescription: The Iranian economy is in crisis, people are groaning under high inflation. A release of funds blocked abroad is essential for the regime in Tehran. It would be an embarrassing concession for Donald Trump.

data.title: Kolumbien: Der Linke Iván Cepeda hat gute Chancen, Präsident Gustavo Petro zu beerben
data.description: Iván Cepeda gilt als intellektuelles Gewissen der Linken, doch Kritiker warnen vor seiner Nähe zu bewaffneten Gruppen. Am Sonntag entscheidet sich, ob er kolumbianischer Präsident wird. Mischt sich bald auch noch Trump ein?
data.translatedTitle: Colombia: Leftist Iván Cepeda has a good chance of inheriting President Gustavo Petro
data.translatedDescription: Iván Cepeda is considered the intellectual conscience of the left, but critics warn about his proximity to armed groups. It will be decided on Sunday whether he will become Colombian president. Will Trump get involved soon?

data.title: Robert Habeck im SPIEGEL-Talk: Kehren Sie zurück?
data.description: Im SPIEGEL-Talk auf der Bühne des Admiralspalasts spricht Robert Habeck über seine Vision für Europa, persönliche Fehler – und die Frage: Ist unsere Welt aus den Fugen?
data.translatedTitle: Robert Habeck in the SPIEGEL talk: Are you returning?
data.translatedDescription: In the SPIEGEL talk on the stage of the Admiralspalast, Robert Habeck talks about his vision for Europe, personal mistakes - and the question: Is our world out of joint?

data.title: Statt »Vanille« muss es heute mindestens »Mango-Limette-Chili« sein. Brauchen wir wirklich immer neue Eissorten?
data.translatedTitle: Instead of “vanilla” today it has to be at least “mango-lime-chilli”. Do we really need new ice cream flavors all the time?

data.title: Ministerin Dorothee Bär zweifelt an baldiger Bafög-Reform
data.description: Die Reform war fest eingeplant – doch sie wird wohl nicht kommen. Forschungsministerin Dorothee Bär verteidigt den möglichen Stopp der Bafög-Erhöhung. Und erklärt Studierenden, es sei kein Drama, nebenher zu jobben.
data.translatedTitle: Minister Dorothee Bär doubts that Bafög reform will take place soon
data.translatedDescription: The reform was firmly planned - but it probably won't come. Research Minister Dorothee Bär defends the possible stop to the Bafög increase. And explains to students that it's no drama to have a job on the side.

data.title: Boris Rhein und Jens Spahn stellen sich demonstrativ hinter Friedrich Merz
data.description: Gedankenspiele über einen Kanzlerwechsel hatten zuletzt für Aufregung in der Hauptstadt gesorgt. Immer mehr führende Unionspolitiker bekunden nun öffentlich ihre Unterstützung für Friedrich Merz.
data.translatedTitle: Boris Rhein and Jens Spahn demonstratively stand behind Friedrich Merz
data.translatedDescription: Thought games about a change of chancellor had recently caused a stir in the capital. More and more leading Union politicians are now publicly expressing their support for Friedrich Merz.

data.title: Immobilien: Private Vermieter scheuen energetische Sanierungen
data.description: Der Wohnungsbestand in Deutschland ist in die Jahre gekommen, eine Modernisierung schieben zahlreiche private Vermieter trotzdem weiter auf. Ihnen fehlt es womöglich an Orientierung und klaren Bedingungen.
data.translatedTitle: Real estate: Private landlords shy away from energy-saving renovations
data.translatedDescription: The housing stock in Germany is getting old, but many private landlords are still putting off modernization. You may lack orientation and clear conditions.

data.title: Champions League: Kai Havertz verliert mit dem FC Arsenal das Finale, ist aber bereit für die WM 2026
data.description: Der FC Arsenal verliert das Champions-League-Finale, diesmal reicht das 1:0 von Kai Havertz nicht. Der deutsche Mittelstürmer reist nach langer Verletzungspause in Topform zur Nationalmannschaft.
data.translatedTitle: Champions League: Kai Havertz loses the final with Arsenal FC, but is ready for the 2026 World Cup
data.translatedDescription: Arsenal FC loses the Champions League final, this time Kai Havertz's 1-0 win is not enough. The German center forward travels to the national team in top form after a long injury break.

data.title: Champions League: Paris Saint-Germain gewinnt Finale gegen Arsenal nach Elfmeterschießen
data.description: Der FC Arsenal würgt die Pariser Offensivwucht ab, Kai Havertz trifft – und doch reicht es nicht zum ersten Champions-League-Titel für die Gunners. Luis Enriques PSG-Team baut sich ein Denkmal auf dem Elfmeterpunkt.
data.translatedTitle: Champions League: Paris Saint-Germain wins final against Arsenal on penalties
data.translatedDescription: Arsenal FC chokes off the Parisian offensive power, Kai Havertz scores - and yet it's not enough to win the Gunners' first Champions League title. Luis Enrique's PSG team builds a monument on the penalty spot.

data.title: Paris: Ausschreitungen nach Champions-League-Finale – hunderte Festnahmen
data.description: Tausende Polizisten waren in Frankreich im Einsatz, um die Fußballfans nach dem Finale in der Champions League in Schach zu halten. Trotzdem kam es zu Ausschreitungen, die Beamten setzten Reizgas ein.
data.translatedTitle: Paris: Riots after the Champions League final – hundreds of arrests
data.translatedDescription: Thousands of police officers were deployed in France to keep football fans at bay after the Champions League final. Nevertheless, there were riots and the officers used irritant gas.

data.title: Marilyn Monroe: Mehr als ein Sexsymbol – Schauspielerin, Stilikone, Geschäftsfrau
data.description: Schauspielerin, Stilikone und Geschäftsfrau: Marilyn Monroe war mehr als Hollywoods berühmtestes Sexsymbol. Eine Frau, die bewundert, begehrt – und immer wieder unterschätzt wurde.
data.translatedTitle: Marilyn Monroe: More than a sex symbol – actress, style icon, businesswoman
data.translatedDescription: Actress, style icon and businesswoman: Marilyn Monroe was more than Hollywood's most famous sex symbol. A woman who was admired, desired - and repeatedly underestimated.

data.title: Angststörungen und Depressionen weltweit: Wo besonders viele Menschen psychisch krank sind
data.description: In manchen Ländern ist jeder fünfte Mensch psychisch krank. Warum Frauen stärker betroffen sind als Männer, was viele Jugendliche belastet und wo es die meisten Fälle gibt: der Überblick in Karten.
data.translatedTitle: Anxiety disorders and depression worldwide: where a particularly large number of people are mentally ill
data.translatedDescription: In some countries, one in five people is mentally ill. Why women are more affected than men, what affects many young people and where the most cases occur: an overview in maps.

data.title: Rätsel der Woche: Radius gesucht
data.description: In einem Kreis befindet sich ein rechtwinkliges Dreieck. Eine Dreiecksseite liegt auf dem Durchmesser, zwei Eckpunkte berühren den Kreisrand. Wie groß ist der Radius?
data.translatedTitle: Puzzle of the week: Looking for a radius
data.translatedDescription: There is a right triangle in a circle. One side of the triangle lies on the diameter, two corner points touch the edge of the circle. How big is the radius?

data.title: Deutscher Trachtentag: Die chicsten Fummel von vorgestern
data.description: Folklore, Volkslieder sowie ganz viel Spitze, Schleifen und Stickereien: Wir zeigen einige der schönsten Gewänder vom Deutschen Trachtentag.

Conseguimos fazer com que a população reconhecesse os males do cigarro, mudando a aceitação social do tabaco. data.translatedTitle: Is there anything to celebrate on World No Tobacco Day?

data.title: A recriação ultraprocessada do mundo
data.description: A mercantilização da existência em bases neoliberais, a forma-empresa, não se dá apenas nos níveis da economia, da inteligência artificial e da política, também na administração de crenças religiosas. Talvez a maior ameaça à mística de um todo-poderoso esteja na IA-2028 anunciada pela Anthropic que, suplantando a inteligência humana, poderá curar doenças terríveis, senão mandar paralítico levantar-se da cadeira. Mas a modelagem teológico-mercantil do banal consumo cotidiano, grotescos que sejam os seus aspectos, é um primeiro passo corrosivo. Leia mais (05/30/2026 - 15h00)
data.translatedTitle: The ultra-processed recreation of the world
data.translatedDescription: The commodification of existence on neoliberal bases, the company-form, does not only occur at the levels of economics, artificial intelligence and politics, but also in the administration of religious beliefs. Perhaps the greatest threat to the mystique of an almighty is in the AI-2028 announced by Anthropic which, by supplanting human intelligence, will be able to cure terrible diseases, if not force the paralyzed person to get up from their chair. But the theological-commercial modeling of banal everyday consumption, grotesque as its aspects may be, is a corrosive first step. Read more (05/30/2026 - 3:00 pm)

data.title: Argentina’s interior voice – an interview with author Selva Almada
data.description: Between echoes returning from the past and a language that breathes the brush and the river, Selva Almada’s new novel 'Una casa sola' (Random House) creates a universe in which memory, violence and poetry intertwine in a richly layered narrative. In this interview, the author traces the novel’s fragmentary origins, its connection to poetry and the gauchesca tradition, so-called ‘provincial’ literature and why writing is a living organism rather than just technique. Leer más

data.title: WHO warns against travel bans as DR Congo battles deadly Ebola outbreak without vaccine
data.description: The World Health Organisation, (WHO) on Saturday warned that travel bans and border closures imposed over the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo could undermine efforts to contain the disease, cautioning that although the country had successfully defeated Ebola 16 times in the past, the current outbreak presents a more dangerous challenge as the Bundibugyo strain of the virus has no licensed vaccine or approved treatment. The post WHO warns against travel bans as DR Congo battles deadly Ebola outbreak without vaccine appeared first on Vanguard News .

data.title: Ed krävde hönsgård på Harpsund – nu betalas fakturan
data.description: En hönsgård har byggts på Harpsund efter önskemål från statsministerns fru Birgitta Ed. Höga tjänstemän drogs in i projektet och notan hamnade delvis hos skattebetalarna, skriver Expressen. Nu meddelas att statsministerparet ska betala alla fakturor för hönsgården.
data.translatedTitle: Ed demanded a chicken farm at Harpsund - now the invoice is paid
data.translatedDescription: A hen farm has been built at Harpsund at the request of the prime minister's wife Birgitta Ed. High-ranking officials were drawn into the project and the bill partly ended up with the taxpayers, writes Expressen. Now it is announced that the Prime Minister must pay all invoices for the chicken farm.

data.title: Michael Winiarski: Trumps avtal med Iran kan bli ”sämre” än Obamas
data.description: Barack Obamas avtal med Iran 2015 dömdes ut av Donald Trump som det sämsta i USA:s historia. Nu tvekar Trump att ingå ett avtal om förlängd vapenvila med Iran. Ett skäl är att frågan om Irans kärnteknologi återstår att lösa. Men lika mycket därför att Trump inser att en överenskommelse kommer att likna Obamas – eller bli sämre.
data.translatedTitle: Michael Winiarski: Trump's deal with Iran could be "worse" than Obama's
data.translatedDescription: Barack Obama's deal with Iran in 2015 was condemned by Donald Trump as the worst in US history. Now Trump hesitates to enter into an agreement on an extended ceasefire with Iran. One reason is that the issue of Iran's nuclear technology remains to be resolved. But just as much because Trump realizes that a deal will be similar to Obama's - or worse.

data.title: Experterna: Studielånet har nått toppen
data.description: Räntan på studielån har passerat två procent efter att ha varit nere kring nollan i nästan ett decennium. Samtidigt är bolåneräntan, efter skatteavdrag, ofta lägre. Hur ska unga tänka när de står inför sitt första stora lån?
data.translatedTitle: The experts: The student loan has reached its peak
data.translatedDescription: The interest rate on student loans has passed two percent after being down around zero for almost a decade. At the same time, the mortgage interest rate, after tax deductions, is often lower. How should young people think when they are faced with their first big loan?

data.title: Lisa Magnusson: Här är ett förslag på en ny sorts mors dag-firande
data.description: Gärna blommor och uppvaktning på mors dag! Men det finns något ännu bättre.
data.translatedTitle: Lisa Magnusson: Here is a proposal for a new kind of Mother's Day celebration
data.translatedDescription: Preferably flowers and courtship on Mother's Day! But there is something even better.

data.title: Valpchocken – så dyrt är det att skaffa hund
data.description: Gulliga, lurviga – och dyra i drift. En hundvalp kan kosta mer än 100 000 kronor i löpande utgifter under första året, visar en ny uträkning. Men det finns saker att spara in på.
data.translatedTitle: The puppy shock - that's how expensive it is to get a dog
data.translatedDescription: Cute, furry – and expensive to run. A puppy can cost more than SEK 100,000 in running expenses during the first year, a new calculation shows. But there are things to save on.

data.title: Herr B: Hur mycket Swedish fika tål Sverige?
data.description: I dag hittar norra Europas kardemummasugnaste kåsör hela nationens vetebrödsmitt: Götgatan i Stockholm. Och undrar om det inte snart är färdigjäst.
data.translatedTitle: Mr. B: How much Swedish fika can Sweden tolerate?
data.translatedDescription: Today, Northern Europe's most cardamom-hungry house finds the whole nation's wheat bread mite: Götgatan in Stockholm. And wonder if it won't soon be fully fermented.

data.title: En presskonferens med Potter är som att höra en politiker
data.description: Esks elva, vecka 22. DN-sportens krönikör Johan Esk om veckan som varit.
data.translatedTitle: A press conference with Potter is like hearing a politician
data.translatedDescription: Esk's eleven, week 22. DN-sport's columnist Johan Esk about the week that has been.

data.title: Johan Esk: Reinfeldt hade rätt – så nu är all press på Potter
data.description: Sverige ska i veckan spela tre fotbollslandskamper och det är damernas som betyder något. Men deras viktiga kvalmatch hamnar i skuggan av träningsmatcher inför herrarnas vägvisande VM.
data.translatedTitle: Johan Esk: Reinfeldt was right - so now all the pressure is on Potter
data.translatedDescription: Sweden will play three national football matches this week and it is the women's that matters. But their important qualifying match is overshadowed by practice matches before the men's seminal World Cup.

data.title: Björn Wiman: Mamma är viktigast också för Bob Dylans ”okända son”
data.description: Sam Sussman och Bob Dylan är lika som bär – och hans mamma kände den legendariske sångaren. Men när författaren jagar en far blir det i stället årets finaste mors dags-hyllning, skriver Björn Wiman.
data.translatedTitle: Björn Wiman: Mother is also most important to Bob Dylan's "unknown son"
data.translatedDescription: Sam Sussman and Bob Dylan are alike - and his mother knew the legendary singer. But when the author hunts a father, it becomes the year's finest Mother's Day tribute instead, writes Björn Wiman.

data.title: Liv Strömquist om att inte bli galen av internet: ”Behöver vi bli uppeldade av Brad Pitt?”
data.description: Hennes utställning ”Where is my mind?” på Kalmar konstmuseum gestaltar samtidens digitala hysteri. I DN:s serie Specialisten berättar Liv Strömquist hur vi behåller förståndet i en värld där algoritmerna styr våra känslor.
data.translatedTitle: Liv Strömquist on not going crazy with the internet: "Do we need to be educated by Brad Pitt?"
data.translatedDescription: Her exhibition "Where is my mind?" at the Kalmar Art Museum portrays contemporary digital hysteria. In DN's series Specialisten, Liv Strömquist tells how we keep our sanity in a world where algorithms control our emotions.

data.title: Källor: Trump skärper krav i förslag till Iran
data.description: USA:s president Donald Trump har skärpt sina villkor för en möjlig överenskommelse med Iran och skickat tillbaka förslaget till motparten, enligt flera källor till The New York Times.
data.translatedTitle: Sources: Trump tightens requirements in proposals for Iran
data.translatedDescription: US President Donald Trump has tightened his terms for a possible agreement with Iran and sent the proposal back to the other party, according to several sources to The New York Times.

data.title: ”Kokain har fått ett grepp om Oslo”
data.description: OSLO. När Norges bonusprins Marius Borg Høiby greps av polis blottades en brutal verklighet. Det tar bara några minuter att få fem gram kokain levererat till dörren i Oslo. DN möter människorna som försöker frigöra sig från drogerna i en urspårad partystad.
data.translatedTitle: "Cocaine has got a grip on Oslo"
data.translatedDescription: OSLO. When Norway's bonus prince Marius Borg Høiby was arrested by the police, a brutal reality was exposed. It only takes a few minutes to have five grams of cocaine delivered to your door in Oslo. DN meets the people trying to free themselves from drugs in a derailed party town.

data.title: Max Hjelm: Glöm våldsamma män – unga arga kvinnor är det stora problemet, enligt konservativa
data.description: Isabella Löwengrip är knappast ensam om att se ned på kvinnors tankeförmåga.
data.translatedTitle: Max Hjelm: Forget violent men - young angry women are the big problem, according to conservatives
data.translatedDescription: Isabella Löwengrip is hardly alone in looking down on women's ability to think.

data.title: När gästerna ska finansiera bröllopet: ”Då har det nått en övre gräns”
data.description: När bröllop blir längre och dyrare uppstår nya etikettfrågor: Måste man delta alla dagar på ett tredagarsbröllop? Vad är rimligt att som gäst betala? Och ska man ge present om resten kostar skjortan? Experten reder ut när kraven har gått för långt.
data.translatedTitle: When the guests have to finance the wedding: "Then it has reached an upper limit"
data.translatedDescription: As weddings get longer and more expensive, new etiquette questions arise: Do you have to attend every day of a three-day wedding? What is reasonable to pay as a guest? And should you give a gift if the rest costs the shirt? The expert figures out when the requirements have gone too far.

data.title: 400 gripna – kaos igen efter PSG:s titel
data.description: Fransk polis har gripit över 400 personer efter att firandet av Paris SG:s Champions League-titel spårat ur, rapporterar franska medier. – Det är oacceptabelt, säger inrikesminister Laurent Nuñes.
data.translatedTitle: 400 arrested - chaos again after PSG's title
data.translatedDescription: French police have arrested more than 400 people after Paris SG's Champions League title celebrations derailed, French media reports. - It is unacceptable, says Minister of the Interior Laurent Nuñes.

data.title: Massive Attack ger Dalhalla en audiovisuell käftsmäll
data.description: Massive Attack levererar en intensiv audiovisuell upplevelse i Dalhalla, där politiska budskap och teknikkritik vävs samman med klassiska hits. Publiken överöses av både information och musik, i en konsert som utmanar lika mycket som den engagerar, skriver DN:s Mattias Dahlström.
data.translatedTitle: Massive Attack gives Dalhalla an audiovisual slap
data.translatedDescription: Massive Attack delivers an intense audiovisual experience in Dalhalla, where political messages and technology criticism are woven together with classic hits. The audience is showered with both information and music, in a concert that challenges as much as it engages, writes DN's Mattias Dahlström.

data.title: Jens Littorin: Kom igen norska hockeyfans – guttarna behöver ert stöd
data.description: OSLO. Norska ishockeylandslaget spelar sin största match genom tiderna, men på Karl Johan är det helt andra supportertröjor som dominerar. Men kvällen slutar i moll även för Arsenals fans.
data.translatedTitle: Jens Littorin: Come on Norwegian hockey fans - the boys need your support
data.translatedDescription: OSLO. The Norwegian national ice hockey team is playing its biggest game of all time, but at Karl Johan it is completely different supporter shirts that dominate. But the evening ends in a minor for Arsenal's fans as well.

data.title: Finland klart för VM-final efter stark mittenperiod
data.description: Finlands starka andra period i semifinalen mot Kanada – där de gjorde tre mål – blev avgörande. På söndag kväll spelar Finland final mot värdnationen Schweiz efter att ha vunnit semifinalen mot Kanada med 4–2. Bäst på isen i den här semifinalen var Finlands lagkapten Aleksander Barkov som visade vägen mot seger.
data.translatedTitle: Finland ready for WC final after strong middle period
data.translatedDescription: Finland's strong second period in the semi-final against Canada - in which they scored three goals - was decisive. On Sunday evening, Finland will play the final against host nation Switzerland after winning the semi-final against Canada 4–2. Best on the ice in this semi-final was Finland's team captain Aleksander Barkov, who showed the way to victory.

data.title: Psykologen om pyromanens drivkraft: ”Positiv eller negativ klang”
data.description: Eldsvådor har vid flera tillfällen drabbat två områden av Stockholm under våren – och invånare fruktar att pyromaner ligger bakom dåden. Psykologen Victoria Andrén lyfter några tecken som kännetecknar pyromaner. – De här individerna har ett problematiskt eldintresse och svårigheter att stå emot impulser att anlägga bränder, säger hon.
data.translatedTitle: The psychologist on the pyromaniac's driving force: "Positive or negative sound"
data.translatedDescription: Fires have hit two areas of Stockholm on several occasions during the spring - and residents fear that pyromaniacs are behind the deed. Psychologist Victoria Andrén highlights some signs that characterize pyromaniacs. - These individuals have a problematic interest in fire and difficulty resisting impulses to start fires, she says.

data.title: Johanna Frändén: ”PSG vann för att man är Europas bästa fotbollslag”
data.description: PARIS. Det är omöjligt att sortera alla intryck direkt efter en match som denna. Men när krutröken lagt sig kommer vi att summera en säsong där Paris Saint-Germain försvarade sin Champions League-titel av det enkla skälet att de är Europas bästa fotbollslag.
data.translatedTitle: Johanna Frändén: "PSG won because they are Europe's best football team"
data.translatedDescription: PARIS. It is impossible to sort out all the impressions immediately after a match like this. But when the smoke clears, we will sum up a season in which Paris Saint-Germain defended their Champions League title for the simple reason that they are the best football team in Europe.

data.title: Karl Dalén: Bilden har blivit en symbol för Trumps USA
data.description: WASHINGTON. Runt Vita huset gapar byggprojekt som öppna sår i den amerikanska huvudstaden. President Donald Trump lägger stora summor på renoveringar samtidigt som statsskulden växer och inflationen stiger. Före- och efterbilder på den ikoniska byggnaden får nu kritiker att gå i taket.
data.translatedTitle: Karl Dalén: The picture has become a symbol of Trump's USA
data.translatedDescription: WASHINGTON. Around the White House, construction projects gape like open wounds in the American capital. President Donald Trump is spending large sums on renovations while the national debt is growing and inflation is rising. Before and after pictures of the iconic building now have critics going wild.

data.title: PSG försvarade Champions League-titeln
data.description: Kvitteringen ledde till tårar och vrål på läktaren. Paris SG:s straffseger i Champions League-finalen mot Arsenal? Eufori överallt.
data.translatedTitle: PSG defended the Champions League title
data.translatedDescription: The acknowledgment led to tears and roars in the stands. Paris SG's Champions League final penalty win against Arsenal? Euphoria everywhere.

data.title: Huggormen är vaken – bästa taktiken om du möter den
data.description: Värmen är här och nu vaknar huggormarna. Skandinaviens enda vilda giftorm finns från norr till söder. Det finns knep för att undvika att bli biten av den. Men för den som får ett hugg finns bara ett råd – sök vård direkt. – Vänta inte, säger Peter Hultén på Giftinformationscentralen.
data.translatedTitle: The viper is awake - best tactic if you encounter it
data.translatedDescription: The heat is here and now the vipers are waking up. Scandinavia's only wild venomous snake is found from north to south. There are tricks to avoid being bitten by it. But for those who get a stab, there is only one piece of advice - seek medical attention immediately. - Don't wait, says Peter Hultén at the Poison Information Centre.

data.title: DN Debatt. ”Livet är det som går dig förbi medan du överlistar döden”
data.description: DN DEBATT. Skulle livet betyda lika mycket för oss om inte döden fanns där som motpol? När longevityrörelsens techmiljardärer och biohackare jagar evigt liv med sina rigida mat- och sovklockor, blodtransfusioner och ständiga självoptimering riskerar vi alla att förlora det som gör livet levande – allt det där som inte låter sig mätas, skriver Peter Göransson, vd Fonus.
data.translatedTitle: DN Debate. "Life is what passes you by while you outwit death"
data.translatedDescription: DN DEBATE. Would life mean as much to us if death wasn't there as a counterpoint? When the longevity movement's tech billionaires and biohackers chase eternal life with their rigid eating and sleeping schedules, blood transfusions and constant self-optimization, we all risk losing what makes life alive - all that which cannot be measured, writes Peter Göransson, CEO of Fonus.

data.title: Hur många gånger ska stockholmarna kallas "grunda fittor"?
data.description: I ”Ingen utgång” har Stockholm översvämmats av ett gift, som gjort att vem som helst börjat skapa konst. Examensföreställningen blir ibland väl förälskad i sig själv men glimmar också till som en ungdomlig uppgörelse med huvudstaden, skriver DN:s Valerie Kyeyune Backström.
data.translatedTitle: How many times should Stockholmers be called "shallow pussies"?
data.translatedDescription: In "No Exit", Stockholm has been flooded with a poison, which has caused anyone to start creating art. The graduation performance sometimes falls well in love with itself, but also glimmers as a youthful showdown with the capital, writes DN's Valerie Kyeyune Backström.

data.title: Libanon varnar för brända jordens taktik
data.description: Libanons premiärminister Nawaf Salam säger i ett tv-sänt tal att utvecklingen med den israeliska offensiven i landet är ”farlig och saknar motstycke”. Samtal mellan Israel och Libanon som hållits i USA ledde inte till konkreta resultat, samtidigt som israeliska attacker fortsätter i Libanon.
data.translatedTitle: Lebanon warns of scorched earth tactics
data.translatedDescription: Lebanon's Prime Minister Nawaf Salam says in a televised speech that the development of the Israeli offensive in the country is "dangerous and unprecedented". Talks between Israel and Lebanon held in the United States did not lead to concrete results, while Israeli attacks continue in Lebanon.

data.title: Putin får ekonomisk chock om Nato stänger Östersjön
data.description: Ryssland förlorar 830 miljarder per år om Nato stänger Östersjön. Även Sverige skulle ta ekonomisk skada av en fullständig blockad. Men den stora säkerhetsrisken är att Putin attackerar, visar en ny rapport.
data.translatedTitle: Putin gets an economic shock if NATO closes the Baltic Sea
data.translatedDescription: Russia loses 830 billion per year if NATO closes the Baltic Sea. Sweden would also suffer financial damage from a complete blockade. But the big security risk is that Putin attacks, a new report shows.

data.title: Medlemmarna låter Författarförbundet fortsätta delta i AI-projekt
data.description: Författarförbundet får klartecken av sina medlemmar att stanna kvar i projektet att utveckla en ny språkmodell för att träna AI på det svenska språket. Efter intensiva diskussioner kom stämman fram till en kompromisslösning i den omstridda frågan.
data.translatedTitle: The members allow the Writers' Association to continue participating in AI projects
data.translatedDescription: The Authors' Association gets the go-ahead from its members to stay in the project to develop a new language model to train AI in the Swedish language. After intensive discussions, the meeting reached a compromise solution to the disputed issue.

data.title: Guldfavoriterna körde över skrällaget Norge i VM-semin
data.description: Efter en rad av skrällar tog det stopp för Norge. I lördagseftermiddagens VM-semifinal mot hemmanationen Schweiz var de ett nummer för små. Guldfavoriterna Schweiz vann med 6–0. För Norges del handlar det om att snabbt ladda om till söndagens bronsmatch mot Kanada.
data.translatedTitle: The gold favorites ran over the scrappy team Norway in the WC semis
data.translatedDescription: After a series of shocks, it stopped for Norway. In Saturday afternoon's WC semi-final against the home nation Switzerland, they were a number too small. Gold favorites Switzerland won 6–0. For Norway, it's about quickly recharging for Sunday's bronze medal match against Canada.

data.title: Bjässens vd: Irankrig och osäker olja får fler att överväga elbil
data.description: Kriget i Iran och blockeringen av Hormuzsundet har lett till högre kostnader. Men också ett ökat intresse för elbilar på viktiga europeiska marknader. Det säger Renaults vd François Provost.
data.translatedTitle: Bjässen's CEO: Iran war and uncertain oil make more people consider electric cars
data.translatedDescription: The war in Iran and the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz have led to higher costs. But also an increased interest in electric cars in important European markets. That's what Renault CEO François Provost says.

data.title: Sirius drar ifrån i toppen efter seger mot AIK
data.description: Sirius fortsätter vinna i den allsvenska fotbollen. På lördagseftermiddagen slogs AIK med klara 3–0 i lagens sista match innan sommaruppehållet.
data.translatedTitle: Sirius pulls away at the top after victory against AIK
data.translatedDescription: Sirius continues to win in Allsvenskan football. On Saturday afternoon, AIK was beaten with a clear 3-0 in the teams' last match before the summer break.

data.title: Hattrick för Botheim – sköt Malmö till segern
data.description: ”Bristande sportsliga prestationer och resultat som lag” var delar som tvingade Malmö FF att agera och sparka tränaren redan efter nio omgångar, enligt ordförande Zlatko Rihter. I hemmamatchen mot Halmstad fick MFF till båda delarna och vann med 5–2.
data.translatedTitle: Hattrick for Botheim - shot Malmö to victory
data.translatedDescription: "Lack of sporting achievements and results as a team" were parts that forced Malmö FF to act and fire the coach already after nine rounds, according to chairman Zlatko Rihter. In the home match against Halmstad, MFF got both parts and won 5–2.

data.title: Tone Schunnesson: ”Alex Schulman kan göra precis vad han vill”
data.description: Familjen i Tone Schunnessons nya roman ”Ultravåld” lever loppan på en ärvd förmögenhet, alltmedan slottet förfaller och relationerna rostar. DN:s Viktor Andersson har träffat författaren för att prata om släkt, kärlek, pengar – och fascinationen för våld.
data.translatedTitle: Tone Schunesson: "Alex Schulman can do exactly what he wants"
data.translatedDescription: The family in Tone Schunesson's new novel "Ultravåld" lives off an inherited fortune, while the castle decays and relationships rust. DN's Viktor Andersson has met the author to talk about family, love, money - and the fascination with violence.

data.title: Kenyaner dominerade Stockholm Marathon – Wikström tillbaka med SM-guld
data.description: Kenyanerna Edwin Kiptoo och Rebeca Chesir tog hem segrarna i årets Stockholm Marathon. Kiptoo gick för banrekordet, men missade precis. I SM vann Ebba Tulu Chala och Carolina Wikström bekvämt. – Det är min comeback efter en graviditet så jag är extra stolt och nöjd, säger Wikström.
data.translatedTitle: Kenyans dominated the Stockholm Marathon – Wikström back with SM gold
data.translatedDescription: Kenyans Edwin Kiptoo and Rebeca Chesir took home the victories in this year's Stockholm Marathon. Kiptoo went for the course record, but just missed. In the SM, Ebba Tulu Chala and Carolina Wikström won comfortably. - It's my comeback after a pregnancy, so I'm extra proud and satisfied, says Wikström.

data.title: Kanadensaren sålde ”självmordspaket” runt om i världen
data.description: Kanadensaren Kenneth Law, 60, har erkänt sig skyldig till att i 14 fall hjälpt människor att ta sitt liv. Law drev tidigare en rad webbplatser där han sålde ”själmordspaket” till personer runt om i världen. Nästan 100 dödsfall kopplas till honom.
data.translatedTitle: The Canadian sold "suicide kits" around the world
data.translatedDescription: Canadian Kenneth Law, 60, has pleaded guilty to helping people take their own lives in 14 cases. Law previously ran a series of websites where he sold "suicide kits" to people around the world. Almost 100 deaths are linked to him.

data.title: Marianne Björklund: Det betyder ett ”officiellt ja” i Delhi
data.description: DELHI. ”Officiellt ja”. Ravi, vår medhjälpare i Indien, ler snett. Sedan kommer en lång harang som mynnar ut i att han egentligen menar nej. Han svarar så på flera frågor. Som den om Delhis invånare sopsorterar.
data.translatedTitle: Marianne Björklund: It means an "official yes" in Delhi
data.translatedDescription: DELHI. "Officially yes". Ravi, our helper in India, smiles wryly. Then comes a long harangue that culminates in him actually saying no. He then answers several questions. Like the one about Delhi residents sorting garbage.

data.title: Däckades av skräckbakterie – nu är han tillbaka i Elitloppet
data.description: För 20 år sedan kuppade sig Jörgen Westholm in i Elitloppet. Nu är han tillbaka med hästarna Jobspost och Dream Mine. Men vägen till den stora dagen har inte varit lätt. I mitten av februari blev han helt utslagen av en ”skräckbakterie”.
data.translatedTitle: Was covered by horror bacteria - now he is back in the Elite race
data.translatedDescription: 20 years ago, Jörgen Westholm entered the Elitloppet. Now he is back with the horses Jobspost and Dream Mine. But the road to the big day has not been easy. In mid-February, he was completely knocked out by a "horror bacteria".

data.title: Nu sparar vi i våra hem
data.description: Svenska hem är fulla av saker som snabbt tappar i värde. Samtidigt växer intresset för antikviteter, kvalitetskläder, klockor och samlarföremål, ett skifte där konsumtion allt oftare handlar om lång livslängd, historia och andrahandsvärde snarare än snabba trender.
data.translatedTitle: Now we save in our homes
data.translatedDescription: Swedish homes are full of things that quickly lose value. At the same time, interest in antiques, quality clothing, watches and collectibles is growing, a shift where consumption is increasingly about longevity, history and resale value rather than fast trends.

data.title: En vemodig och vacker hyllning till barndomen, fantasin och växandet
data.description: Tioåriga Myy har leken kvar i kroppen och knuffas bort av det gamla kompisgänget. Emma Holm har läst en berättelse om skönhet och hänsynslöst växande.
data.translatedTitle: A wistful and beautiful tribute to childhood, imagination and growing up
data.translatedDescription: Ten-year-old Myy still has the game in her body and is pushed away by her old friends. Emma Holm has read a story about beauty and reckless growing.

data.title: Vårt behov av trygghet blir kanske inte så särskilt spännande berättelser
data.description: ”Kojslottet och ”Jag älskar dig i alla väder” är kanske inte de mest spännande bilderböckerna för ett barn. Men som kursböcker i föräldraskap är de utmärkta, tycker Martin Hellström.
data.translatedTitle: Our need for security may not make for very exciting stories
data.translatedDescription: "Kojslottet and "I love you in all weathers" are perhaps not the most exciting picture books for a child. But as course books in parenting, they are excellent, says Martin Hellström.

data.title: Svenskar som flyr storstäder: ”Letar efter ett lagom liv”
data.description: När svenskar flyr trängsel och höga boendekostnader i storstäderna söker de sig inte till landsbygden. Ny forskning från Umeå universitet visar att många i stället väljer orter som är ”lagom”.
data.translatedTitle: Swedes fleeing big cities: "Looking for a decent life"
data.translatedDescription: When Swedes flee congestion and high housing costs in the big cities, they don't go to the countryside. New research from Umeå University shows that many instead choose locations that are "just right".

data.title: Film om ryska krigsbrott mot barn visas i Sverige: ”De hjärntvättas”
data.description: En ny dokumentär från tidningen Kyiv Independent visar hur ukrainska barn systematiskt deporteras och luras att delta i krigslekar, som en del av rysk militarisering. Nu ska filmen visas i flera svenska städer. Först ut är Västerås den 2 juni.
data.translatedTitle: Film about Russian war crimes against children shown in Sweden: "They are brainwashed"
data.translatedDescription: A new documentary from the Kyiv Independent newspaper shows how Ukrainian children are systematically deported and tricked into participating in war games, as part of Russian militarization. Now the film will be shown in several Swedish cities. First up is Västerås on June 2.

data.title: V: Miljardärerna måste betala mer i skatt
data.description: Vänsterpartiet går till val på att införa en särskild skatt för miljardärer. Enligt V måste det in mer pengar i statskassan för att klara framtidens behov. – Vi tycker att det är miljardärerna och inte pensionärerna som ska betala, säger Ida Gabrielsson (V).
data.translatedTitle: V: The billionaires must pay more in taxes
data.translatedDescription: The left party is going to the polls to introduce a special tax for billionaires. According to V, more money must go into the treasury to meet the needs of the future. - We think it is the billionaires and not the pensioners who should pay, says Ida Gabrielsson (V).

data.title: Högerstrid kan gynna vänstern i Colombia
data.description: RIO DE JANEIRO. På söndag avgörs vilken av de två högerkandidaterna som får möta vänsterns Iván Cepeda i den avgörande omgången av det colombianska presidentvalet. Om ytterhögerkandidaten Abelardo de la Espriella går vidare väntas han förlora mot vänstern – och därmed göra USA:s president Donald Trump besviken.
data.translatedTitle: Right-wing strife could benefit the left in Colombia
data.translatedDescription: RIO DE JANEIRO. On Sunday, it will be decided which of the two right-wing candidates will face the leftist Iván Cepeda in the decisive round of the Colombian presidential election. If the far-right candidate Abelardo de la Espriella goes ahead, he is expected to lose to the left - and thus disappoint US President Donald Trump.

data.title: AI:s senaste genombrott skrämmer matematiker
data.description: AI har löst ett problem som världens matematiker har misslyckats med i 80 år. Experter är förbluffade över genombrottet och den allt snabbare utvecklingen. – Vi har en massa kriser som pågår i världen nu. Men när man ser tillbaka på vår tid kanske det är AI som vi borde ha fokuserat mest på, säger matematikprofessor Svante Linusson.
data.translatedTitle: AI's latest breakthrough scares mathematicians
data.translatedDescription: AI has solved a problem that the world's mathematicians have failed to solve for 80 years. Experts are stunned by the breakthrough and the increasingly rapid development. - We have a lot of crises going on in the world now. But when you look back at our time, perhaps it is AI that we should have focused on the most, says mathematics professor Svante Linusson.

data.title: Misstänks ha läckt statshemligheter – fortsätter jobba för Netanyahu
data.description: Benjamin Netanyahus närmaste man åtalas för att ha skadat landets säkerhet – men stannar på sin post och fortsätter att leda valkampanjen. Jonatan Urich misstänks för att ha läckt statshemligheter till tyska tidningen Bild.
data.translatedTitle: Suspected of leaking state secrets - continues to work for Netanyahu
data.translatedDescription: Benjamin Netanyahu's closest man is accused of harming the country's security - but remains in his post and continues to lead the election campaign. Jonatan Urich is suspected of having leaked state secrets to the German newspaper Bild.

data.title: Han gjorde dålig musik med flit för att slippa bli känd
data.description: Med konstiga rapförsök och brusiga Elvisimitationer skrämde musikern Steve Mason iväg sina lyssnare – när han stod på toppen av sin karriär. I ”Failure is always an option” skriver han om musikaliskt självsabotage. En både rolig och sorglig bok, tycker DN:s Mattias Dahlström.
data.translatedTitle: He made bad music on purpose to avoid being famous
data.translatedDescription: With strange rap attempts and noisy Elvis impersonations, musician Steve Mason scared his listeners away - when he was at the peak of his career. In "Failure is always an option" he writes about musical self-sabotage. A both funny and sad book, thinks DN's Mattias Dahlström.

data.title: DN:s musikredaktion: Här är maj månads bästa musik
data.description: Ett enastående livealbum, en hiphoptrio som bevisar sig musikaliskt och ett dödförklarande av dansgolvet. Thåström, Kneecap och Charli XCX står bakom några av de 14 viktigaste musiksläppen från den gångna månaden, enligt DN:s musikredaktion.
data.translatedTitle: DN's music editor: Here is the best music for the month of May
data.translatedDescription: An outstanding live album, a hip-hop trio that proves itself musically and a declaration of death on the dance floor. Thåström, Kneecap and Charli XCX are behind some of the 14 most important music releases from the past month, according to DN's music editor.

data.title: Årets maratonfest i gång: ”En frihet att springa”
data.description: På lördagseftermiddagen intog nästan 25 000 löpare huvudstadens gator för den 47:e upplagan av Stockholm Marathon. – Det är en frihet att springa, säger Daniel Salguero inför starten.
data.translatedTitle: This year's marathon party underway: "A freedom to run"
data.translatedDescription: On Saturday afternoon, almost 25,000 runners took to the capital's streets for the 47th edition of the Stockholm Marathon. - Running is a freedom, says Daniel Salguero before the start.

data.title: Carl Frode Tiller lägger sista bitarna i ett komplext litterärt pussel
data.description: Med ”Inringning 3” avslutar norske Carl Frode Triller sin trilogi om David som tappat minnet och annonserar efter alla som känt honom. Jesper Högström har läst 1 200 sidor nyanserad samtidsroman.
data.translatedTitle: Carl Frode Tiller adds the final pieces to a complex literary puzzle
data.translatedDescription: With "Inringning 3", Norwegian Carl Frode Triller concludes his trilogy about David who has lost his memory and is looking for everyone who knew him. Jesper Högström has read 1,200 pages of nuanced contemporary novels.

data.title: Anna Magnusson fortsätter – och tar steg mot ”det andra livet”
data.description: ÖSTERSUND. 31 år gammal gjorde hon karriärens bästa skidskyttesäsong. Det fick Anna Magnusson att undra: Kan hon bli ännu bättre? Därför fortsätter trotjänaren minst ett år till – men allt blir inte som vanligt.
data.translatedTitle: Anna Magnusson continues - and takes steps towards "the second life"
data.translatedDescription: EASTERN SUND. At the age of 31, she had the best biathlon season of her career. That made Anna Magnusson wonder: Can she get even better? Therefore, the faithful servant continues for at least one more year - but everything will not be as usual.

data.title: Mejan håller greppet som Sveriges ledande konsthögskola
data.description: Kungliga konsthögskolans master- och kandidatstudenter ställer ut sina avgångsprojekt på Konstakademien och Marabouparken. Sebastian Johans ser ett rikt utbud med teman om allt från familjehistorier och krig, till flytten av Kiruna.
data.translatedTitle: Mejan maintains its grip as Sweden's leading art school
data.translatedDescription: The Royal Academy of Fine Arts' master's and bachelor's students exhibit their graduation projects at the Academy of Arts and Marabou Park. Sebastian Johans sees a rich selection with themes on everything from family stories and war, to the relocation of Kiruna.

data.title: Volvo EX60 imponerar stort
data.description: Med skyhög komfort, snabb laddning, bra utrymmen och smart förarmiljö ser EX60 ut att ha alla rätt. Det finns bara ett litet orosmoment: Funkar den?
data.translatedTitle: The Volvo EX60 impresses greatly
data.translatedDescription: With sky-high comfort, fast charging, good spaces and a smart driver's environment, the EX60 seems to have everyone right. There is only one small concern: Does it work?

data.title: Inuti Volvos digitala hjärta – så byggs framtidens bilar
data.description: GÖTEBORG. Elsuven EX90 blev två år försenad och kostade Volvo 11 miljarder kronor. Nu vilar mycket på nya EX60 som innehåller tre gånger mer kod än ett Jas-plan. DN har besökt det hemliga mjukvarucenter där Volvo hoppas säkra sin framtid. – Vi har nu utvecklat en av världens bästa elbilar, säger teknikchefen Anders Bell.
data.translatedTitle: Inside Volvo's digital heart - this is how the cars of the future are built
data.translatedDescription: GOTHENBURG. The Elsuven EX90 was two years late and cost Volvo 11 billion kroner. Now much rests on the new EX60 which contains three times more code than a Jas plan. DN has visited the secret software center where Volvo hopes to secure its future. - We have now developed one of the world's best electric cars, says technical manager Anders Bell.

data.title: Nazister hyr bygdegårdar – låtsas ha dopkalas
data.description: SEVALLA. De utger sig för att vara barnfamiljer som ska fira dop eller födelsedagar. Men bakom bokningarna står nazistiska grupper. Nu varnar polisen för att extremhögern lurar sig in på bygdegårdar. – Man kände sig smutsig, säger Caroline P Johansson efter att nazipropaganda hittades i föreningens kök.
data.translatedTitle: Nazis rent village halls - pretend to have a christening party
data.translatedDescription: SEVALLA. They pretend to be families with children celebrating baptisms or birthdays. But Nazi groups are behind the bookings. Now the police are warning that the extreme right is sneaking into village halls. - You felt dirty, says Caroline P Johansson after Nazi propaganda was found in the association's kitchen.

data.title: Ingen vet hvorfor nordmenn er så benskjøre. Kan vårt enorme lettbrus-forbruk være forklaringen?
data.description: Nordmenn drikker enorme mengder sukkerfri cola samtidig som vi topper statistikken for benskjørhet og hoftebrudd.
data.translatedTitle: Nobody knows why Norwegians are so fragile. Could our huge soft drink consumption be the explanation?
data.translatedDescription: Norwegians drink enormous amounts of sugar-free cola at the same time that we top the statistics for brittle bones and hip fractures.

data.title: «Hvordan kan vi egentlig vite om Norge er på vei i en autoritær retning?» Det er et spørsmål jeg som ungarer ofte får av nordmenn.
data.description: Les kronikken.
data.translatedTitle: "How can we really know if Norway is heading in an authoritarian direction?" It is a question I, as a Hungarian, often get from Norwegians.
data.translatedDescription: Read the chronicle.

data.title: Tre tyskere døde i møteulykken i Tynset
data.description: De tre omkomne etter en møteulykke i Tynset lørdag er identifisert.
data.translatedTitle: Three Germans died in the collision in Tynset
data.translatedDescription: The three who died after a hit-and-run accident in Tynset on Saturday have been identified.

data.title: Skal ha mottatt mistenkelig brev – PST har iverksatt tiltak
data.description: En mann i 60-årene skal være ilagt besøksbud etter at et mistenkelig brev angivelig ble sendt til prinsesse Ingrid…
data.translatedTitle: Should have received a suspicious letter - PST has taken measures
data.translatedDescription: A man in his 60s will be subject to a restraining order after a suspicious letter was allegedly sent to Princess Ingrid...

data.title: Sverige vil senke lavalderen til 13. Særlig to ting blir nytt for barn som fengsles.
data.description: ROSERSBERG-ANSTALTEN: Ristingen fra bor og lyden av saging er det eneste som lager bråk i Rosersberg fengsel utenfor…
data.translatedTitle: Sweden will lower the minimum age to 13. Two things in particular will be new for children who are imprisoned.
data.translatedDescription: ROSERSBERG HOSPITAL: The shaking of drills and the sound of sawing are the only things that make noise in Rosersberg prison outside...

data.title: Israel varsler utvidet bakkeoperasjon i Libanon
data.description: Bakkeoperasjonen i Libanon skal utvides til å omfatte flere områder, sier det israelske forsvaret (IDF).
data.translatedTitle: Israel announces expanded ground operation in Lebanon
data.translatedDescription: The ground operation in Lebanon is to be expanded to include several areas, says the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF).

data.title: Person kritisk skadet i Porsgrunn – trolig voldshendelse
data.description: En person er skadet i det som framstår som en voldshendelse der en person har slått til en annen i Porsgrunn.
data.translatedTitle: Person critically injured in Porsgrunn - probably violent incident
data.translatedDescription: A person has been injured in what appears to be a violent incident where one person has hit another in Porsgrunn.

data.description: USAs president Donald Trump vil erstatte planlagte 250-årsjubileumskonserter i Washington med et politisk møte som han…
data.translatedTitle: Reaching out to artists: Launching itself as "the world's leading attraction"
data.translatedDescription: US President Donald Trump will replace planned 250th anniversary concerts in Washington with a political meeting that he…

data.description: Amerikanske militære har drept tre menn i det som myndighetene sier var en båt som fraktet narkotika i den østlige delen…
data.translatedTitle: Three killed in US attack on alleged drug boat
data.translatedDescription: The US military has killed three men in what authorities say was a boat carrying drugs in the eastern…

data.title: Kraftig meteor-eksplosjon over USA – hus ristet
data.description: En meteor har eksplodert over det nordøstlige USA med en eksplosjon som tilsvarer 300 tonn TNT.
data.translatedTitle: Powerful meteor explosion over the USA - houses shook
data.translatedDescription: A meteor has exploded over the northeastern United States with an explosion equivalent to 300 tons of TNT.

data.title: Ingen vekterstreik etter enighet i mekling
data.description: Flere timer på overtid ble NHO Service og Handel enig med nåde og Norsk Arbeidsmandsforbund og Parat om…
data.translatedTitle: No watchmen's strike after agreement in mediation
data.translatedDescription: Several hours of overtime, NHO Service and Trade graciously agreed with the Norwegian Workers' Union and Parat about...

data.title: Opptøyer i Frankrike etter PSG-seier
data.description: Politiet har pågrepet mer enn 400 personer i Frankrike, over 200 av dem i Paris, i opptøyer etter PSGs CL-seier lørdag.
data.translatedTitle: Riots in France after PSG victory
data.translatedDescription: Police have arrested more than 400 people in France, over 200 of them in Paris, in riots following PSG's CL win on Saturday.

data.title: Streiken i renholdsbransjen er over – får avtale om sykepenger
data.description: Norsk Arbeidsmandsforbund og NHO Service og Handel er enige om en avtale for renholdere, og dermed er den tre uker lange…
data.translatedTitle: The strike in the cleaning industry is over - an agreement is reached on sick pay
data.translatedDescription: The Norwegian Workers' Union and NHO Service og Handel agree on an agreement for cleaners, and thus the three-week long...

data.title: Full sparkesyklist trynet foran politiet i Stavanger
data.description: En mann i 30-årene på sparkesykkel ramlet like ved en politipatrulje i Stavanger. Han blåste til hele 1,22 i promille.
data.translatedTitle: Drunk kick-cyclist nosed in front of the police in Stavanger
data.translatedDescription: A man in his 30s on a scooter fell close to a police patrol in Stavanger. He blew to a whopping 1.22 per thousand.

data.title: Politiet avskiltet på konsert i Rogaland
data.description: Under en konsert i Sokndal i Rogaland ble begge skiltene til en politibil stjålet.
data.translatedTitle: The police separated at a concert in Rogaland
data.translatedDescription: During a concert in Sokndal in Rogaland, both license plates of a police car were stolen.

data.title: Mann omkom i MC-ulykke i Stryn
data.description: En mann i 50-årene omkom i en MC-ulykke i Stryn i Vestland lørdag kveld. Pårørende er varslet, opplyser politiet.
data.translatedTitle: Man died in motorbike accident in Stryn
data.translatedDescription: A man in his 50s died in a motorbike accident in Stryn in Vestland on Saturday evening. Next of kin have been notified, the police say.

data.title: Hun har undervist konfirmanter i 39 år: – Jeg tenker at forholdet til sex er et av de større problemene de har
data.description: Hun har undervist konfirmanter i nesten 40 år. Nå snakker hun høyt om mobbing, overgrep og kvelningssex blant dagens…
data.translatedTitle: She has taught confirmation students for 39 years: - I think that the relationship with sex is one of the bigger problems they have
data.translatedDescription: She has taught confirmation students for almost 40 years. Now she speaks loudly about bullying, abuse and strangulation sex among today's…

data.title: Droneangrep rammet atomkraftverket i Ukraina
data.description: En drone har truffet en turbinbygning ved atomkraftverket i Zaporizjzja.
data.translatedTitle: Drone attack hit the nuclear power plant in Ukraine
data.translatedDescription: A drone has hit a turbine building at the nuclear power plant in Zaporizhia.

data.description: 1. Hvilken kjent norsk kunstner står bak Keplerstjernen ved Gardermoen?
data.translatedTitle: Who is behind the Kepler star at Gardermoen?
data.translatedDescription: 1. Which famous Norwegian artist is behind the Kepler star at Gardermoen?

data.title: Kaos i Paris etter Champions League-triumf: Over 400 pågrepet
data.description: PSG-fans tente på sykler og biler – politiet svarte med tåregass.
data.translatedTitle: Chaos in Paris after Champions League triumph: Over 400 arrested
data.translatedDescription: PSG fans set fire to bicycles and cars - the police responded with tear gas.

data.title: Mener Arsenal bør lytte til Ødegaard-bud – dette sier nordmannen
data.description: Engelske medier sier at Arsenal planlegger sommersalg. Martin Ødegaard (27) trekkes frem som en mulig kandidat.
data.translatedTitle: Thinks Arsenal should listen to Ødegaard bid - this is what the Norwegian says
data.translatedDescription: English media say Arsenal are planning summer sales. Martin Ødegaard (27) is highlighted as a possible candidate.

data.title: Ville protester fra Arsenal: – Kan absolutt dømmes som straffe
data.description: Ble Arsenal snytt for straffe i ekstraomgangene av Champions League-finalen?
data.translatedTitle: Wild protests from Arsenal: - Can certainly be judged as a penalty
data.translatedDescription: Were Arsenal cheated out of a penalty in extra time of the Champions League final?

data.title: Du har neppe brukt superappens hans. Men nå er den mer verdt enn ChatGPT.
data.description: Nå har denne mannen fått Sam Altmans plass på toppen. Årsaken er en app du neppe har prøvd, og som de fleste ikke våger…
data.translatedTitle: You have hardly used his super app. But now it is worth more than ChatGPT.

data.title: Sartre havde muligvis ret, men hvordan i alverden valgte han den rette pizza?

data.translatedDescription: There is nothing to be said for people being stressed, anxious and burdened when you have to choose all the time, writes Henrik Palle in this column.

data.title: Redningsfolk har fundet ligene af ni personer, som har været savnet efter ulykke i USA
