data.translatedDescription: 11 people have been confirmed dead after a chemical tank at a US paper mill collapsed on Tuesday.

data.title: Eriksen er sidste mand fra den gamle garde på landsholdet. Men hvordan passer han ind?
data.description: Den mangeårige stjerne Christian Eriksen havde en perifer rolle på det landshold, der kiksede kvalifikationen til VM. Det var svært for ham. Men når genrejsningen begynder i den kommende uge, stiller han stadig op for Danmark.
data.translatedTitle: Eriksen is the last man from the old guard in the national team. But how does he fit in?
data.translatedDescription: The long-time star Christian Eriksen had a peripheral role in the national team that managed to qualify for the World Cup. It was difficult for him. But when the recovery begins next week, he will still line up for Denmark.

data.title: Hvad er Plan B? Nato er rystet, og Danmarks nye regering skal finde nye svar
data.description: Ifølge et kendt tidsskrift arbejdes der i Europa med hemmelige planer om et Nato uden USA. Hvad er Danmarks plan? Her er nogle af de ting, du skal kigge efter i den kommende regerings grundlag, skriver Michael Jarlner i denne internationale kommentar.
data.translatedTitle: What is Plan B? NATO is shaken, and Denmark's new government must find new answers
data.translatedDescription: According to a well-known magazine, secret plans for a Nato without the USA are being worked on in Europe. What is Denmark's plan? Here are some of the things you should look for in the future government's foundation, writes Michael Jarlner in this international commentary.

data.title: San Antonio slår forsvarende NBA-mestre
data.description: San Antonios franske stjernespiller, Victor Wembanyama, førte an i tæt semifinaleopgør mod Oklahoma.
data.translatedTitle: San Antonio beats defending NBA champions
data.translatedDescription: San Antonio's French star player, Victor Wembanyama, led the way in a close semifinal matchup against Oklahoma.

data.title: Læger uden Grænser: »Dybt alarmerende« hvor hurtigt ebola har spredt sig
data.description: Ingen kender omfanget og alvoren af udbruddet af ebola i DR Congo, siger medicinsk nødhjælpsorganisation.
data.translatedTitle: Doctors Without Borders: "Deeply alarming" how quickly Ebola has spread
data.translatedDescription: No one knows the extent and seriousness of the outbreak of Ebola in the DR Congo, says a medical aid organization.

data.title: Juraprofessor: »Det fremstår jo som en meget fritsvævende påstand«
data.description: For nylig afviste byretten i Næstved erstatningskravet over for staten i sagen om ’Scandinavian Star’. En central præmis var, at Søfartsstyrelsen ikke havde kendskab til, at skibet var begyndt at sejle mellem Frederikshavn og Oslo før branden i 1990. Men et mødereferat fra 1990 afslører, at ledelsen kendte til, at skibet skulle sejle. Sagen er nu anket til landsretten.
data.translatedTitle: Law professor: "It appears as a very free-floating claim"
data.translatedDescription: Recently, the district court in Næstved rejected the compensation claim against the state in the case of 'Scandinavian Star'. A central premise was that the Danish Maritime Authority had no knowledge that the ship had started sailing between Frederikshavn and Oslo before the fire in 1990. But a meeting report from 1990 reveals that the management knew that the ship was going to sail. The case has now been appealed to the High Court.

data.title: Tusindvis af betjente håndterer optøjer i Paris
data.description: 8000 betjente er sat på gaderne i fransk hovedstad for at holde styr på fodboldfans. Hundredvis er anholdt.
data.translatedTitle: Thousands of officers deal with riots in Paris
data.translatedDescription: 8,000 officers have been put on the streets of the French capital to keep track of football fans. Hundreds have been arrested.

data.title: Et år efter mesterskabet blev han fyret: Ledelsens højstemte afskedssalut illustrerer en barsk sandhed for fodboldens toptrænere
data.description: Med sociale medier som slagmark begynder fodboldfans at få forbløffende stor indflydelse i en ellers grotesk stor forretning som moderne fodbold. Det fik Arne Slot at føle blot et år efter at have ført Liverpool til mesterskabet.
data.translatedTitle: A year after the championship, he was fired: The management's high-pitched farewell salute illustrates a harsh truth for football's top coaches
data.translatedDescription: With social media as a battleground, football fans are beginning to have an astonishing amount of influence in an otherwise grotesquely big business like modern football. Arne Slot felt that just one year after leading Liverpool to the championship.

data.title: Israel og Rusland anklages for systematisk seksuel vold – de fleste ofre er mænd
data.description: Israel og Rusland er kommet på FN’s sorte liste over seksuel vold i konfliktzoner. Israel afviser beskyldningerne, fordømmer rapporten og har nu afbrudt forbindelsen til FN’s generalsekretær.
data.translatedTitle: Israel and Russia are accused of systematic sexual violence – most victims are men
data.translatedDescription: Israel and Russia have entered the UN's black list of sexual violence in conflict zones. Israel rejects the accusations, condemns the report and has now severed contact with the UN Secretary General.

data.title: Henrik Palle: Ny thriller er seriøst spændende
data.description: Man sidder og råber til hovedpersonen i den britiske thriller ’Prisoner’, men hun lytter ikke efter – og havde hun gjort det, havde serien nok heller ikke været så spændende.
data.translatedTitle: Henrik Palle: New thriller is seriously exciting
data.translatedDescription: You sit and shout at the main character in the British thriller 'Prisoner', but she doesn't listen - and if she had, the series probably wouldn't have been so exciting either.

data.title: Central præmis i dom om katastrofeskib kritiseres for at være forkert
data.description: En central præmis i den historiske byretsdom, der afviser erstatning til overlevende og pårørende til omkomne på ’Scandinavian Star’ bliver nu kritiseret for at være forkert. Det skyldes især oplysninger i et centralt dokument.
data.translatedTitle: The central premise in the verdict on the disaster ship is criticized for being wrong
data.translatedDescription: A central premise in the historic city court judgment, which rejects compensation for survivors and relatives of those who died on the 'Scandinavian Star', is now being criticized for being wrong. This is mainly due to information in a central document.

data.title: Et heldigt fund i et par beskidte bukser har sendt Rasmus Peronard i kø for at veksle i sidste øjeblik
data.description: Nationalbanken udfaser 1.000-kronesedlen. Politiken mødte nogle af dem, som brugte lørdagen på at få vekslet dem.

data.translatedDescription: Danmarks Nationalbank is phasing out the 1,000 krone note. Politiken met some of them, who spent Saturday getting them exchanged.

data.title: De 2.400 milliarder solgte cigaretter i Kina om året sætter Xi Jinping i prekær situation
data.description: Før Xi Jinping blev præsident, lovede han at sætte ind mod rygning. Mange år senere stiger salget af cigaretter dog stadig.
data.translatedTitle: The 2,400 billion cigarettes sold in China per year puts Xi Jinping in a precarious situation
data.translatedDescription: Before Xi Jinping became president, he promised to fight against smoking. Many years later, however, sales of cigarettes are still increasing.

data.title: Trump kalder sig »verdens største attraktion« efter stribe af aflysninger til stor jubilæumskoncert

data.translatedTitle: Trump calls himself "the world's biggest attraction" after a string of cancellations for big anniversary concerts
data.translatedDescription: Trump is considering giving a speech on The National Mall instead of concerts that were supposed to mark the United States' anniversary.

data.title: Norsk serie har ramt som et læs mursten
data.description: Norsk hospitalsserie, som nu kan ses på DR, er fremragende i hele sin ærlige skildring af lægeliv og patientpres.
data.translatedTitle: The Norwegian series has hit like a load of bricks
data.translatedDescription: The Norwegian hospital series, which can now be seen on DR, is excellent in its honest depiction of medical life and patient pressure.

data.title: Mand afgået ved døden under politiaktion i København
data.description: Københavns Politi har været til stede ved en politiforretning lørdag. En mand fik hjertestop og døde.

data.translatedDescription: Copenhagen Police was present at a police station on Saturday. A man went into cardiac arrest and died.

data.title: Kontrol med omstridte grisetransporter kulegraves
data.description: Rigsrevisionen har dumpet myndighedernes kontrol med dyrevelfærden i grisestaldene. Nu kaster revisorerne sig over de mange, lange grisetransporter, der hvert år kører 16 millioner smågrise ud af landet.
data.translatedTitle: Control of controversial pig transports is pitted
data.translatedDescription: The National Audit Office has dumped the authorities' control of animal welfare in the pig barns. Now the auditors are throwing themselves at the many, long pig transports that drive 16 million piglets out of the country every year.

data.title: Hoe Andries Noppert bij Oranje opeens in de wereld van luxe, supersterren én penaltykunde belandde
data.description: Tegen iedere verwachting in groeide Noppert, de doelman van sc Heerenveen, in 2022 uit tot de eerste keeper van Oranje op het WK in Qatar. Oog in oog met Lionel Messi besloot hij de orders van bondscoach Louis van Gaal te negeren.
data.translatedTitle: How Andries Noppert suddenly ended up in the world of luxury, superstars and penalty skills at the Dutch team
data.translatedDescription: Against all expectations, Noppert, the goalkeeper of SC Heerenveen, became the first goalkeeper of the Dutch team at the World Cup in Qatar in 2022. Face to face with Lionel Messi, he decided to ignore the orders of national coach Louis van Gaal.

data.title: Luisterverhaal op zondag: Hoe een 14-jarige jongen een boegbeeld werd op de Pride
data.description: In 2007 streed Danny Hoekzema, toen veertien jaar, ervoor dat jongeren onder de zestien óók een plek op de Pride kregen.
data.translatedTitle: Listening story on Sunday: How a 14-year-old boy became a figurehead at Pride
data.translatedDescription: In 2007, Danny Hoekzema, then fourteen years old, fought to ensure that young people under the age of sixteen also got a place at Pride.

data.title: Het geloof dat Arne Slot nog een vernieuwd, winnend team kon opbouwen bij Liverpool FC verdween gaandeweg
data.description: Na twee jaar in de elite van het Europese voetbal eindigt het avontuur bij Liverpool FC abrupt voor Arne Slot. Dit seizoen raakte hij verstrikt in tal van problemen, een overtuigend antwoord vond hij niet.
data.translatedTitle: The belief that Arne Slot could build a renewed, winning team at Liverpool FC gradually disappeared
data.translatedDescription: After two years in the elite of European football, the adventure at Liverpool FC ends abruptly for Arne Slot. This season he became entangled in numerous problems, and he was unable to find a convincing answer.

data.title: Rellen op Champs-Élysées in Parijs na winst PSG, honderden aanhoudingen
data.description: Op de Champs-Élysées in Parijs was het onrustig na de winst van Paris Saint-Germain in de Champions League-finale. Honderden mensen werden aangehouden.
data.translatedTitle: Riots on Champs-Élysées in Paris after PSG win, hundreds of arrests
data.translatedDescription: It was restless on the Champs-Élysées in Paris after Paris Saint-Germain's win in the Champions League final. Hundreds of people were arrested.

data.title: Wiebes is zege en roze trui in Giro d’Italia kwijt na diskwalificatie
data.description: Wielrenster Lorena Wiebes is de zege in de eerste etappe van de Giro d’Italia Women kwijt en uit de ronde gezet. De organisatie heeft de Nederlandse kampioene gediskwalificeerd omdat haar fiets niet aan het vereiste minimumgewicht zou hebben voldaan.
data.translatedTitle: Wiebes loses victory and pink jersey in Giro d'Italia after disqualification
data.translatedDescription: Cyclist Lorena Wiebes has lost the victory in the first stage of the Giro d'Italia Women and has been eliminated from the round. The organization disqualified the Dutch champion because her bicycle did not meet the required minimum weight.

data.title: Bijna is Arsenal voor het eerst de beste van Europa, maar na strafschoppen wint tóch weer PSG
data.description: In een wedstrijd die in niets leek op de finale van vorig seizoen, wint opnieuw Paris Saint-Germain. De Fransen blijken ook zonder spektakel te kunnen winnen. Voor Arsenal rest het vieren van de vorige week behaalde landstitel.
data.translatedTitle: Arsenal is almost the best in Europe for the first time, but PSG wins again after penalties
data.translatedDescription: In a match that looked nothing like last season's final, Paris Saint-Germain wins again. The French appear to be able to win without spectacle. What remains for Arsenal is to celebrate the national title won last week.

data.title: De vechthouding van het kabinet-Schoof
data.description: Heeft het kreukelkabinet-Schoof wel ooit bestaan? De verleiding is groot om de negentien regeermaanden van PVV, BBB, VVD en NSC te verdringen.
data.translatedTitle: The fighting attitude of the Schoof cabinet
data.translatedDescription: Did the crumple cabinet-Schoof ever exist? The temptation is great to replace the nineteen months of government of the PVV, BBB, VVD and NSC.

data.title: Mexicaanse president Sheinbaum gaat niet naar openingswedstrijd WK, geeft ticket weg aan inheemse balgoochelaar
data.description: Claudia Sheinbaum heeft haar kaartje symbolisch weggegeven aan de 21-jarige Yolett Cervantes Cuaquehua, die een wedstrijd won waarbij vrouwen hun voetbalvaardigheden konden tonen.
data.translatedTitle: Mexican President Sheinbaum will not go to the opening World Cup match, gives away ticket to native ball magician
data.translatedDescription: Claudia Sheinbaum symbolically gave away her ticket to 21-year-old Yolett Cervantes Cuaquehua, who won a match where women could show their football skills.

data.title: Al twintig jaar is het opheffingsuitverkoop bij de Perzenkoning. Nu stopt Jaap Vos (85) echt. Écht
data.description: De tapijthandel van Jaap Vos is bekend van de handgeschreven advertenties in vele kranten, waarin Vos al jaren opheffingsuitverkoop aankondigt, de ene na de andere. Zaterdag vond dan echt de allerlaatste plaats, die van zijn groothandel in Hendrik-Ido-Ambacht.
data.translatedTitle: The Persian King has been selling out for twenty years. Now Jaap Vos (85) is really stopping. Real
data.translatedDescription: Jaap Vos's carpet business is known from the handwritten advertisements in many newspapers, in which Vos has been announcing closure sales for years, one after the other. On Saturday the very last event took place, that of his wholesaler in Hendrik-Ido-Ambacht.

data.title: How the boomers screwed Europe
data.description: The huge rock ’n’ roll generation is sticking its few kids with the bill.
data.translatedTitle: How the boomers screwed Europe
data.translatedDescription: The huge rock ’n’ roll generation is sticking its few kids with the bill.

data.title: Na een beroerd seizoen moet Arne Slot weg bij Liverpool FC
data.description: Liverpool ontslaat de Nederlandse voetbaltrainer die vorig jaar nog de Premier League won.
data.translatedTitle: After a miserable season, Arne Slot has to leave Liverpool FC
data.translatedDescription: Liverpool fires the Dutch football coach who won the Premier League last year.

data.title: Ein Turnierverlauf wie von Guillaume Henri Dufour erdacht: Der WM-Final gegen Finnland ist für die Schweiz eine einmalige Chance
data.description: Ab 20.20 Uhr ermitteln die Schweiz und Finnland in der Zürcher Swiss-Life-Arena den Eishockey-Weltmeister. Eine bessere Chance auf das erste WM-Gold der Geschichte wird sich den Schweizern so schnell nicht mehr bieten.
data.translatedTitle: A tournament like that conceived by Guillaume Henri Dufour: The World Cup final against Finland is a unique opportunity for Switzerland
data.translatedDescription: From 8:20 p.m., Switzerland and Finland will determine the ice hockey world champion in Zurich's Swiss Life Arena. The Swiss won't have a better chance of winning the first World Cup gold in history any time soon.

data.title: Sind SpaceX-Aktien attraktiv? Die Antwort hängt ganz davon ab, in welchem Jahr nach dem Börsengang man sie kauft
data.description: Wer den Kursverlauf der Tesla-Titel kennt, weiss, dass auch der SpaceX-Kurs extrem volatil sein wird.
data.translatedTitle: Are SpaceX shares attractive? The answer depends entirely on which year after the IPO you buy it
data.translatedDescription: Anyone who knows the price trend of Tesla shares knows that the SpaceX price will also be extremely volatile.

data.title: Anschlag von Winterthur: Zwischen Jihad und Wahn
data.description: Im Profil von Attentätern wie N. D. vermischen sich vermehrt psychische Krisen mit extremistischem Gedankengut. Doch gerade jene Risikoabklärungen, die bei Terrorgefahr entscheidend sind, gehören in der Akutpsychiatrie nicht zum Standard.
data.translatedTitle: Winterthur attack: Between jihad and madness
data.translatedDescription: In the profile of assassins like N. D., psychological crises increasingly mix with extremist ideas. However, it is precisely those risk assessments that are crucial in the event of a terrorist threat that are not standard practice in acute psychiatry.

data.title: KOMMENTAR - 10-Millionen-Initiative: Von der Versuchung, jetzt ein Zeichen zu setzen
data.description: Es hat sich viel Ärger angestaut, gegen übermässige Zuwanderung, gegen Kriminelle mit Migrationshintergrund. Die Versuchung, dagegen ein Zeichen zu setzen, scheint gross. Und doch ist es klüger, ihr zu widerstehen.
data.translatedTitle: COMMENT - 10 million initiative: The temptation to make a statement now
data.translatedDescription: A lot of anger has built up against excessive immigration and against criminals with a migrant background. The temptation to take a stand against this seems great. And yet it is wiser to resist it.

data.title: Die Schweiz greift an der Heim-WM nach Gold – diese fünf Schlüsselfiguren tragen das Team
data.description: Von spielerischem Glanz bis zu kämpferischer Härte beherrscht das Schweizer Eishockey-Nationalteam 2026 alles. Das hat viel mit langjährigen Stammspielern zu tun – und mit dem neuen Coach.
data.translatedTitle: Switzerland is going for gold at the home World Cup – these five key figures are carrying the team
data.translatedDescription: From playful brilliance to fighting toughness, the 2026 Swiss national ice hockey team has mastered everything. That has a lot to do with long-time regular players – and with the new coach.

data.title: «Herr Jositsch, gab es einen Plan, um Sie aus dem Amt zu putschen?» – «Definitiv», sagt der abgesägte SP-Politiker
data.description: Die Zürcher SP will Daniel Jositsch nicht mehr als Ständerat. Nun sagt er, warum er glaubt, dass der Entscheid orchestriert war – und was er von seiner Rivalin Jacqueline Badran hält.
data.translatedTitle: "Mr. Jositsch, was there a plan to overthrow you from office?" – “Definitely,” says the sawn-off SP politician
data.translatedDescription: The Zurich SP no longer wants Daniel Jositsch as a member of the Council of States. Now he says why he believes the decision was orchestrated - and what he thinks of his rival Jacqueline Badran.

data.title: Gratis Essen und Philosophie in Genf, ein aufsehenerregender österreichischer Film, wiederentdeckte Schweizer Literatur: Die Kulturtipps der «NZZ am Sonntag»
data.description: Was muss man gelesen, gesehen oder gehört haben - und was eher nicht?
data.translatedTitle: Free food and philosophy in Geneva, a sensational Austrian film, rediscovered Swiss literature: The cultural tips from “NZZ am Sonntag”
data.translatedDescription: What do you have to read, see or hear - and what shouldn't you?

data.title: Klubeigentümer unterschätzen sie oft: die Macht des Volkes im Schweizer Fussball
data.description: Ein Fussballklub gehört nicht allein den Eigentümern. Die gescheiterten Umstürzler in St. Gallen sind nicht die Ersten, die das nicht begriffen haben.
data.translatedTitle: Club owners often underestimate it: the power of the people in Swiss football
data.translatedDescription: A football club does not belong to the owners alone. The failed revolutionaries in St. Gallen are not the first to fail to understand this.

data.title: Vom Schädling zum Liebling: Die Taube ist ein Animal politique – und erlebt einen überraschenden Imagewandel
data.description: In New York wird die Taube als neues Wahrzeichen gefeiert. Und Basel stimmt demnächst über betreute Nistplätze für die einst verhassten Tiere ab. Die «Ratten der Lüfte» haben immer mehr Fans.
data.translatedTitle: From pest to darling: the pigeon is an animal politique - and is experiencing a surprising change in image
data.translatedDescription: In New York, the pigeon is celebrated as a new landmark. And Basel will soon vote on managed nesting places for the once hated animals. The “Rats of the Skies” have more and more fans.

data.title: 10-Millionen-Initiative: Die Sorge um Dichtestress ist dort am grössten, wo es ihn gar nicht gibt
data.description: Ausgerechnet auf dem Land ist die Angst vor der Zuwanderung besonders verbreitet. Bauernhöfe und abgelegene Häuser sind zugepflastert mit Plakaten für die SVP-Initiative. Warum eigentlich? Eine Fahrt durch die Provinz.
data.translatedTitle: 10 million initiative: Concern about density stress is greatest where it doesn't exist
data.translatedDescription: Fear of immigration is particularly widespread in rural areas. Farms and remote houses are plastered with posters for the SVP initiative. Why actually? A drive through the province.

data.title: Der Anarchokapitalist Peter Thiel hat endlich eine Heimat gefunden – beim Anarchokapitalisten Javier Milei
data.description: Der amerikanische Tech-Unternehmer siedelt nach Buenos Aires über. Er sucht seit Jahren verbissen nach einem sicheren Hafen.
data.translatedTitle: The anarcho-capitalist Peter Thiel has finally found a home - with the anarcho-capitalist Javier Milei
data.translatedDescription: The American tech entrepreneur is moving to Buenos Aires. He has been doggedly searching for a safe haven for years.

data.title: Pannen und drohende Finanzprobleme: Jetzt hofft Skyguide auf Staatsgelder
data.description: Am Mittwoch ist es bei der Flugsicherung erneut zu einer IT-Panne gekommen. Tiefgreifende technische Probleme und Sparvorgaben der EU setzen das bundeseigene Unternehmen finanziell unter Druck. Nun spekuliert Skyguide auf Hilfe der öffentlichen Hand.
data.translatedTitle: Breakdowns and impending financial problems: Skyguide is now hoping for government money
data.translatedDescription: There was another IT breakdown at air traffic control on Wednesday. Deep technical problems and EU austerity requirements are putting the federally owned company under financial pressure. Now Skyguide is speculating on help from the public sector.

data.title: Donald Trump scheffelt in seiner zweiten Amtszeit Milliarden – auch dank seinen Söhnen. Einer von ihnen ist am Donnerstag in Zürich
data.description: Donald Trump jun. trifft sich diese Woche im Zunfthaus zur Saffran mit Geschäftsleuten aus aller Welt. Er und sein Bruder Eric verkaufen die Nähe zu ihrem Vater – und verdienen damit sehr viel Geld. Ihre Dreistigkeit erinnert an das Gebaren in korrupten Autokratien
data.translatedTitle: Donald Trump is raking in billions in his second term in office – thanks in part to his sons. One of them is in Zurich on Thursday
data.translatedDescription: Donald Trump Jr. is meeting this week in the Zunfthaus zur Saffran with business people from all over the world. He and his brother Eric sell their proximity to their father - and earn a lot of money with it. Their audacity is reminiscent of behavior in corrupt autocracies

data.title: Mehr Noahs und Astrids, bitte! Nun betreiben auch die Rechten in Schweden eine grosszügige Familienpolitik
data.description: In Schweden ist die Geburtenrate auf den tiefsten Stand seit einem Vierteljahrhundert gesunken. Dagegen möchte der rechtskonservative Block etwas tun. Migration kann im von Bandengewalt erschütterten Land aber politisch keine Option mehr sein.
data.translatedTitle: More Noahs and Astrids, please! Now the right-wing in Sweden is also pursuing a generous family policy
data.translatedDescription: In Sweden, the birth rate has fallen to its lowest level in a quarter of a century. The right-wing conservative bloc wants to do something about this. But migration can no longer be a political option in a country shaken by gang violence.

data.title: Wladimir Putin bedroht die Balten und testet damit seinen eigentlichen Gegner. Ein Besuch in Lettland, wo immer wieder Drohnen abstürzen
data.description: Moskau kündigt Vergeltung gegen ukrainische Drohnenangriffe auf russische Ostseehäfen an und beschuldigt ausgerechnet: die Balten. Sie würden den Ukrainern ihren Luftraum und ihre Basen zur Verfügung stellen. Streifzug durch ein verunsichertes Land.
data.translatedTitle: Vladimir Putin is threatening the Balts and is testing his real opponent. A visit to Latvia, where drones keep crashing
data.translatedDescription: Moscow announces retaliation against Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian Baltic Sea ports and blames, of all people: the Balts. They would make their airspace and bases available to the Ukrainians. Foray through an unsettled country.

data.title: Ewiges Leben aus dem Kühlregal – das nur vermeintliche Erfolgsrezept
data.description: An den Enhanced Games wurde mit Sport Werbung für Doping gemacht. Dass man auch gesünder altern kann, beweist der italienische Marathon-Greis Giuseppe Damato.
data.translatedTitle: Eternal life from the refrigerator shelf – the only apparent recipe for success
data.translatedDescription: Sport was used to promote doping at the Enhanced Games. Old Italian marathon runner Giuseppe Damato proves that you can age healthier.

data.title: SPÖ will Wehrdienst „attraktivieren statt verlängern“
data.description: Die SPÖ schlägt in der Debatte um die Verlängerung der Wehrpflicht ein „6+2“-Modell vor.
data.translatedTitle: SPÖ wants to “make military service more attractive instead of extending it”
data.translatedDescription: The SPÖ is proposing a “6+2” model in the debate about extending compulsory military service.

data.title: Iran pocht auf Freigabe eingefrorener Auslandsvermögen
data.description: Berichten zufolge soll eine Einigung zwischen den USA und dem Iran über ein Rahmenabkommen zur Verlängerung der Waffenruhe kurz bevorstehen.
data.translatedTitle: Iran insists on releasing frozen foreign assets
data.translatedDescription: An agreement between the US and Iran on a framework agreement to extend the ceasefire is reportedly imminent.

data.title: Islamistischer Extremismus: Sechs Festnahmen, 14 Hausdurchsuchungen
data.description: Einschlägige Netzwerke seien durch die Schwerpunktaktion „nachhaltig geschwächt“ worden, erklärt die Direktion Staatsschutz und Nachrichtendienst.
data.translatedTitle: Islamist extremism: six arrests, 14 house searches
data.translatedDescription: The State Security and Intelligence Directorate explains that relevant networks have been “sustainably weakened” as a result of the focus campaign.

data.title: „Jemand sollte dem Papst erklären...“: Trump attackiert erneut Leo XIV.
data.description: US-Präsident Donald Trump kritisiert ein Treffen des Papstes mit dem Chicagoer Bürgermeister und warnt vor iranischen Atomwaffen.
data.translatedTitle: “Someone should explain to the Pope…”: Trump attacks Leo XIV again.
data.translatedDescription: US President Donald Trump criticizes a meeting between the Pope and the Chicago mayor and warns about Iranian nuclear weapons.

data.title: Niessl: „Ich würde erstmalig ein aktiverer Bundespräsident sein“
data.description: „Es geht stark in Richtung überparteiliche Plattform“, sagt der frühere burgenländische Landeshauptmann Hans Niessl zu den Vorbereitungen für eine etwaige Bundespräsidentenkandidatur.
data.translatedTitle: Niessl: “I would be a more active Federal President for the first time”
data.translatedDescription: “It's moving very much towards a non-partisan platform,” says former Burgenland governor Hans Niessl about the preparations for a possible candidacy for federal president.

data.title: French Open-Coup: Das Service der Anastasia Potapova
data.description: Der Sieg über Titelverteidigerin Coco Gauff eröffnet bei den French Open die Chance auf den Viertelfinaleinzug. Und plötzlich werden „Anna-Rufe lauter.
data.translatedTitle: French Open-Coup: Das Service der Anastasia Potapova
data.translatedDescription: The victory over defending champion Coco Gauff opens up the chance of reaching the quarter-finals at the French Open. And suddenly “Anna’s calls get louder.

data.title: USA schwächen Pläne für erschwerten Zugang zur Green Card ab
data.description: Das US-Heimatschutzministerium teilte mit, dass die neue Regelung, wonach die Green Card nur noch aus dem Ausland beantragt werden kann, nicht für alle Antragsteller gelten werde.
data.translatedTitle: USA weakens plans for more difficult access to the green card
data.translatedDescription: The US Department of Homeland Security announced that the new rule, according to which the Green Card can only be applied for from abroad, will not apply to all applicants.

data.title: Nach Hantavirus-Ausbruch: Kreuzfahrtschiff „Hondius“ darf weiterfahren
data.description:
Das Schiff wurde laut den niederländischen Behörden erfolgreich gesäubert und
desinfiziert.
data.translatedTitle: After Hantavirus outbreak: Cruise ship “Hondius” is allowed to continue sailing
data.translatedDescription:
According to the Dutch authorities, the ship was successfully cleaned and
disinfected.

data.title: Meteor explodiert über den USA
data.description: Anrainer waren wegen der lauten Knallgeräusche alarmiert. Häuser sollen gewankt haben.
data.translatedTitle: Meteor explodes over the USA
data.translatedDescription: Neighbors were alarmed by the loud banging noises. Houses are said to have swayed.

data.title:
Wohin schwindet das Medienvertrauen? 
Zu den Newsfluencern [premium]
data.description: Immer weniger junge Menschen konsumieren klassische Medien. Stattdessen informieren sie sich zunehmend über Persönlichkeiten in sozialen Netzwerken. Wer sind die Newsfluencer, denen sie vertrauen – und was machen sie anders?
data.translatedTitle:
Where is media trust dwindling? 
To the newsfluencers [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Fewer and fewer young people are consuming traditional media. Instead, they increasingly inform themselves about personalities on social networks. Who are the newsfluencers you trust – and what are they doing differently?

data.title: Naftali Bennett: Der Mann, der Netanjahu besiegen will [premium]
data.description: Naftali Bennett will Langzeitpremier Benjamin Netanjahu mit einem Mitte-Rechts-Bündnis aus dem Amt jagen. Der Start-up-Millionär hat seine Wurzeln in der nationalreligiösen Siedlerbewegung. Er greift von rechts an.
data.translatedTitle: Naftali Bennett: The man who wants to defeat Netanyahu [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Naftali Bennett wants to drive long-term Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu out of office with a center-right alliance. The start-up millionaire has his roots in the national religious settler movement. He attacks from the right.

data.title: Was macht eigentlich Alexander Van der Bellen? [premium]
data.description: Innenpolitisch ist der Bundespräsident im Spätherbst seiner Amtszeit nur mehr selten wahrnehmbar, in der Außenpolitik ist er umso engagierter. Er kommuniziert über Reden und soziale Medien, Interviews meidet er. Eine Bilanz.
data.translatedTitle: What does Alexander Van der Bellen actually do? [premium]
data.translatedDescription: In the late autumn of his term in office, the Federal President is rarely visible in domestic policy, but he is even more committed to foreign policy. He communicates through speeches and social media and avoids interviews. A balance sheet.

data.title: Vom Mädlstreffen zum Damenkränzchen: Freundschaften fürs ganze Leben [premium]
data.description: Offenes Ohr, psychologische Notaufnahme, sicherer Hafen: Frauenfreundschaften erfüllen viele Funktionen. Warum sind sie so wichtig für uns? Und wie gelingt es, sie ein Leben lang zu halten? Drei Generationen erzählen.
data.translatedTitle: From the girls' meeting to the ladies' party: friendships for a lifetime [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Open ear, psychological emergency room, safe haven: female friendships fulfill many functions. Why are they so important to us? And how do you manage to keep them for a lifetime? Three generations tell the story.

data.title: Peter Thiels Kinderzimmer-Utopien [premium]
data.description: Liest und hört man Peter Thiel im Original, begegnet einem nicht unbedingt ein weiser Mann. Aber auch nicht der bizarre Demokratiezerstörer, von dem man uns erzählt.
data.translatedTitle: Peter Thiel's children's room utopias [premium]
data.translatedDescription: If you read and listen to Peter Thiel in the original, you don't necessarily meet a wise man. But neither is the bizarre democracy destroyer we are told about.

data.title: Die Evergreens der Opposition [premium]
data.description: FPÖ und Grüne haben auch in der Budgetdebatte hauptsächlich ihre immer gleichen drei Lösungsvorschläge parat. Ganz egal, wie das Problem eigentlich aussieht. So wird der politische Diskurs im Land gefährlich schmal.
data.translatedTitle: The evergreens of the opposition [premium]
data.translatedDescription: The FPÖ and the Greens mainly have their same three proposed solutions in the budget debate. No matter what the problem actually looks like. The political discourse in the country is becoming dangerously narrow.

data.title: Belarussische Oppositionsführerin Kalesnikava: »Ich tanzte in der Einzelzelle«  [premium]
data.description: Oppositionsführerin Maria Kalesnikava schildert, wie sie die jahre­lange Isolationshaft in Belarus überlebte. Sie bescheinigt der EU, keine Strategie zu haben, plädiert für Gespräche mit Diktator Lukaschenko und bleibt überzeugt: Der Tag der Freiheit für Belarus wird kommen.
data.translatedTitle: Belarusian opposition leader Kalesnikava: “I danced in a solitary cell” [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Opposition leader Maria Kalesnikava describes how she survived years of solitary confinement in Belarus. She certifies that the EU has no strategy, advocates for talks with dictator Lukashenko and remains convinced: the day of freedom for Belarus will come.

data.title: Erben, Babler und Champagner: Gewessler teilt bei Parteitag gegen die SPÖ aus [premium]
data.description: Umweltschutz zieht längst nicht mehr so wie früher, das neue Leben in der Opposition neben dem Protest-Monopol der FPÖ ist zäh. Also stimmte Leonore Gewessler die eigene Basis vor den nahenden Wahlen beim Parteitag der Grünen auf Klassenkampf ein – und vollen Angriff von links auf die SPÖ.
data.translatedTitle: Heirs, Babler and champagne: Gewessler distributes against the SPÖ at the party conference [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Environmental protection is no longer as attractive as it used to be, the new life in the opposition alongside the FPÖ's protest monopoly is tough. So Leonore Gewessler got her own base in the mood for class struggle before the approaching elections at the Green party conference - and a full attack from the left on the SPÖ.

data.title: Wo Theater überlebensnotwendig wird
data.description: Reportage. Eine ukrainische Oper als Beschwörung: Mit „Mōdraniht – Songs of Winter War“ gastiert das Kiewer Kollektiv Opera Aperta bei den Wiener Festwochen – ein kollektives Ritual gegen die Dunkelheit und den Krieg. Die „Presse“ besuchte die Proben.
data.translatedTitle: Where theater becomes necessary for survival
data.translatedDescription: Reportage. A Ukrainian opera as an incantation: The Kiev collective Opera Aperta is making a guest appearance at the Vienna Festival with “Mōdraniht – Songs of Winter War” – a collective ritual against darkness and war. The “press” attended the rehearsals.

data.title: Früher verschmäht und jetzt geliebt: Warum Bergbaukonzerne ein Comeback feiern  [premium]
data.translatedTitle: Once despised and now loved: Why mining companies are making a comeback [premium]

data.title: Diese Getränke-Aktie aus den USA hat stark verloren: Nun trauen ihr Experten eine Kursverdoppelung zu [premium]
data.description: Spekulative Aktien. Nahezu alle Experten sind überzeugt, dass der Aktie des Herstellers von Spezialgetränken ein steiler Kursanstieg bevorsteht. Und seit zwei Wochen scheint sie tatsächlich nach oben zu drehen.
data.translatedTitle: This beverage stock from the USA has lost a lot: now experts believe that its price will double [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Speculative stocks. Almost all experts are convinced that the specialty drinks manufacturer's shares are facing a steep price increase. And for two weeks it actually seems to be turning upwards.

data.title: Neuer, Illgner, Kahn, Köpke: Der ewige Streit der deutschen WM-Torhüter [premium]
data.description: Von Tilkowski bis Neuer: Die ewige Frage nach der deutschen Nummer eins begleitet den deutschen Fußball. Auch der Fußball-WM 2026 eilt diese Fragestellung voraus.
data.translatedTitle: Neuer, Illgner, Kahn, Köpke: The eternal dispute between the German World Cup goalkeepers [premium]
data.translatedDescription: From Tilkowski to Neuer: The eternal question of the German number one accompanies German football. This question also precedes the 2026 World Cup.

data.title: „Die Märkte reagieren heute viel schneller als früher“  [premium]
data.description: Wieso die Inflation für Anleger derzeit gefährlicher ist als geopolitische Krisen, erklärt Bankhaus-Spängler-Chef Werner Zenz.
data.translatedTitle: “The markets react much faster today than before” [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Bankhaus Spängler boss Werner Zenz explains why inflation is currently more dangerous for investors than geopolitical crises.

data.title: Seltene Erden: Ersatz ist schwierig     [premium]
data.description: Im Kampf gegen die Abhängigkeit von einigen wenigen Lieferanten spielen – neben der Diversifizierung von Lieferketten – innovative Technologien eine Schlüsselrolle. Bis zur Marktreife dauert es aber noch.
data.translatedTitle: Rare earths: replacement is difficult [premium]
data.translatedDescription: In addition to diversifying supply chains, innovative technologies play a key role in the fight against dependence on a few suppliers. But it will still take some time until it is ready for the market.

data.title: Michael Konsel: »Mein Verhalten kann für Konkurrenten brutal gewesen sein«
data.description: Er war Österreichs letzter WM-Torhüter: Ein Gespräch mit Michael Konsel über das einzig wahre Mindset einer Nummer eins, große Egos und den Umgang mit anderen Torhütern im Team. »Es hat mich nicht interessiert, was der andere macht und denkt.«
data.translatedTitle: Michael Konsel: “My behavior may have been brutal for competitors”
data.translatedDescription: He was Austria's last World Cup goalkeeper: A conversation with Michael Konsel about the only true mindset of a number one, big egos and dealing with other goalkeepers in the team. "I wasn't interested in what the other person did or thought."

data.title: „Es ist nicht unsere Aufgabe, Menschen beim Einkaufen zu erziehen, sondern ihnen Lösungen für den Alltag anzubieten“
data.description: Interview. Walter H. Lukner ist CEO bei PAYBACK Österreich und leitet das Multipartner-Bonusprogramm erfolgreich. Seit 2018 hat PAYBACK 3,2 Millionen Kunden gewonnen. Im Interview erklärt Lukner, was die Menschen gerade bewegt.
data.translatedTitle: “It is not our job to educate people while shopping, but to offer them solutions for everyday life”
data.translatedDescription: Interview. Walter H. Lukner is CEO at PAYBACK Austria and successfully manages the multipartner bonus program. Since 2018, PAYBACK has acquired 3.2 million customers. In the interview, Lukner explains what is currently affecting people.

data.title:
Columbus-Reisethek:
Farbenrausch zwischen Zen und Neon
data.description: Japan: Wenn Kōyō, die japanische Herbstlaubfärbung, Tempelgärten und Fuji in Rotgold taucht, öffnet sich ein Land aus Kaiserglanz, stiller Gartenkunst und exotischen Geschmackswelten.
data.translatedTitle:
Columbus travel library:
A riot of colors between Zen and neon
data.translatedDescription: Japan: When Kōyō, the Japanese autumn foliage, bathes temple gardens and Fuji in red gold, a land of imperial splendor, quiet garden art and exotic worlds of taste opens up.

data.title: Patricia Nolz im Musikverein: Singt da eine junge Marschallin Lieder? [premium]
data.description: Die junge Mezzosopranistin tendiert ins Dramatische: Ausgerechnet eine Fachgrenzen überschreitende Korngold-Zugabe hinterließ den stärksten Eindruck.
data.translatedTitle: Patricia Nolz in the music club: Is there a young Marschallin singing songs? [premium]
data.translatedDescription: The young mezzo-soprano tends towards the dramatic: of all things, it was a Korngold encore that transcended disciplinary boundaries that left the strongest impression.

data.title: Siege, Niederlagen und die Folgen [premium]
data.description: Wir erleben gerade zwei denkwürdige Kriege. Ist die Zeit von eindeutigen Siegen und Niederlagen vorbei? Ein Rückblick auf die Lage nach Kriegen.
data.translatedTitle: Victories, defeats and the consequences [premium]
data.translatedDescription: We are currently experiencing two memorable wars. Is the time of clear victories and defeats over? A look back at the situation after wars.

data.title: Woher haben Regenwürmer ihren Namen? [premium]
data.description: Fressen, sich paaren, übersiedeln: Ja, Regenwürmer lieben Regenwetter, weiß Boku-Forscherin Pia Euteneuer. Zum Namen passt das nur zufällig.
data.translatedTitle: Where do earthworms get their name from? [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Eating, mating, moving: Yes, earthworms love rainy weather, says Boku researcher Pia Euteneuer. It just happens to fit the name.

data.title: Was ist dran am Wellnesstrend Ear Seeding?  [premium]
data.description: Ohr-Akupunktur mittels Pflaster, sogenanntes „Ear-Seeding“, soll gegen „Cortisol Face“, Stress und Heißhunger helfen. Doch stimmt das wirklich?
data.translatedTitle: What's the deal with the ear seeding wellness trend?  [premium]
data.translatedDescription: Ear acupuncture using plasters, so-called “ear seeding”, is said to help against “cortisol face”, stress and cravings. But is that really true?

data.title: Plötzlich schaut meine weiße Bluse komisch aus  [premium]
data.description: Ich würde ja gerne ohne Mode leben. Jeder zieht an, was er glaubt und was ihm gefällt. Aber solange es Mode gibt, mache ich leider, leider mit.
data.translatedTitle: Suddenly my white blouse looks strange [premium]
data.translatedDescription: I would like to live without fashion. Everyone wears what they believe and what they like. But as long as there is fashion, I'll unfortunately, unfortunately, go along with it.

data.title: Achtung, Vampir! Die Blutsauger-Epidemie erreicht Europa, wo alles begann [premium]
data.description: Die faszinierenden Gestalten, untot seit dem 18. Jahrhundert, erobern wieder unsere Kinos und Theater. Ein Vampirologe erklärt, was Vampire in uns auslösen und was Knoblauch mit dem „Hodensack Christi“ zu tun hat.
data.translatedTitle: Watch out, vampire! The bloodsucker epidemic reaches Europe, where it all began [premium]
data.translatedDescription: The fascinating figures, undead since the 18th century, are once again conquering our cinemas and theaters. A vampirologist explains what vampires trigger in us and what garlic has to do with the “scrotum of Christ”.

data.title: Eine Kunstmesse wie ein Volksfest [premium]
data.description: Die Affordable Art Fair findet heuer zum zweiten Mal in Wien statt. Die Messe bietet Kunst bis zu maximal 10.000 Euro und will so den Markt demokratisieren.
data.translatedTitle: An art fair like a folk festival [premium]
data.translatedDescription: The Affordable Art Fair is taking place in Vienna for the second time this year. The fair offers art up to a maximum of 10,000 euros and aims to democratize the market.

data.title: Berufliche Verfehlungen
data.description: Susanne Pöchacker macht sich einen Reim auf Ungereimtheiten der Businesswelt. Diesmal geht es um die richtige Jobwahl.
data.translatedTitle: Professional misconduct
data.translatedDescription: Susanne Pöchacker makes sense of the inconsistencies in the business world. This time it's about choosing the right job.

data.title: Nowe wytyczne dla ADHD. Psychiatrzy pierwszy raz wskazują, kiedy warto odstawić leki
data.description: Międzynarodowa grupa ekspertów związanych z American Society of Clinical Psychopharmacology (ASCP) po raz pierwszy opublikowała rekomendacje dotyczące tego, kiedy warto rozważyć ograniczenie lub odstawienie stymulantów stosowanych w farmakoterapii ADHD u dorosłych.
data.translatedTitle: New guidelines for ADHD. For the first time, psychiatrists indicate when it is worth discontinuing medications
data.translatedDescription: An international group of experts associated with the American Society of Clinical Psychopharmacology (ASCP) has published for the first time recommendations on when it is worth considering limiting or discontinuing stimulants used in the pharmacotherapy of ADHD in adults.

data.title: Jack White w Polsce. Jego „Seven Nation Army" zarobiło dziesiątki milionów dolarów
data.description: Jeśli tegoroczny mundial będzie taki jak poprzednie – na stadionach w Ameryce śpiewane będzie „Seven Nation Army” Jacka White’a. My zaś 1 i 2 czerwca zobaczymy go w warszawskiej Stodole i krakowskim Studio. I usłyszymy wielki hit wcześniej.
data.translatedTitle: Jack White in Poland. His "Seven Nation Army" grossed tens of millions of dollars
data.translatedDescription: If this year's World Cup is like the previous ones, Jack White's "Seven Nation Army" will be sung in stadiums in America. On June 1 and 2, we will see him at Stodola in Warsaw and Studio in Krakow. And we'll hear the big hit sooner.

data.title: Zamieszki w Paryżu, kula ognia nad Massachusetts i „przelewanie” pogorzeliska na Mazowszu
data.description: Oto przegląd najważniejszych wydarzeń mijającej nocy. Strażacy dogaszali pożar lasu w powiecie wołomińskim na Mazowszu. W Massachusetts i Rhode Island w północno-wschodniej części USA słyszalny był potężny huk, a drżenie budynków i jasna kula ognia postawiły na nogi policję i służby. Powodem okazał się eksplodujący meteoryt. Francuska policja zatrzymała 416 osób w związku z zamieszkami, do których doszło po zwycięstwie Paris Saint-Germain nad Arsenalem Londyn.
data.translatedTitle: Riots in Paris, a ball of fire over Massachusetts and the "overflow" of fire in Masovia
data.translatedDescription: Here's a look at the highlights of the night. Firefighters extinguished a forest fire in the Wołomin district in Masovia. In Massachusetts and Rhode Island in the northeastern part of the USA, a huge bang was heard, and the shaking of buildings and a bright ball of fire brought the police and emergency services to their feet. The cause turned out to be an exploding meteorite. French police detained 416 people in connection with the riots that occurred after Paris Saint-Germain's victory over Arsenal.

data.title: Loty do USA tego lata. Co czeka podróżnych
data.description: Amerykanie trochę poluzowują warunki wjazdu, bo wystraszyli potencjalnych pasażerów, którzy wybierali się na Mundial. A ceny? Na niektóre loty nadal są promocje. Ale raczej z USA do Europy.
data.translatedTitle: Flights to the USA this summer. What awaits travelers?
data.translatedDescription: The Americans are loosening entry conditions a bit because they scared off potential passengers who were going to the World Cup. And the prices? There are still promotions on some flights. But rather from the USA to Europe.

data.title: Piąta edycja TOP CHARITY z rekordem, nagrodami i królem Asante z Ghany
data.description: Piąta, jubileuszowa edycja TOP CHARITY Gala „The Magic Kingdom of Asante”, która odbyła się w otoczeniu historycznej architektury Muzeum Łazienek Królewskich, zakończyła się kolejnym rekordem, przynosząc około 85 mln zł na cele charytatywne.
data.translatedTitle: The fifth edition of TOP CHARITY with a record, prizes and the King of Asante from Ghana
data.translatedDescription: The fifth, jubilee edition of TOP CHARITY The "The Magic Kingdom of Asante" gala, which took place surrounded by the historic architecture of the Royal Łazienki Museum, ended with another record, bringing in approximately PLN 85 million for charity purposes.

data.title: Loteria Buddy. Choć zdjęto zabezpieczenie z gwarancji, nagrody wciąż zablokowane
data.description: Prokuratura zdjęła zabezpieczenie z pieniędzy, które miały być gwarancją dla zwycięzców loterii znanego influencera Buddy. Wciąż jednak nie wiadomo, kiedy i czy w ogóle zostaną one wypłacone zwycięzcom.
data.translatedTitle: Buddha lottery. Even though the guarantee has been removed, the prizes are still blocked
data.translatedDescription: The prosecutor's office removed the security from the money that was supposed to be a guarantee for the lottery winners of the famous influencer Buddy. However, it is still unknown when and if they will be paid to the winners.

data.title: Tajemnica rodziny prezydenta. Dlaczego tak aktywnie wspiera Karola Nawrockiego
data.description: Marta Nawrocka często porównywana jest do Jolanty Kwaśniewskiej, z kolei Daniel Nawrocki wymyka się wszystkim dotychczasowym klasyfikacjom. Obecny prezydent ma najbardziej aktywną rodzinę ze wszystkich dotychczasowych. Ich działania są autentyczne czy to tylko polityczny teatr?
data.translatedTitle: The secret of the president's family. Why does he support Karol Nawrocki so actively?
data.translatedDescription: Marta Nawrocka is often compared to Jolanta Kwaśniewska, while Daniel Nawrocki defies all previous classifications. The current president has the most active family of all. Are their actions authentic or just political theater?

data.title: Sondaż: Polacy ocenili jak o polskim państwie świadczy seria fałszywych alarmów
data.description: Pięć osób zatrzymano jak dotąd w sprawie fałszywych alarmów w mieszkaniach i nieruchomościach należących do ludzi wywodzących się z kręgu prawicy. Wobec czterech z tych osób zastosowano areszt. Najgłośniejszy z tych alarmów dotyczył gdańskiego mieszkania, które należy do matki prezydenta Karola Nawrockiego.
data.translatedTitle: Poll: Poles assessed what a series of false alarms reflect on the Polish state
data.translatedDescription: Five people have been detained so far in connection with false alarms in apartments and properties belonging to right-wing people. Four of these people were arrested. The loudest of these alarms concerned the apartment in Gdańsk, which belongs to the mother of President Karol Nawrocki.

data.title: Marek Kutarba: Polskość firm, które korzystają na SAFE, mierzmy miejscami pracy
data.description: Trudno może być pogodzić się z tym, że polskie firmy przed upadkiem musiały ratować zagraniczne koncerny. Ale - również w kontekście programu SAFE - „polskość” warto postrzegać również przez pryzmat tego, gdzie dane zakłady się znajdują, gdzie dają ludziom pracę, gdzie budują potencjał intelektualny.
data.translatedTitle: Marek Kutarba: Let's measure the Polishness of companies that benefit from SAFE by jobs
data.translatedDescription: It may be difficult to accept that Polish companies had to be saved by foreign concerns from bankruptcy. But - also in the context of the SAFE program - "Polishness" is also worth seeing through the prism of where given plants are located, where they give people jobs, where they build intellectual potential.

data.title: Spór o niezatwierdzony lek za miliony od Łatwoganga. Mama Adasia: wiem, co czeka synka bez terapii
data.description: Ja wiem, jaka przyszłość czeka mojego synka bez terapii genowej. Mogę więc siedzieć i czekać na to, co nieuchronne. A mogę spróbować czegoś, co daje szansę to zmienić - mówi Alicja Orlik, mama chorego na DMD Adasia w rozmowie z Katarzyną Świerczyńską-Elmerych, dziennikarką Rynku Zdrowia. Z pomocją Piotra Hancke, znanego jako Łatwogang, udało się zamknąć zbiórkę chłopca. Jednak akcja wywołała gorącą dyskusję, bo Europejska Agencja Leków podważa skuteczność terapii, a lekarze w Polsce odmawiają podania leku.
data.translatedTitle: Litigation over approved drug worth millions from Latwogang. Adaś's mother: I know what awaits my son without therapy
data.translatedDescription: I know what the future awaits my son without gene therapy. So I can sit and wait for the inevitable. And I can try something that gives me a chance to change it - says Alicja Orlik, mother of Adaś, who suffers from DMD, in an interview with Katarzyna Świerczyńska-Elmerych, a journalist from Rynek Zdrowia. With the help of Piotr Hancke, known as Łagang, the boy's collection was closed. However, the action sparked a heated discussion because the European Medicines Agency questions the effectiveness of the therapy and doctors in Poland refuse to administer the drug.

data.title: Polska kupuje 64 moździerze Rak za pieniądze z SAFE. Na Ukrainie są koszmarem dla Rosjan
data.description: Do 2030 roku liczba użytkowanych w Wojsku Polskim samobieżnych automatycznych moździerzy 120 mm Rak zwiększy się o 64. Łącznie w jednostkach bojowych nasze wojsko będzie dysponowało prawdopodobnie 176 pojazdami tego typu, które zdążono już przetestować na Ukrainie.
data.translatedTitle: Poland buys 64 Rak mortars with money from SAFE. In Ukraine, they are a nightmare for Russians
data.translatedDescription: By 2030, the number of self-propelled automatic 120 mm Rak mortars used in the Polish Army will increase by 64. In total, our army will probably have 176 vehicles of this type in combat units, which have already been tested in Ukraine.

data.title: Dziś w nocy spójrz w niebo. Zobaczysz Niebieski Księżyc
data.description: Niebieski Księżyc, czyli druga pełnia w ciągu jednego miesiąca, zdarza się bardzo rzadko. Takie zjawisko będziemy mogli obserwować w niedzielę, 31 maja.
data.translatedTitle: Tonight, look up at the sky. You will see the Blue Moon
data.translatedDescription: A blue moon, the second full moon in one month, is very rare. We will be able to observe such a phenomenon on Sunday, May 31.

data.title: Badacze wyjaśnili, dlaczego tyranozaury miały krótkie ramiona
data.description: Dlaczego u mięsożernych dinozaurów takich jak Tyrannosaurus rex wykształciły się krótkie ramiona? Brytyjscy naukowcy być może znaleźli odpowiedź na to pytanie. Okazuje się, że ewolucja ramion była prawdopodobnie spowodowana rozwojem silnych, potężnych głów używanych do atakowania ofiar.
data.translatedTitle: Researchers have explained why tyrannosaurs had short arms
data.translatedDescription: Why did carnivorous dinosaurs like Tyrannosaurus rex develop short arms? British scientists may have found the answer to this question. It turns out that the evolution of arms was probably due to the development of strong, powerful heads used to attack prey.

data.title: Nowe właściwości witaminy C. Pomaga chronić układ pokarmowy
data.description: Naukowcy z Uniwersytetu w Waterloo sprawdzili, jak witamina C wpływa na reakcje chemiczne w układzie pokarmowym, które są powiązane z rozwojem nowotworów. Odkryli, że jej spożywanie może ograniczać szkodliwe działanie azotynów i azotanów.
data.translatedTitle: New properties of vitamin C. Helps protect the digestive system
data.translatedDescription: Scientists from the University of Waterloo examined how vitamin C affects chemical reactions in the digestive system that are linked to the development of cancer. They found that consuming it can reduce the harmful effects of nitrites and nitrates.

data.title: Warszawa zakazuje nocnej sprzedaży alkoholu. Zmiany od 1 czerwca
data.description: Restrykcyjne ograniczenia w handlu alkoholem zaczną obowiązywać od 1 czerwca w całej Warszawie. W nocy napojów alkoholowych nie będzie można kupić w sklepach, kioskach ani na stacjach benzynowych.
data.translatedTitle: Warsaw bans the sale of alcohol at night. Changes from June 1
data.translatedDescription: Strict restrictions on alcohol trade will come into force from June 1 throughout Warsaw. At night, alcoholic beverages will not be available for purchase in stores, kiosks or gas stations.

data.title: Szkody górnicze zmuszają do radykalnych działań. Tu przeniesiono całe miasta
data.description: Szkody górnicze to poważny problem. Czasami bywają na tyle poważne, że konieczne okazuje się przeniesienie ośrodków stojących nad terenami wydobywczymi. Taka sytuacja ma miejsce m.in. w przypadku szwedzkiego miasta Kiruna. Temat poruszył niedawno serwis Property Design.
data.translatedTitle: Mining damage forces us to take radical actions. Entire cities were moved here
data.translatedDescription: Mining damage is a serious problem. Sometimes they are so serious that it is necessary to relocate the centers located above the mining areas. This situation occurs, among others, in the case of the Swedish city of Kiruna. The topic was recently discussed by Property Design.

data.title: Stefan Szczepłek: Sukces PSG tyleż szczęśliwy, co zasłużony
data.description: Paris Saint-Germain drugi raz z rzędu wygrał Ligę Mistrzów, czyli zdobył klubowe mistrzostwo Europy. Dokonał tego z tym samym trenerem co przed rokiem: Hiszpanem Luisem Enrique i w większości z tymi samymi zawodnikami.
data.translatedTitle: Stefan Szczepłek: PSG's success is both fortunate and deserved
data.translatedDescription: Paris Saint-Germain won the Champions League for the second time in a row, which means it won the European club championship. He did it with the same coach as last year: the Spaniard Luis Enrique and with most of the same players.

data.title: „To igranie z ogniem”. Dron uderzył w Zaporoską Elektrownię Jądrową, jest reakcja MAEA
data.description: Międzynarodowa Agencja Energii Atomowej (MAEA) poinformowała, że po tym, jak dron uderzył w Zaporoską Elektrownię Jądrową, podjęła działania na terenie obiektu. „To igranie z ogniem” – podkreślono w komunikacie.
data.translatedTitle: "It's playing with fire." A drone hit the Zaporizhia Nuclear Power Plant, the IAEA is reacting
data.translatedDescription: The International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) announced that it took action at the facility after a drone hit the Zaporozhye Nuclear Power Plant. "This is playing with fire," the statement emphasized.

data.title: „Niebywała buta”. Miller ostro o Zełenskim i „banderowskiej piątej kolumnie” w Polsce
data.description: Leszek Miller skomentował nadanie honorowego miana „Bohaterów UPA” Odrębnemu Centrum Operacji Specjalnych „Północ” Sił Operacji Specjalnych Sił Zbrojnych Ukrainy. - Wyraz całkowitej pogardy dla naszych polskich uczuć - zaznaczył były premier.
data.translatedTitle: "Exceptional arrogance." Miller harshly about Zelensky and the "Banderist fifth column" in Poland
data.translatedDescription: Leszek Miller commented on awarding the honorary title of "UPA Heroes" to the Separate Special Operations Center "North" of the Special Operations Forces of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. - An expression of total contempt for our Polish feelings - noted the former prime minister.

data.title: „Naše vztahy přinášejí dobré výsledky.“ Vystrčil odletěl na Tchaj-wan
data.description: Předseda Senátu Miloš Vystrčil (ODS) před odletem na Tchaj-wan řekl, že je jeho cesta hodnotová i pragmatická. Míní, že Česku přinese užitek i autoritu. Ve Vystrčilově delegaci jsou také podnikatelé a zástupci univerzit. Cesta se koná navzdory tomu, že kabinet pro ni odmítl poskytnout vládní letoun, premiér Andrej Babiš (ANO) to zdůvodnil tím. že vláda chce dělat pragmatickou a ne hodnotovou politiku.
data.translatedTitle: "Our relationships bring good results." He pushed out and flew to Taiwan
data.translatedDescription: The President of the Senate, Miloš Vystrčil (ODS), said before leaving for Taiwan that his trip was both valuable and pragmatic. He believes that it will bring benefit and authority to the Czech Republic. Vystrčil's delegation also includes businessmen and university representatives. The trip is taking place despite the fact that the cabinet refused to provide a government plane for it, Prime Minister Andrej Babiš (ANO) justified it by this. that the government wants to make a pragmatic and not value policy.

data.title: Začíná Brno Pride Week, zdůrazňuje význam respektu a komunitní soudržnosti
data.description: Sportovní a kulturní program v parku u Anthroposu v neděli zahájí festival Brno Pride Week. Letošní ročník má heslo "Vždycky je něco, co nás spojuje". Reaguje na současnou situaci queer lidí v Česku i ve světě a zdůrazňuje význam bezpečného prostoru, respektu, lidskosti a komunitní soudržnosti. Program festivalu poskytla za organizátory Eliška Mádrová.
data.translatedTitle: Brno Pride Week begins, emphasizing the importance of respect and community cohesion
data.translatedDescription: The sports and cultural program in the park near Anthropos will start the Brno Pride Week festival on Sunday. This year's motto is "There is always something that unites us". It responds to the current situation of queer people in the Czech Republic and in the world and emphasizes the importance of a safe space, respect, humanity and community cohesion. Eliška Mádrová provided the festival program on behalf of the organizers.

data.title: Poryv větru shodil strom na ženu. Pro zraněnou letěl vrtulník
data.description: Na pětašedesátiletou ženu spadl v sobotu odpoledne po poryvu větru strom v Podzámčí u Kdyně na Domažlicku. V západních Čechách je to nejvážnější důsledek sobotního výkyvu počasí, před nímž varovaly předpovědi meteorologů. Ženu odvezl z místa vrtulník Letecké záchranné služby.
data.translatedTitle: A gust of wind knocked the tree over the woman. A helicopter flew for the injured
data.translatedDescription: A tree fell on a 65-year-old woman on Saturday afternoon after a gust of wind in Podzámčí near Kdyn in Domažlick. In western Bohemia, this is the most serious consequence of Saturday's weather fluctuation, which the meteorologists' forecasts warned against. The woman was taken from the scene by an Air Rescue helicopter.

data.title: Klenoty nejen z první republiky. Naleštění veteráni projeli okolím Plzně
data.description: Desítky nádherných naleštěných starých aut a motorek projely v sobotu Plzeňskem v rámci 36. ročníku Jízdy historických vozidel okolím Plzně. Start i cíl jízdy byl v Autocampu Ostende v Plzni-Bolevci, kam akce přilákala spoustu diváků. Kromě klenotů motoristické historie k atmosféře patřila i hudba a móda první republiky.
data.translatedTitle: Jewels not only from the First Republic. Polished veterans drove around Pilsen
data.translatedDescription: Dozens of beautifully polished old cars and motorbikes drove through Pilsen on Saturday as part of the 36th Annual Historic Vehicle Drive around Pilsen. The start and finish of the ride was at Autocamp Ostende in Pilsen-Bolevec, where the event attracted a lot of spectators. In addition to the jewels of motoring history, the music and fashion of the First Republic were part of the atmosphere.

data.title: Brennerská dálnice byl kvůli demonstraci uzavřená, lidem vadí její přetížení
data.description: Od sobotního dopoledne až do večera řidiči osobních ani nákladních aut neprojeli přes Brennerskou dálnici (A13), která je považována za hlavní přesalpský dopravní tah spojující střední Evropu a Itálii. Během osmihodinové uzavírky na dálnici demonstrovalo asi 5000 lidí proti nadměrnému provozu a proti s ním souvisejícímu hluku a znečištění ovzduší.
data.translatedTitle: The Brenner motorway was closed due to the demonstration, people are bothered by its congestion
data.translatedDescription: From Saturday morning until the evening, drivers of cars and trucks did not drive over the Brenner motorway (A13), which is considered the main trans-Alpine transport route connecting Central Europe and Italy. About 5,000 people demonstrated during the eight-hour highway closure against excessive traffic and the associated noise and air pollution.

data.title: Česko asi závazky NATO nesplní, u Trumpa ale máme výhodu, říká Babiš
data.description: Česko letos nejspíš nesplní závazek v NATO vydat na obranu dvě procenta hrubého domácího produktu (HDP). Má však výhodu v tom, že český premiér Andrej Babiš je jedním z posledních příznivců amerického prezidenta Donalda Trumpa mezi evropskými lídry. Babiš to řekl v rozhovoru s britským deníkem Financial Times (FT).
data.translatedTitle: The Czech Republic will probably not fulfill NATO obligations, but we have an advantage with Trump, says Babiš
data.translatedDescription: This year, the Czech Republic will most likely not fulfill its NATO commitment to spend two percent of gross domestic product (GDP) on defense. However, it has the advantage that Czech Prime Minister Andrej Babiš is one of the last supporters of US President Donald Trump among European leaders. Babiš said this in an interview with the British newspaper Financial Times (FT).

data.title: Izrael dobyl pevnost na jihu Libanonu, v zemi je nejhlouběji od roku 2000
data.description: Izraelská armáda oznámila dobytí křižácké pevnosti Beaufort na jihu Libanonu. Podle agentury AP se jedná o nejhlubší izraelský průnik do libanonského vnitrozemí od roku 2000, kdy Izrael stáhnul své jednotky z jižního Libanonu a ukončil tak téměř 18 let trvající okupaci tohoto území.
data.translatedTitle: Israel captured a stronghold in southern Lebanon, the deepest it has been in the country since 2000
data.translatedDescription: The Israeli army announced the capture of the Crusader fortress of Beaufort in southern Lebanon. According to the AP agency, this is the deepest Israeli penetration into the Lebanese interior since 2000, when Israel withdrew its troops from southern Lebanon and thus ended the almost 18-year occupation of this territory.

data.title: Divoké oslavy ve Francii. Po výhře PSG v Lize mistrů policie zadržela stovky lidí
data.description: Francouzská policie zadržela 416 lidí po násilnostech, které vypukly po sobotním vítězství fotbalového klubu Paris St. Germain nad anglickým Arsenalem ve finále Ligy mistrů. V noci na neděli o tom informovala agentura AFP. Násilnosti se objevili i v minulém roce, kdy PSG také Ligu mistrů vyhrálo, tehdy zemřeli dva lidé.
data.translatedTitle: Wild celebrations in France. Police detained hundreds of people after PSG won the Champions League
data.translatedDescription: French police have arrested 416 people following the violence that broke out after Paris St. Germain over England's Arsenal in the Champions League final. This was reported by the AFP agency on Sunday night. Violence also occurred last year, when PSG also won the Champions League, when two people died.

data.title: Známé tváře ve Sněmovně. Komu radí bratr závodníka Lopraise či exmluvčí Fialy
data.description: Ve Sněmovně působí bratr závodníka Lopraise, Hamáčkova žena naopak skončila. Pro řadu politiků i funkcionářů, kteří po loňských volbách a následné výměně vlády přišli o své funkce, se již tradičně našlo místo v kanceláři u stranických kolegů ve Sněmovně. SPD se takto postarala o své poslance, kteří neobhájili mandát, v řadách ODS se zase uplatnil dlouholetý mluvčí premiéra Petra Fialy a jeho vlády Václav Smolka.
data.translatedTitle: Familiar faces in the House of Commons. Who is advised by the brother of the competitor Lopraise or the ex-spokesman of Fiala
data.translatedDescription: The brother of the competitor Lopraise works in the House of Representatives, Hamáček's wife, on the other hand, has retired. For a number of politicians and officials who lost their positions after last year's elections and the subsequent change of government, a place in the office of party colleagues in the House of Representatives has traditionally been found. In this way, the SPD took care of its MPs who did not defend their mandate, while the long-time spokesman of Prime Minister Petr Fiala and his government, Václav Smolko, became active in the ranks of the ODS.

data.title: EU Inc. Brusel plánuje jednotný trh, státy se na něm ale musí domluvit
data.description: Ze sedmadvaceti národních trhů členských zemí Evropské unie by podle plánu měl vzniknout jeden společný. Jeho dokončení by znamenalo vyšší růst, vyšší mzdy i životní úroveň. Kvůli neúplnému jednotnému trhu přichází EU zhruba o 10 procent potenciálního HDP. Plán se má týkat oblastí jako jsou kapitálové trhy a financování, energetika nebo digitální a telekomunikační trh. Největší pozornost však poutá návrh zavedení celoevropské formy společnosti „EU Inc.“
data.translatedTitle: EU Inc. Brussels is planning a single market, but the states must agree on it
data.translatedDescription: According to the plan, one common market should be created from the twenty-seven national markets of the member countries of the European Union. Its completion would mean higher growth, higher wages and living standards. Due to the incomplete single market, the EU loses about 10 percent of its potential GDP. The plan is to cover areas such as capital markets and financing, energy or the digital and telecommunications market. However, the proposal to introduce a pan-European form of company "EU Inc" attracts the most attention.

data.title: Putin si s USA hraje, Trumpa umí vodit. Politolog o cílech Ruska a nutnosti zbrojit
data.description: Německý politolog Carlo Masala v Praze při veřejné debatě o válce na Ukrajině vyprávěl neobvyklou historku s prezidentem Petrem Pavlem. Hlavně sem ale profesor mezinárodních vztahů na Univerzitě bundeswehru v Mnichově přijel představit svou provokativní knihu Když vyhraje Rusko. Nejen o ní promluvil v rozhovoru. „Pravděpodobnost dalšího ruského testu v Evropě roste,“ tvrdí.
data.translatedTitle: Putin plays with the USA, he knows how to lead Trump. Political scientist on Russia's goals and the need to arm
data.translatedDescription: German political scientist Carlo Masala told an unusual story with President Petr Pavlo during a public debate in Prague about the war in Ukraine. But mainly the professor of international relations at the Bundeswehr University in Munich came here to present his provocative book When Russia Wins. He didn't just talk about her in the interview. "The likelihood of another Russian test in Europe is growing," he claims.

data.title: Moře se smísilo s krví. Krutá fotka harpunované velryby otřásla světem
data.description: Soustředil se jen na expozici a clonu. Teprve když fotoaparát odložil, spatřil ten masakr v mořských vlnách. Bezbranné velryby prostřílené harpunami, které se z posledních sil snažily uplavat před sovětskou flotilou. Další díl seriálu Slavné fotografie vám přináší čin, který světu představil organizaci Greenpeace.
data.translatedTitle: The sea mingled with blood. A cruel photo of a harpooned whale shook the world
data.translatedDescription: He concentrated only on exposure and aperture. Only when he put the camera down did he see the carnage in the sea waves. Defenseless whales shot through with harpoons, trying with their last strength to swim in front of the Soviet fleet. The next installment of the Famous Photos series brings you the act that introduced Greenpeace to the world.

data.title: Volby 1996: Jak si Zeman s Klausem plácli a zrodila se Havlova „blbá nálada“
data.description: Z té doby si mnozí z nás pamatují Havlův termín o „blbé náladě“, Klausovo utahování opasků a slavnou „nevýhru“ a Zemanovu „spálenou zemi“. Přesně před 30 lety se konaly první volby do Sněmovny v samostatné České republice. A zcela překreslily politickou mapu. Vznikla menšinová vláda, prohloubil se pragmatický cynismus české politiky, který vyvrcholil podepsáním opoziční smlouvy.
data.translatedTitle: Election 1996: How Zeman and Klaus spat and Havel's "stupid mood" was born
data.translatedDescription: Since then, many of us remember Havel's term for "stupid mood", Klaus' belt-tightening and famous "failure", and Zeman's "scorched earth". Exactly 30 years ago, the first elections to the House of Representatives were held in the independent Czech Republic. And they completely redrew the political map. A minority government emerged, the pragmatic cynicism of Czech politics deepened, culminating in the signing of the opposition pact.

data.title: USA urychlí stažení vojsk z Evropy. Plán představí spojencům v příštích týdnech
data.description: Spojené státy plánují urychlit stažení svých jednotek z evropských základen. Dnes to na webu uvedl německý nedělník Welt am Sonntag s odvoláním na zdroje z amerického ministerstva obrany. Konkrétní plány chce Pentagon v příštích týdnech v sídle NATO v Bruselu představit evropským partnerům, dodal list.
data.translatedTitle: The US will accelerate the withdrawal of troops from Europe. He will present the plan to the Allies in the coming weeks
data.translatedDescription: The United States plans to accelerate the withdrawal of its troops from European bases. Today, the German Sunday newspaper Welt am Sonntag reported this on the website, citing sources from the US Department of Defense. The Pentagon wants to present concrete plans to European partners in the coming weeks at the NATO headquarters in Brussels, the paper added.

data.title: U obce Chýstovice na Pelhřimovsku zemřel cyklista. Srazilo ho osobní auto
data.description: U obce Chýstovice na Pelhřimovsku zemřel v sobotu kolem poledne cyklista, srazilo ho osobní auto. Nehoda se stala na silnici II/112, informovala mluvčí policie Dana Čírtková. Okolnosti nehody policie zjišťuje.
data.translatedTitle: A cyclist died near the village of Chýstovice in the Pelhřimovsk region. He was hit by a car
data.translatedDescription: A cyclist died near the village of Chýstovice in Pelhřimovsk on Saturday around noon, he was hit by a car. The accident happened on road II/112, police spokeswoman Dana Čírtková informed. The police are investigating the circumstances of the accident.

data.title: Komunisty nově vede Roun. Nedokázali nás zničit, řekla při loučení Konečná
data.description: Nového šéfa si zvolili komunisté. Bude jím dosavadní mluvčí strany, volební lídr Stačilo! v loňských podzimních volbách do Sněmovny v Pardubickém kraji Roman Roun. Porazil místopředsedu strany Milana Krajču. Komunisté rozhodovali na uzavřeném jednání sjezdu, který se koná v pražském TOP hotelu.
data.translatedTitle: The Communists are now led by Roun. They couldn't destroy us, said Konečná when saying goodbye
data.translatedDescription: The new boss was elected by the communists. He will be the current spokesperson of the party, the electoral leader of Stačilo! in last autumn's elections to the House of Representatives in the Pardubice region, Roman Roun. He defeated the deputy chairman of the party, Milan Krajča. The Communists made decisions at a closed meeting of the convention, which takes place in Prague's TOP hotel.

data.title: Byl to strašný adrenalin. Je jako skořápka, líčí restaurátoři záchranu lebky z betonu
data.description: Jsou zvyklí pracovat pomalu a s rozvahou. Když jim ale zavolala policie, že mají co nejrychleji dostat lebku svaté Zdislavy z betonového krunýře, do kterého ji zalil zloděj relikvie, ihned se dali do díla. Díky restaurátorské práci Blanky Valchářové a Michaela Velíška se nakonec lebka vrátila do baziliky už po osmnácti dnech, v sobotu 30. května.
data.translatedTitle: It was a terrible adrenaline rush. It is like a shell, restorers describe the rescue of the skull from concrete
data.translatedDescription: They are used to working slowly and carefully. But when the police called them to get the skull of Saint Zdislava out of the concrete shell in which the relic thief had encased it as quickly as possible, they immediately set to work. Thanks to the restoration work of Blanka Valchářová and Michael Velíšek, the skull finally returned to the basilica after only eighteen days, on Saturday, May 30.

data.title: Kulturní dědictví zachráníme před zkázou Země odvozem na Měsíc, plánují aerolinky
data.description: Japonská letecká společnost Japan Airlines (JAL) chce od roku 2028 nabízet přepravu nákladu na Měsíc. V novém projektu plánuje stěhovat předměty kulturní hodnoty, kterým na Zemi hrozí zánik v důsledku klimatických změn, ozbrojených konfliktů či přírodních katastrof. Pokud se záměr uskuteční, JAL se stane první leteckou společností na světě, jež bude zajišťovat dopravu nákladu na Měsíc.
data.translatedTitle: Airlines plan to save cultural heritage from Earth's destruction by taking it to the moon
data.translatedDescription: The Japanese airline company Japan Airlines (JAL) wants to offer cargo transportation to the moon from 2028. In the new project, he plans to move objects of cultural value that are threatened with extinction on Earth as a result of climate change, armed conflicts or natural disasters. If the plan comes to fruition, JAL will become the first airline in the world to transport cargo to the moon.

data.title: Policisté vyšetřují smrt ženy v bytovém domě v Havířově. Zaútočil na ni soused
data.description: Policisté vyšetřují smrt ženy v bytovém domě v Havířově na Karvinsku. Na síti X uvedli, že na ni zaútočil soused. Muže policisté zadrželi. Kriminalisté na místě shromažďují informace, probíhat budou i výslechy svědků.
data.translatedTitle: The police are investigating the death of a woman in an apartment building in Havířov. A neighbor attacked her
data.translatedDescription: Police officers are investigating the death of a woman in an apartment building in Havířov in Karvinsk. They said on the X network that she was attacked by a neighbor. The police arrested the man. Criminal investigators are collecting information on the spot, and witness interviews will also take place.

data.title: Robot rozhoduje a pomáhá chirurgům na sále, říká primář ortopedie Hoferek
data.description: Robot, který pomáhá operovat koleno s milimetrovou přesností, to už není sci-fi. Primář ortopedicko-traumatologického oddělení Nemocnice AGEL Prostějov Leopold Hoferek vysvětluje, co si představit pod robotickou operací. Proč se až pětina pacientů po klasické operaci necítí úplně spokojená, kdo jsou takzvaní „víkendoví bojovníci“ a proč často končí na sále.
data.translatedTitle: The robot makes decisions and helps the surgeons in the room, says the head of orthopedics Hoferek
data.translatedDescription: A robot that helps operate a knee with millimeter precision is no longer science fiction. Leopold Hoferek, head of the orthopedic and trauma department of the AGEL Prostějov Hospital, explains what to imagine under robotic surgery. Why up to a fifth of patients do not feel completely satisfied after classic surgery, who are the so-called "weekend warriors" and why they often end up in the theater.

data.title: Římanům se při nácviku vojenské přehlídky splašili koně. Zranili dvě ženy
data.description: V Římě se v pátek večer během nácviku vojenské přehlídky ke státnímu svátku připadajícímu na úterý splašili koně a v provozu cválali po ulici. Po této neobvyklé podívané vznikly materiální škody a dvě ženy se lehce zranily. Incident je předmětem vyšetřování.
