data.translatedTitle: The Romans were frightened by their horses while rehearsing for a military parade. They injured two women
data.translatedDescription: In Rome on Friday night, horses spooked and galloped down the street in traffic during a rehearsal for a military parade for Tuesday's public holiday. After this unusual spectacle, material damage occurred and two women were slightly injured. The incident is under investigation.

data.title: Regulace kratomu podle Babiše nefunguje. S okamžitým zákazem ale nepočítá
data.description: Regulace kratomu podle premiéra Andreje Babiše ANO) nefunguje, okamžitý zákaz ale podle něho nebude. Posílí se kontroly, řekl ministerský předseda novinářům při sobotní akci úřadu vlády Strakovka žije zemědělstvím. Zástupci policie či dětských lékařů zákaz při středečním kulatém stolu podpořili, zatímco odborníci na závislosti či ekonomiku varovali před růstem černého trhu.
data.translatedTitle: According to Babiš, the regulation of kratom does not work. But he does not count on an immediate ban
data.translatedDescription: According to Prime Minister Andrej Babiš, the regulation of kratom does not work, but according to him, there will be no immediate ban. Controls will be strengthened, the prime minister told journalists at the Saturday event of the government office. Strakovka lives by agriculture. Representatives of the police and pediatricians supported the ban at Wednesday's round table, while addiction and economic experts warned against the growth of the black market.

data.title: „První hodiny budou nebezpečné.“ Pobaltí se chystá na Rusy, chce ukrajinské kryty
data.description: Pobaltské země se kvůli rostoucí hrozbě ruských dronů obracejí na Ukrajinu, aby se s nimi podělila o zkušenosti s ochranou civilistů. Zájem o ukrajinské kryty zesílil po sérii incidentů v regionu. Minulý týden narušil litevský vzdušný prostor dron, který poslal nejvyšší představitele země do bunkrů.
data.translatedTitle: "The first hours will be dangerous." The Baltics are getting ready for the Russians, they want Ukrainian shelters
data.translatedDescription: Due to the growing threat of Russian drones, the Baltic countries are turning to Ukraine to share their experience in protecting civilians. Interest in Ukrainian shelters has intensified after a series of incidents in the region. Last week, a drone breached Lithuanian airspace, sending the country's top officials into bunkers.

data.title: Rodinný byznys z Česka dnes zásobuje dálnice i letiště po Evropě
data.description: Z malé rodinné firmy, která na začátku 90. let vyráběla zámkovou dlažbu, se během tří dekád stal významný dodavatel betonových prvků pro dálnice, tunely i letiště napříč Evropou. Za úspěchem společnosti CS-BETON stojí podnikatelský instinkt i soudržnost rodiny Matějkových.
data.translatedTitle: Today, the family business from the Czech Republic supplies highways and airports across Europe
data.translatedDescription: From a small family company that produced interlocking paving in the early 1990s, within three decades it became a major supplier of concrete elements for highways, tunnels and airports across Europe. Behind the success of the CS-BETON company lies the entrepreneurial instinct and the cohesion of the Matějk family.

data.title: Klempířův nový mediální zákon vláda ani neprojedná. Poplatky se zruší jednodušeji
data.description: K převodu financování České televize (ČT) a Českého rozhlasu (ČRo) z koncesionářských poplatků na státní rozpočet bude stačit úprava rozpočtového zákona, naznačil v sobotu novinářům premiér Andrej Babiš (ANO). Později to potvrdil také ministr kultury Oto Klempíř (Motoristé sobě). O návrhu má jednat 9. června s řediteli ČT a ČRo.
data.translatedTitle: The government will not even discuss Klempíř's new media law. Charges will be canceled more easily
data.translatedDescription: To transfer the financing of Czech Television (ČT) and Czech Radio (ČRo) from concessionaire fees to the state budget, an amendment to the Budget Act will be sufficient, Prime Minister Andrej Babiš (ANO) indicated to journalists on Saturday. Later, this was also confirmed by the Minister of Culture Oto Klempíř (Motoristé seba). He is to discuss the proposal with the directors of CT and CRo on June 9.

data.title: Babiš změny ve vládě zatím nechystá, počká si na roční zhodnocení ministrů
data.description: Premiér Babiš nyní nechystá změny ve vládě. Uskutečnit by se podle něho mohly až po ročním zhodnocení práce členů kabinetu ANO, SPD a Motoristů. Babiš se na sobotní akci úřadu vlády Strakovka žije zemědělstvím také vyjádřil před novináři ke vztahům s prezidentem Petrem Pavlem, nechtěl ale odpovědět na dotaz, zda je ještě možná účast hlavy státu na červencovém summitu NATO v Ankaře.
data.translatedTitle: Babiš is not planning any changes in the government yet, he will wait for the annual evaluation of the ministers
data.translatedDescription: Prime Minister Babiš is not planning any changes in the government. According to him, they could only take place after an annual evaluation of the work of the members of the ANO, SPD and Motorists cabinet. Babiš also spoke to journalists at the government office's event Strakovka lives by agriculture on Saturday about relations with President Petr Pavlo, but did not want to answer the question whether the participation of the head of state in the NATO summit in Ankara in July is still possible.

data.title: Na Aviatické pouti se při seskoku z letounu CASA zranil parašutista
data.description: Při zahájení programu pouti v Hradci Králové se v sobotu zranil parašutista z výsadkové jednotky z Chrudimi. K nehodě došlo během seskoku z vojenského letounu CASA.
data.translatedTitle: A parachutist was injured while jumping from a CASA airplane at the Aviation Pilgrimage
data.translatedDescription: At the start of the pilgrimage program in Hradec Králové on Saturday, a paratrooper from the airborne unit from Chrudim was injured. The accident occurred during a jump from a CASA military aircraft.

data.title: Otrok přešel Severní Ameriku jako první. Jeho příběh pak zmizel z dějin
data.description: Před téměř 500 lety přešel zotročený Maročan napříč Severní Amerikou a zapsal se do dějin jako jeden z jejích prvních velkých objevitelů. Estevanico přežil ztroskotání, urazil tisíce kilometrů neznámou krajinou a pomohl otevřít cesty, které později využili španělští dobyvatelé. Přesto jeho jméno dnes zná jen málokdo.
data.translatedTitle: A slave was the first to cross North America. His story then disappeared from history
data.translatedDescription: Almost 500 years ago, an enslaved Moroccan crossed North America and went down in history as one of its first great discoverers. Estevanico survived the shipwreck, traveled thousands of kilometers through an unknown landscape, and helped open the routes that were later used by the Spanish conquistadors. Nevertheless, only a few people know his name today.

data.title: Další záchrana ze zatopené jeskyně v Laosu. Záchranářům pomohl pokles vody
data.description: Záchranářům v Laosu se v sobotu podařilo evakuovat další čtyři vesničany, kteří před deseti dny uvázli v zatopené jeskyni. Povedlo se to díky klesající hladině vody odčerpávané pumpami. Prvního ze sedmičlenné skupiny dostali potápěči ven již v pátek. Dva lidé se nadále pohřešují.
data.translatedTitle: Another rescue from a flooded cave in Laos. The rescuers were helped by the receding water
data.translatedDescription: On Saturday, rescuers in Laos managed to evacuate four more villagers who were stuck in a flooded cave ten days ago. This was achieved thanks to the falling water level pumped out by the pumps. The divers got the first of the seven-member group out already on Friday. Two people remain missing.

data.title: Neplnění závazků vůči NATO může oslabit důvěryhodnost země, shodují se experti
data.description: Plnění závazků Severoatlantické aliance (NATO) v oblasti obranných výdajů je především otázkou důvěryhodnosti a solidarity mezi spojenci. Podle odborníků není možné někoho vyloučit za nesplnění aliančních cílů, nicméně neplnění závazků může oslabit postavení země uvnitř aliance a ochotu ostatních států zohledňovat její zájmy.
data.translatedTitle: Failure to meet NATO commitments can weaken the country's credibility, experts agree
data.translatedDescription: Fulfilling the obligations of the North Atlantic Alliance (NATO) in the area of ​​defense spending is primarily a matter of credibility and solidarity between allies. According to experts, it is not possible to exclude someone for failure to meet alliance goals, however, failure to fulfill obligations can weaken a country's position within the alliance and the willingness of other states to take its interests into account.

data.title: A mentők segítségére 91 alkalommal volt szükség, 25 embert kórházba kellett szállítani
data.description: A mentőszolgálat az összes dedikált rendezvényhelyszínen jelen volt.
data.translatedTitle: The help of the ambulances was needed 91 times, 25 people had to be taken to the hospital
data.translatedDescription: The ambulance service was present at all dedicated event locations.

data.title: Bűncselekmény a haza védelme?
data.description: Nagy jelentőségű ítéletet hozott a lublini katonai bíróság.

data.translatedDescription: The military court in Lublin made a judgment of great importance.

data.title: Az Arsenal angol sztárja, aki provokálta a magyarokat, most elájult Budapesttől
data.description: Declan Rice a BL-döntő után elismerően beszélt a Puskás Arénáról, ahol korábban főszereplő volt egy balhéban.
data.translatedTitle: The English star of Arsenal, who provoked the Hungarians, has now passed out from Budapest
data.translatedDescription: Declan Rice spoke highly of Puskás Aréna after the BL final, where he had previously been a protagonist in a mess.

data.title: Sulyok Tamás: Vérüket ontották, életüket áldozták Magyarországért
data.description: Hőseinkre emlékezett a köztársasági elnök.

data.translatedDescription: The President of the Republic remembered our heroes.

data.title: Így próbálkoznak a luxusautó-márkák az elektromos átállással - az egyiknek sikerül, a másiknak nem
data.description: A Bentley és a Rolls-Royce visszalép, a Ferrari más irányba indul.
data.translatedTitle: This is how luxury car brands are trying the electric transition - one succeeds, the other does not
data.translatedDescription: Bentley and Rolls-Royce are stepping back, Ferrari is going in a different direction.

data.title: Nyáron Siófok a legnépszerűbb hazai úti cél
data.description: Tavasszal inkább a nagyvárosokat veszik célba az utazók.
data.translatedTitle: In summer, Siófok is the most popular domestic destination
data.translatedDescription: In the spring, travelers prefer the big cities.

data.title: Meghalt Jamie Lee Curtis nővére, a hollywoodi sztár magyarul búcsúzott el tőle
data.description: Kelly mindig egy magyar áldással búcsúzott: „Isten veled” – írta bejegyzésében a színésznő.
data.translatedTitle: Jamie Lee Curtis' sister died, the Hollywood star said goodbye to her in Hungarian
data.translatedDescription: Kelly always said goodbye with a Hungarian blessing: "God be with you," the actress wrote in her post.

data.title: Steven Gerrard Budapesten kikotyogta, hogy ki lesz a Liverpool új edzője
data.description: A BL-döntőn, a magyar fővárosban ünnepelte a születésnapját a Liverpool legendás futballistája.
data.translatedTitle: Steven Gerrard announced in Budapest who will be Liverpool's new coach
data.translatedDescription: The legendary Liverpool football player celebrated his birthday at the BL final in the Hungarian capital.

data.title: Mutatjuk, miből gazdálkodik a 444 kiadója, több százmilliót kapott külföldről
data.description: A Magyar Jeti Zrt.-t támogató szervezetek többsége a radikális baloldali Soros-hálózathoz tartozik.

data.translatedDescription: Most of the organizations supporting Magyar Jeti Zrt. belong to the radical left-wing Soros network.

data.description: A balesetet szenvedett sportoló gyermekek többsége már hazatérhetett.

data.translatedDescription: Most of the child athletes who suffered an accident were able to return home.

data.description: A gyanúsított több mint tízezer dollárért árult leszerelési papírokat, most akár nyolc év börtön is várhat rá.

data.title: Budapesten törtek-zúztak a BL-döntő után, Párizs lángokban, reagált a PSG + videó
data.description: A magyar főváros nem úszta meg balhé nélkül a Bajnokok Ligája döntőjének éjszakáját.

data.translatedDescription: The Hungarian capital did not survive the night of the Champions League final without mishaps.

data.title: Többnyire napos idő vár ránk a gyermeknapon
data.description: Délelőtt zavartalan napsütés várható, délután már itt-ott eleredhet az eső.
data.translatedTitle: Mostly sunny weather awaits us on Children's Day
data.translatedDescription: In the morning, undisturbed sunshine is expected, and in the afternoon it may rain here and there.

data.title: A boksz virtuóza visszatért és bohócot csinált az ellenfeléből
data.description: Egy hátműtét és 15 hónapos kihagyás után parádézott a ringben a félnehézsúly királya.
data.translatedTitle: The boxing virtuoso returned and made a clown out of his opponent
data.translatedDescription: After a back surgery and a 15-month layoff, the light heavyweight king paraded in the ring.

data.title: Beteg magyar kisfiún ámul az UEFA és a világ a budapesti BL-döntő után + videó
data.description: A kilencéves Zsombival az összes döntős játékos kezet fogott, az UEFA elnöke kézen fogva kísérte.
data.translatedTitle: UEFA and the world marvel at a sick Hungarian boy after the Budapest BL final + video
data.translatedDescription: All the finalists shook hands with the nine-year-old Zsombi, and the UEFA president accompanied him by the hand.

data.title: Tom Holland szögre akasztaná a Pókruhát, már meg is nevezte az utódját?
data.description: A színész már a staféta átadásán gondolkodik.
data.translatedTitle: Would Tom Holland hang up the Spider Suit, has he already named his successor?
data.translatedDescription: The actor is already thinking about handing over the baton.

data.title: Nagyon rossz sorrendben járták meg a mennyországot és a poklot
data.description: A spanyol játékosok a bolgároknak lőtt hatodik gólt sírva ünnepelték Franciaországban.
data.translatedTitle: They visited heaven and hell in the wrong order
data.translatedDescription: The Spanish players celebrated the sixth goal against the Bulgarians in tears in France.

data.title: Az orosz műtrágya behozatali tilalmának feloldását pedzegetik az uniós gazdák
data.description: A gazdák elvárják, hogy az unió végrehajtó-döntéshozó szerve ne csak elemezzen, de cselekedjen is az ügyben.
data.translatedTitle: EU farmers are calling for the lifting of the ban on the import of Russian fertilizer
data.translatedDescription: The farmers expect the executive-decision-making body of the union not only to analyze, but also to act on the matter.

data.title: A BL-döntő legjobbja még belerúgott egyet az Arsenalba
data.description: A portugál Vitinha a hosszabbításban nagyon dühös volt.
data.translatedTitle: The best of the BL final even kicked Arsenal
data.translatedDescription: The Portuguese Vitinha was very angry in extra time.

data.title: Paris Saint-Germain mindenhol! Mindent tud a BL-győztesről?
data.description: A PSG együttese nyerte a Bajnokok Ligája szombati döntőjét, mai kvízünkben a párizsi együttes lesz a főszereplő. Tesztelje, mennyire ismeri a friss BL-győztes múltját!
data.translatedTitle: Paris Saint-Germain everywhere! Do you know everything about the BL winner?
data.translatedDescription: The PSG team won Saturday's final of the Champions League, in today's quiz the Parisian team will be the protagonist. Test how well you know the past of the recent BL winner!

data.title: Ma emlékezünk azokra, akik életüket áldozták Magyarországért
data.description: Május utolsó vasárnapján van a magyar hősök emléknapja.
data.translatedTitle: Today we remember those who sacrificed their lives for Hungary
data.translatedDescription: The last Sunday of May is the Memorial Day of Hungarian Heroes.

data.title: Mióta leszokott a dohányzásról, jobban érzi az ízeket
data.description: Stephen King szerint „egy dohányos sosem szokik le, csak szünetet tart”.
data.translatedTitle: Since he quit smoking, he has a better sense of taste
data.translatedDescription: According to Stephen King, "a smoker never quits, he just takes a break."

data.title: Bűnös csapat lett a BL-győztes PSG Budapesten, Luis Enrique ezt imádja
data.description: A spanyol edző megkapta azt a kérdést a címvédés után, amit lehet, hogy nem akart volna hallani.
data.translatedTitle: The BL winner PSG became a guilty team in Budapest, Luis Enrique loves it
data.translatedDescription: The Spanish coach received the question after the title defense that he might not have wanted to hear.

data.title: Montenegro afirma que Governo está focado em corresponder às expectativas das pessoas
data.description: O presidente do PSD afirmou que o Governo está focado em não defraudar as expectativas das pessoas, prometeu trabalho e defendeu que Portugal é uma referência no mundo ao nível da estabilidade económica e social.
data.translatedTitle: Montenegro states that the Government is focused on meeting people's expectations
data.translatedDescription: The PSD president stated that the Government is focused on not defrauding people's expectations, promised work and defended that Portugal is a reference in the world in terms of economic and social stability.

data.translatedTitle: 6am Today marks World No Tobacco Day

data.title: 7h EUA atacam navio no Pacífico
data.translatedTitle: 7am US attacks ship in Pacific

data.translatedTitle: 5am ​​25 de Abril Bridge will be closed to traffic

data.title: 4h Governador do Banco de Portugal favorável a um aumento da taxa de juro
data.translatedTitle: 4h Governor of the Bank of Portugal in favor of increasing interest rates

data.title: 3h França. 416 pessoas detidas nos festejos do PSG
data.translatedTitle: 3h France. 416 people arrested at PSG celebrations

data.title: 2h Luís Montenegro reeleito líder do PSD

data.title: 1h Governo está focado em não defraudar as expectativas

data.title: Pelo menos 79 detidos em Paris nas comemorações da vitória do PSG
data.description: Pelo menos 79 pessoas foram hoje detidas e um polícia ficou ferido em Paris durante as comemorações do segundo título da Liga dos Campeões do Paris Saint-Germain (PSG), informaram as autoridades locais num balanço provisório.
data.translatedTitle: At least 79 detained in Paris during PSG victory celebrations
data.translatedDescription: At least 79 people were arrested today and a police officer was injured in Paris during Paris Saint-Germain's (PSG) second Champions League title celebrations, local authorities said in a provisional statement.

data.title: Luís Montenegro reeleito presidente do PSD com 94,8% dos votos
data.description: Estão já contados todos os votos das diretas no PSD. Sem oposição, Luís Montenegro foi reeleito para um novo mandato de mais dois anos.
data.translatedTitle: Luís Montenegro re-elected president of the PSD with 94.8% of the votes
data.translatedDescription: All direct votes for the PSD have already been counted. Without opposition, Luís Montenegro was re-elected for a new term of two more years.

data.title: 22h Desacatos em Paris após vitória do PSG
data.translatedTitle: 10pm Contempts in Paris after PSG victory

data.title: Dez dos 14 arguidos da operação "Águas Turvas" foram libertados
data.description: O Tribunal de Instrução Criminal do Porto ordenou este sábado a libertação de 10 dos 14 detidos na operação "Água Turvas", que investiga um alegado esquema de corrupção na empresa municipal Águas de Gaia (ADGaia), disse à Lusa fonte judicial.
data.translatedTitle: Ten of the 14 defendants in the "Aguas Turvas" operation were released
data.translatedDescription: The Porto Criminal Instruction Court this Saturday ordered the release of 10 of the 14 detained in the "Água Turvas" operation, which investigates an alleged corruption scheme in the municipal company Águas de Gaia (ADGaia), a judicial source told Lusa.

data.title: 21h Santos Pereira favorável a aumento da taxa de juro
data.translatedTitle: 9pm Santos Pereira is in favor of increasing interest rates

data.title: 20h PSG vence Liga dos Campeões
data.translatedTitle: 8pm PSG wins Champions League

data.title: Banco de Portugal favorável à subida da taxa de juro já em junho. "É importante, quando existem possíveis espirais inflacionistas, que atuemos rapidamente"
data.description: Alinhado com a tendência europeia, o Governador do Banco de Portugal (BdP) é favorável a um aumento da taxa de juro já em junho, durante a próxima reunião de política monetária do Banco Central Europeu (BCE).
data.translatedTitle: Banco de Portugal is in favor of raising interest rates in June. "It is important, when there are possible inflationary spirals, that we act quickly"
data.translatedDescription: In line with the European trend, the Governor of the Bank of Portugal (BdP) is in favor of an interest rate increase in June, during the next monetary policy meeting of the European Central Bank (ECB).

data.title: Sporting à beira da final do nacional de hóquei em patins
data.description: O Sporting venceu o FC Porto por 2-0, no segundo jogo das meias-finais do campeonato português de hóquei em patins, graças a dois golos marcados em menos de um minuto, em Lisboa.
data.translatedTitle: Sporting on the verge of the national roller hockey final
data.translatedDescription: Sporting beat FC Porto 2-0, in the second game of the semi-finals of the Portuguese roller hockey championship, thanks to two goals scored in less than a minute, in Lisbon.

data.title: RTP recebeu dois prémios de rádio e televisão
data.description: O jornalismo da RTP recebeu mais duas distinções, agora da Associação Corações Com Coroa.
data.translatedTitle: RTP received two radio and television awards
data.translatedDescription: RTP's journalism received two more distinctions, this time from Associação Corações Com Coroa.

data.title: Segredo do Algoritmo. Publicações falsas sobre alegados cursos gratuitos em Universidades portuguesas
data.description: Nos dias de hoje é preciso ter cada vez mais cuidado com as ofertas que circulam pelas redes sociais, algumas com promessas de milhares de euros.
data.translatedTitle: Algorithm Secret. False publications about supposed free courses at Portuguese Universities
data.translatedDescription: Nowadays it is necessary to be increasingly careful with offers that circulate on social networks, some with promises worth thousands of reais.

data.title: Limpeza de caminhos florestais. Corrida contra o tempo antes do verão
data.description: É uma corrida contra o tempo. A limpeza da floresta portuguesa depois das tempestades pode ajudar a evitar incêndios nos meses de calor.
data.translatedTitle: Cleaning forest paths. Race against time before summer
data.translatedDescription: It's a race against time. Cleaning the Portuguese forest after storms can help prevent fires in the hot months.

data.title: Relatório aponta Portugal como um país vulnerável à seca e às ondas de calor
data.description: O calor extremo vai continuar na Europa até 2030. O relatório da Organização Metereológica Mundial prevê temperaturas recorde até ao fim da década.
data.translatedTitle: Report points out Portugal as a country vulnerable to drought and heat waves
data.translatedDescription: Extreme heat will continue in Europe until 2030. The World Meteorological Organization report predicts record temperatures until the end of the decade.

data.title: Surto de ébola no Congo. Diretor-geral da OMS apela a mais fundos internacionais
data.description: O Brasil está a investigar um caso suspeito de ébola em São Paulo. Este sábado foi posto em isolamento, num hospital especializado, um homem com sintomas de febre que esteve recentemente na República Democrática do Congo.
data.translatedTitle: Ebola outbreak in Congo. WHO Director-General calls for more international funds
data.translatedDescription: Brazil is investigating a suspected case of Ebola in São Paulo. This Saturday, a man with symptoms of fever who had recently been to the Democratic Republic of Congo was placed in isolation in a specialized hospital.

data.title: EUA preparados para voltar à guerra com o Irão
data.description: Os EUA continuam à procura de um "grande acordo" com o Irão, mas estão preparados para retomar a guerra. A frase foi dita pelo secretário da Defesa norte americano, Pete Hegseth.
data.translatedTitle: US prepared to return to war with Iran
data.translatedDescription: The US continues to look for a "grand deal" with Iran, but is prepared to resume war. The phrase was said by the North American Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth.

data.title: Prestação Social Única. Padre Lino Maia diz que "o trabalho não pode ser uma pena"
data.description: O presidente da Confederação Nacional de Instituições de Solidariedade diz que o trabalho "não pode ser uma pena" para quem recebe apoios do Estado.
data.translatedTitle: Single Social Benefit. Father Lino Maia says that "work cannot be a shame"
data.translatedDescription: The president of the National Confederation of Solidarity Institutions says that work "cannot be a shame" for those who receive support from the State.

data.title: Carneiro exige "comportamentos irrepreensíveis" a quem está na vida pública
data.description: Dois dos arguidos da Operação Imergente são atuais vereadores socialistas na câmara de Lisboa.
data.translatedTitle: Carneiro demands “irreproachable behavior” from those in public life
data.translatedDescription: Two of those accused of Operação Imergente are current socialist councilors in the Lisbon city council.

data.title: Ministra da Saúde admite falta de recursos humanos no INEM
data.description: Há dezenas de viaturas de emergência médica que param por falta de operacionais.
data.translatedTitle: Minister of Health admits lack of human resources at INEM
data.translatedDescription: There are dozens of medical emergency vehicles that stop due to a lack of operational personnel.

data.title: Paris Saint-Germain é bicampeão da Europa
data.description: O Paris Saint-Germain conquistou a Liga dos Campeões pela segunda vez consecutiva ao vencer na final o Arsenal, por 4-3 nos penáltis, após o empate 1-1 no tempo regulamentar e no prolongamento, em Budapeste.
data.translatedTitle: Paris Saint-Germain is two-time European champion
data.translatedDescription: Paris Saint-Germain won the Champions League for the second time in a row by beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in the final, after a 1-1 draw in regular time and extra time, in Budapest.

data.title: 19h - TAP, Azores Airlines e SATA cancelaram hoje dezenas de voos nos Açores por causa do nevoeiro
data.translatedTitle: 7pm - TAP, Azores Airlines and SATA canceled dozens of flights in the Azores today due to fog

data.title: Coco Gauff eliminada em Roland Garros
data.description: A tenista norte-americana Coco Gauff, campeã em título, foi eliminada na terceira ronda de Roland Garros, ao perder com a austríaca Anastasia Potapova no segundo Grand Slam da temporada.
data.translatedTitle: Coco Gauff eliminated at Roland Garros
data.translatedDescription: American tennis player Coco Gauff, defending champion, was eliminated in the third round of Roland Garros, after losing to Austrian Anastasia Potapova in the second Grand Slam of the season.

data.title: Benfica sem escolhidos para o melhor onze da I Liga
data.description: O FC Porto conta com cinco futebolistas no melhor ‘onze’ da época da I Liga, numa escolha que reservou quatro lugares para o Sporting, sem que o Benfica tenha qualquer jogador entre os escolhidos.
data.translatedTitle: Benfica without chosen for the best eleven of the I League
data.translatedDescription: FC Porto has five football players in the best eleven of the I Liga season, in a choice that reserved four places for Sporting, without Benfica having any player among those chosen.

data.title: 18h - Final Liga dos Campeões Futebol. Arsenal enfrenta Paris Saint Germain
data.translatedTitle: 6pm – Champions League Football Final. Arsenal face Paris Saint Germain

data.title: Primeiro-ministro libanês denuncia "escalada perigosa" com Israel
data.description: No Líbano, o primeiro-ministro, Nawaf Salam, denunciou este sábado uma "escalada perigosa" das incursões israelitas no país.
data.translatedTitle: Lebanese Prime Minister denounces "dangerous escalation" with Israel
data.translatedDescription: In Lebanon, Prime Minister Nawaf Salam this Saturday denounced a "dangerous escalation" of Israeli incursions into the country.

data.title: 17h - Explosão de uma botija de gás numa moradia no Montijo faz ferido grave
data.translatedTitle: 5pm – Gas cylinder explosion at home in Montijo leaves serious injuries

data.title: 16h - Montenegro garante que o PSD está coeso, ao responder a questões suscitadas por Passos Coelho
data.translatedTitle: 4pm – Montenegro guarantees that PSD is cohesive, by answering questions raised by Passos Coelho

data.title: Suíço Simon Ehammer com melhor marca do ano no salto em comprimento
data.description: O suíço Simon Ehammer, campeão e recordista mundial do heptatlo em pista coberta, estabeleceu a melhor marca do ano no salto em comprimento, com 8,51 metros.
data.translatedTitle: Swiss Simon Ehammer with best mark of the year in the long jump
data.translatedDescription: Swiss Simon Ehammer, champion and world record holder in the indoor heptathlon, set the best mark of the year in the long jump, with 8.51 meters.

data.title: Vasco Vilaça vence etapa do Mundial de triatlo
data.description: O português Vasco Vilaça conquistou na Sardenha a segunda vitória em etapas do Mundial de triatlo, depois do triunfo inaugural no Uzbequistão, enquanto Ricardo Batista terminou em terceiro, em Alghero.
data.translatedTitle: Vasco Vilaça wins stage of the triathlon World Cup
data.translatedDescription: Portuguese Vasco Vilaça won his second stage victory in the Triathlon World Cup in Sardinia, after his inaugural triumph in Uzbekistan, while Ricardo Batista finished third, in Alghero.

data.title: Elfyn Evans reforça liderança do Rali do Japão
data.description: O britânico Elfyn Evans (Toyota Yaris) cimentou a liderança do Rali do Japão, sétima prova do Campeonato do Mundo, aproveitando a desistência do companheiro de equipa, o sueco Oliver Solberg (Toyota Yaris), devido a despiste.
data.translatedTitle: Elfyn Evans reinforces Rally Japan lead
data.translatedDescription: The British Elfyn Evans (Toyota Yaris) cemented his lead in the Japan Rally, the seventh event of the World Championship, taking advantage of the withdrawal of his teammate, the Swede Oliver Solberg (Toyota Yaris), due to a crash.

data.title: Raúl Fernández vence corrida sprint do Grande Prémio de Itália de MotoGP
data.description: O espanhol Raúl Fernández (Aprilia) chegou em primeiro lugar ao final da corrida sprint do Grande Prémio de Itália de MotoGP, sétima das 22 etapas do Mundial de motociclismo de velocidade, ao dominar da primeira à última volta em Mugello.
data.translatedTitle: Raúl Fernández wins sprint race at the Italian MotoGP Grand Prix
data.translatedDescription: Spaniard Raúl Fernández (Aprilia) came first at the end of the sprint race of the MotoGP Italian Grand Prix, the seventh of the 22 stages of the Motorcycle World Championship, by dominating from the first to the last lap in Mugello.

data.title: Vingegaard imparável rumo à vitória na Volta a Itália
data.description: O ciclista dinamarquês Jonas Vingegaard (Visma-Lease a bike) venceu hoje pela quinta vez na Volta a Itália, garantindo, virtualmente, o triunfo final, com o português Afonso Eulálio (Barhain-Victorius) a segurar a liderança da juventude.
data.translatedTitle: Vingegaard unstoppable towards victory in the Tour of Italy
data.translatedDescription: Danish cyclist Jonas Vingegaard (Visma-Lease a bike) won today for the fifth time in the Tour of Italy, virtually guaranteeing the final triumph, with Portuguese Afonso Eulálio (Barhain-Victorius) holding the youth lead.

data.title: Sabalenka avança em Roland Garros
data.description: A tenista bielorrussa Aryna Sabalenka qualificou-se para os oitavos de final de Roland Garros, ao vencer a australiana Daria Kasatkina e ainda sem perder qualquer set nesta edição do segundo Grand Slam da temporada.
data.translatedTitle: Sabalenka advances at Roland Garros
data.translatedDescription: Belarusian tennis player Aryna Sabalenka qualified for the round of 16 at Roland Garros, after beating Australian Daria Kasatkina and still without losing a set in this edition of the second Grand Slam of the season.

data.title: Arsenal e PSG em final de Campeões
data.description: O Paris Saint-Germain, de Nuno Mendes, João Neves, Vitinha e Gonçalo Ramos, procura voltar a erguer a Liga dos Campeões, numa final em que o Arsenal busca o seu primeiro título europeu.
data.translatedTitle: Arsenal and PSG in Champions League final
data.translatedDescription: Paris Saint-Germain, led by Nuno Mendes, João Neves, Vitinha and Gonçalo Ramos, seeks to lift the Champions League again, in a final in which Arsenal seeks their first European title.

data.title: Em resposta a Passos Coelho. Montenegro diz que PSD é "imperturbável face a ruídos menores"
data.description: O líder dos social-democratas já votou nas eleições diretas do partido. Luís Montenegro é o único candidato à presidência e segue, assim, para um terceiro mandato.
data.translatedTitle: In response to Passos Coelho. Montenegro says PSD is "imperturbable in the face of minor noises"
data.translatedDescription: The leader of the tucanos has already voted in the party's direct elections. Luís Montenegro is the only candidate for president and thus continues for a third term.

data.title: Liverpool despede Arne Slot
data.description: O treinador Arne Slot foi despedido do comando técnico do Liverpool, informaram  os ‘reds’, um ano depois de o neerlandês ter levado o clube ao título inglês.
data.translatedTitle: Liverpool sack Arne Slot
data.translatedDescription: Coach Arne Slot was fired from Liverpool's technical command, the Reds reported, a year after the Dutchman led the club to the English title.

data.title: 15h - Luís Montenegro garante que o PSD está imperturbável face a "ruídos"
data.translatedTitle: 3pm – Luís Montenegro guarantees that PSD is unperturbed in the face of “noise”

data.title: "Hormonal" de Bárbara Tinoco. Novo álbum é como um diário dedicado à filha
data.description: "Hormonal" é o título do novo disco de Bárbara Tinoco. Um diário aberto dedicado à filha Masha.
data.translatedTitle: "Hormonal" by Bárbara Tinoco. New album is like a diary dedicated to his daughter
data.translatedDescription: "Hormonal" is the title of Bárbara Tinoco's new album. An open diary dedicated to daughter Masha.

data.title: Serralves em Festa. Fim-de-semana de arte contemporânea
data.description: Fim-de-semana de Serralves em Festa no Porto. São 50 horas de música, teatro, circo, cinema e exposições.
data.translatedTitle: Serralves in Festa. Contemporary art weekend
data.translatedDescription: Serralves weekend party in Porto. There are 50 hours of music, theater, circus, cinema and exhibitions.

data.title: Mural CR7 na Quinta Falcão. Garouta do Calhau faz mural de homenagem a Ronaldo
data.description: No bairro onde Cristiano Ronaldo treinava em miúdo há agora um mural com o jogador. Homenagem do centro comunitário da Quinta Falcão. Pintura assinada por Zeca Diogo.
data.translatedTitle: CR7 mural at Quinta Falcão. Garouta do Calhau creates mural in tribute to Ronaldo
data.translatedDescription: In the neighborhood where Cristiano Ronaldo trained as a boy, there is now a mural with the player. Tribute from the Quinta Falcão community center. Painting signed by Zeca Diogo.

data.title: José Mourinho: Rescisão com o Benfica passa a custar 15 milhões de euros
data.description: Marco Silva e o Benfica ainda não têm acordo. A partir de hoje, a rescisão do contrato que liga José Mourinho ao Benfica passa a custar 15 milhões a qualquer uma das partes que tome essa iniciativa.
data.translatedTitle: José Mourinho: Termination with Benfica now costs 15 million euros
data.translatedDescription: Marco Silva and Benfica still do not have an agreement. From today onwards, the termination of the contract linking José Mourinho to Benfica will cost 15 million to whichever party takes this initiative.

data.title: Jardins Ponte de Lima. Festival pode ser visitado até ao final de outubro
data.description: Onze jardins de sonho é o que promete o festival internacional de Ponte de Lima. De portas abertas até ao fim de outubro.
data.translatedTitle: Ponte de Lima Gardens. Festival can be visited until the end of October
data.translatedDescription: Eleven dream gardens is what the Ponte de Lima international festival promises. Open doors until the end of October.

data.title: Στις κάλπες η Κολομβία ανάμεσα σε Αριστερά, Ουρίμπε και «τραμπισμό»
data.description: Ανάμεσα στη συνέχιση της αριστερής πολιτικής του Γκουστάβο Πέτρο, την επιστροφή του Ουριμπισμού και την άνοδο του «τραμπικού» μοντέλου, οι Κολομβιανοί ψηφίζουν σήμερα σε εκλογές με έντονο άρωμα πολιτικού θρίλερ
data.translatedTitle: At the polls, Colombia between the Left, Uribe and "Trumpism"
data.translatedDescription: Between the continuation of Gustavo Petro's leftist politics, the return of Uribism and the rise of the "Trump" model, Colombians are voting today in an election with a strong flavor of political thriller

data.title: Η “Γαλάζια Πατρίδα” και η στρατηγική ένταση στην Αν. Μεσόγειο
data.description: Η κατάθεση του «Νομοσχεδίου για τις Θαλάσσιες Ζώνες Δικαιοδοσίας» στην τουρκική Βουλή τοποθετεί την Ελλάδα και την Κύπρο στην πρώτη γραμμή μιας σύγκρουσης για τα κυριαρχικά δικαιώματά τους

data.description: Όσα κάνετε μέσα στην πρώτη ώρα αφότου ξυπνήσετε μπορούν να επηρεάσουν το πώς θα αισθάνεται το σώμα σας όλη την ημέρα.
data.translatedTitle: 3 simple morning habits that reduce inflammation in the body
data.translatedDescription: What you do within the first hour after waking up can affect how your body feels throughout the day.

data.description: Περισσότερα από 20.000 άτομα συγκεντρώθηκαν στα Ηλύσια Πεδία, με την αστυνομία να προσπαθεί να συγκρατήσει το πλήθος.

data.translatedDescription: More than 20,000 people gathered on the Champs-Élysées, with police trying to contain the crowd.

data.title: Γαστροπολιτική: Η γεωπολιτική της γαστρονομίας, στη χώρα που ανακάλυψε το κρασί
data.description: Ο καθηγητής Φιλοσοφίας Τζέισον Εσκαλάντε μιλάει στο «Βήμα» για τον ρόλο της γαστρονομίας στη γεωπολιτική της Γεωργίας. Η εξάρτηση από τη Ρωσία για το αλεύρι. Το αίτημα υπέρβασης της πατριαρχίας στην επιτέλεση του εθνικού συμποσίου. Το δίλημμα για τον οίνο.

data.translatedDescription: Philosophy professor Jason Escalade talks to Vima about the role of gastronomy in Georgia's geopolitics. Dependence on Russia for flour. The request to transcend patriarchy in the performance of the national symposium. The wine dilemma.

data.description: Σειρά εξελίξεων στο μέτωπο της Μέσης Ανατολής. Συνεχίζονται οι διαπραγματεύσεις για ειρήνη εν μέσω πυραύλων και ναρκών στα στενά του Ορμούζ

data.description:
KUALA LUMPUR: Malaysia appointed on Saturday a former high court judge as the country’s new anti-graft czar to replace its outgoing chief who was dogged by allegations of abuse of power and illegal shareholding.
	The appointment of Abdul Halim Aman comes as Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s government faces increased scrutiny on promises made to tackle corruption in the Southeast Asian nation.
data.translatedTitle: Malaysia appoints new anti-graft chief

data.title: Three killed in clashes in India’s troubled northeast
data.description:
NEW DELHI: Gun battles between rival ethnic groups in India’s troubled northeastern Manipur state killed three men, police said, the latest unrest in the far-flung region.
	Manipur has seen periodic clashes for nearly three years between the predominantly Hindu Meitei majority and the mainly Christian Kuki community in which more than 250 people have been killed.
	“In a heavy exchange of fire … three individuals sustained fatal bullet injuries,” Manipur police said in a statement late Friday.

data.title: Chinese panda pair headed to US zoo
data.description:
BEIJING: Two giant pandas from China are headed to Atlanta on a new 10-year conservation deal.
	Pandas Ping Ping, a male, and Fu Shuang, a female, will live at Zoo Atlanta, China Wildlife Conservation Association said in a statement Friday.
	The organization signed the research agreement with the United States zoo last year, it said, noting the deal continues “the ‘panda bond’ shared by the people of both nations for more than 20 years.”

data.title: Despite Iran tensions, King Charles III will follow his mother’s lead in celebrating US-UK bonds
data.description:
LONDON: The challenge for King Charles III as he embarks on this week’s state visit to the US is, as always, to live up to his mother’s example.
	The late Queen Elizabeth II wowed Congress in 1991 with a speech that celebrated the shared democratic traditions of Britain and the United States, quoted Abraham Lincoln, Franklin D. Roosevelt and Ralph Waldo Emerson, and highlighted the deep bonds between the two nations.

data.title: Australia refuses repatriation help for citizens in Syria camp
data.description:
SYDNEY: Australia refused to help repatriate citizens related to suspected Daesh militants on Saturday, following a report that some Australian families are trying to return home from a camp in Syria.
	National broadcaster ABC said four Australian women and nine of their children and grandchildren had left the Roj camp in northeastern Syria on Friday, citing the camp director.
	Syrian forces were taking them to Damascus to help them fly back to Australia, it said.

	Syrian forces were taking them to Damascus to help them fly back to Australia, it said.

data.title: Saudi Arabia’s events sector push on track despite disruptions, says industry veteran
data.description:
RIYADH: Saudi Arabia’s push to position itself as a global events hub remains firmly on track despite geopolitical disruptions, according to one of the leading figures in the industry.

	The US-Israel war with Iran has led to disruptions to many of the Kingdom’s flagship forums, with the Saudi Arabian Grand Prix 2026, the LEAP technology conference, and Automechanika Riyadh among those to be postponed.

data.title: Startup Wrap: MENA startups draw capital as AI bets continue to accelerate
data.description:
RIYADH: Startups across the Middle East and North Africa saw new funding rounds over the past week, with acquisitions, and partnerships across artificial intelligence, fintech, gaming, and digital infrastructure.

	Saudi Arabia-based Signit raised $15 million in a series A round led by Raed Ventures, with participation from STV, Seedra Ventures, Takamol Ventures, and Suhail Ventures.

data.title: US military says it struck vessel in Eastern Pacific, killing two
data.description:
WASHINGTON: The US military said on Friday it struck a vessel in the Eastern Pacific, killing two people, in the latest such attack, condemned by rights groups as “extrajudicial killings” and described by Washington as targeting “narco-terrorists.”
	The US Southern Command alleged that the vessel struck on Friday was operated by “Designated Terrorist Organizations” that ‌it did ‌not identify.
	It said ‌that ⁠no US military ⁠forces were harmed. It described those killed as “male narco-terrorists,” without offering details.

data.title: Spain is ‘reliable’ NATO member, PM says after reported US ouster threat
data.description:
NICOSIA, Cyprus: Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Friday stressed that his country was a “reliable member” of NATO, after a report the United States was considering trying to suspend it over its refusal to support military operations against Iran.
	The Reuters news agency cited an anonymous US official as telling it that the Pentagon had outlined the suspension option in an email looking at ways to punish NATO allies that steered clear of the US-Israeli war against Iran.

data.translatedDescription:

data.title: Tunisia suspends Nobel Peace Prize-winning LTDH rights group
data.description:
TUNIS: Tunisian authorities on Friday ‌ordered a one-month suspension of activities by the Human Rights League (LTDH), according to a statement from the group, which was among ​the civil society quartet that won the Nobel Peace Prize in 2015.
	No comment was immediately available on the matter from the government.
	The league said the move was part of a “wider pattern of increasingly systematic curbs on civil society and on free and independent voices.”

data.description: PNG rugby league icon Justin Olam has delivered K30,000 worth of medical supplies to two health centres in his home district of Chuave, bringing relief to communities facing medicine shortages. data.title: Seven years of steady leadership: PM Marape reflects on PNG’s progress and transformation since 2019
data.description: Prime Minister James Marape has reflected on Seven Years of Leadership since assuming Office on 30 May 2019, describing the Journey as one of Economic Recovery, Institutional Reform, Nation Building, and laying strong foundations for Papua New Guinea's future despite significant Domestic and Global Challenges. Marking the Seventh Anniversary of his Election as Prime Minister, he thanked the People of Papua New Guinea, Coalition Partners, Members of Parliament, Provincial and Local-Level Governments, Public Servants, Churches, Development Partners, and ordinary Citizens who have contributed to the Country's progress over the past Seven Years. data.title: Zongo : de plus en plus de Centrafricains s’y rendent pour des soins de santé
data.description: Pour ce numéro du Grand reportage, nous abordons la question des soins de santé, notamment le déplacement des patients centrafricains vers la ville de Zongo, en République démocratique du Congo. Retrouvons Édouard Rogossé et Gildas Nabéza pour en savoir davantage. L’article Zongo : de plus en plus de Centrafricains s’y rendent pour des soins de santé est apparu en premier sur Radio Ndeke Luka .
data.translatedTitle: Zongo: more and more Central Africans are going there for health care
data.translatedDescription: For this issue of Le Grand reportage, we address the issue of health care, in particular the movement of Central African patients to the town of Zongo, in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Let’s meet Édouard Rogossé and Gildas Nabéza to find out more. The article Zongo: more and more Central Africans are going there for health care appeared first on Radio Ndeke Luka.

data.title: Politique : « Tout le monde connait mes relations avec Karim Meckassoua », assure Sani Yalo
data.description: Fr : Sa : Soupçonné d’être en connivence avec Karim Meckassoua pour renverser le pouvoir de Bangui, le ministre d’État, Sani Yalo, a pris la parole ce 29 mai devant la presse. Alors que son audition, prévue vendredi, n’a pas eu lieu et que le dossier a été classé sans suite par les autorités judiciaires, […] L’article Politique : « Tout le monde connait mes relations avec Karim Meckassoua », assure Sani Yalo est apparu en premier sur Radio Ndeke Luka .
data.translatedTitle: Politics: “Everyone knows my relationship with Karim Meckassoua,” assures Sani Yalo
data.translatedDescription: Fr: Sa: Suspected of being in collusion with Karim Meckassoua to overthrow the power of Bangui, the Minister of State, Sani Yalo, spoke to the press on May 29. data.title: Fête des mères : entre précarité et hausse de prix de denrées sur le marché
data.description: Fr : Sa : A Bangui comme dans plusieurs villes de province, beaucoup de familles se préparent à célébrer la Fête des mères, prévue ce dimanche 31 mai. En raison de la précarité et de l’augmentation des prix de denrées alimentaires sur le marché, certaines personnes se désintéressent des festivités. Un reportage d’Edouard Rogossé. L’article Fête des mères : entre précarité et hausse de prix de denrées sur le marché est apparu en premier sur Radio Ndeke Luka .
data.translatedTitle: Mother's Day: between precariousness and rising food prices on the market
data.translatedDescription: Fr: Sa: In Bangui, as in several provincial towns, many families are preparing to celebrate Mother's Day, scheduled for this Sunday, May 31. Due to insecurity and the increase in food prices on the market, some people are losing interest in the festivities. A report by Edouard Rogossé. The article Mother's Day: between precariousness and rising food prices on the market appeared first on Radio Ndeke Luka.

data.title: Début des activités de la Mutuelle de santé des enseignants au Haut-Uele
data.description: La Mutuelle de santé des enseignants a officiellement lancé ses activités mercredi 27 mai à Isiro, dans la province du Haut-Uele. Après quatorze ans d’existence en RDC, cette structure s’implante enfin dans cette province, avec déjà huit formations médicales sélectionnées pour assurer la prise en charge des professionnels de l’enseignement. Pour bénéficier de la couverture médicale, chaque enseignant devra verser une contribution mensuelle fixée à 5 000 francs congolais.
data.translatedTitle: Start of activities of the Teachers’ Health Mutual in Haut-Uele
data.translatedDescription: The Teachers' Health Mutual officially launched its activities on Wednesday May 27 in Isiro, in the Haut-Uele province. After fourteen years of existence in the DRC, this structure is finally established in this province, with already eight medical training courses selected to ensure the care of teaching professionals. To benefit from medical coverage, each teacher must pay a monthly contribution set at 5,000 Congolese francs.

data.title: Le ministère des Finances met en place une plateforme de régulation des jeux d’argent en RDC
data.description: Le ministère des Finances affirme mettre en place d’une plateforme centralisée de régulation des jeux d’argent en République démocratique du Congo. Didier Bobwa, chargé du système d’information et du monitoring des opérations de jeux, a fait cette déclaration lors d’une activité organisée samedi 30 mai à Kinshasa :
data.translatedTitle: The Ministry of Finance sets up a platform to regulate gambling in the DRC
data.translatedDescription: The Ministry of Finance claims to be setting up a centralized platform for regulating gambling in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Didier Bobwa, responsible for the information system and monitoring of gaming operations, made this declaration during an activity organized on Saturday May 30 in Kinshasa:

data.title: Et si la solution à nos crises était de réapprendre à être humain ?
data.description: Il est urgent que l’homme réapprenne à être humain. C’est cet appel à l’action que porte le livre « L’humanisme, un art de vivre », de l’abbé Muyayalo Giresse Lievin, paru ce mois de mai aux éditions universitaires européennes. Pour l’auteur, être humain signifie prendre soin de son prochain, aider les autres à moins souffrir, mais aussi bâtir une société de justice, respecter la dignité de chacun et, surtout, donner la paix. L’humanisme résume toutes les valeurs humaines dont nous parlons toujours dans cette émission.
data.translatedTitle: What if the solution to our crises was to relearn how to be human?
data.translatedDescription: It is urgent that man learns to be human again. It is this call to action that is carried by the book “Humanism, an art of living”, by Father Muyayalo Giresse Lievin, published this May by European University Editions. For the author, being human means taking care of your neighbor, helping others to suffer less, but also building a just society, respecting the dignity of each person and, above all, giving peace. Humanism sums up all the human values ​​that we always talk about on this show.

data.title: La population satisfaite de l’évolution des travaux de réhabilitation de la place SONAHYDROC à Kindu
data.description: La population de Kindu, dans la province du Maniema, a exprimé samedi 30 mai sa satisfaction quant à l’évolution des travaux de réhabilitation de la place « SONAHYDROC », située au croisement du boulevard Joseph Kabila et de l’avenue du 4 Janvier.
data.translatedTitle: The population satisfied with the progress of the rehabilitation work on SONAHYDROC square in Kindu
data.translatedDescription: The population of Kindu, in the province of Maniema, expressed on Saturday May 30 their satisfaction with the progress of the rehabilitation work on the “SONAHYDROC” square, located at the intersection of Boulevard Joseph Kabila and Avenue du 4 Janvier.

data.title: La boue extraite des caniveaux obstrue la chaussée entre Landu et la prison centrale de Makala, à Kinshasa
data.description: La circulation est fortement réduite sur l’avenue de la Libération (ex‑24 novembre), dans le tronçon compris entre l’arrêt Landu et la prison centrale de Makala, à cause de la boue curée et abandonnée le long des caniveaux.
data.translatedTitle: Mud extracted from gutters obstructs the road between Landu and the central prison of Makala, in Kinshasa
data.translatedDescription: Traffic is greatly reduced on Avenue de la Libération (formerly November 24), in the section between the Landu stop and the Makala central prison, because of the mud cleaned and abandoned along the gutters.

data.title: A Bunia, le patron de l’OMS réaffirme sa solidarité avec les populations affectées par Ebola
data.description: Le Directeur général de l’Organisation mondiale de la santé (OMS), Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, est arrivé samedi 30 mai 2026 à Bunia pour une visite de travail consacrée à la lutte contre l’épidémie d’Ebola qui touche l’Est de la République démocratique du Congo. Au cours d’une rencontre avec la presse, il a réaffirmé l’engagement de l’OMS aux côtés des populations et des autorités congolaises.
data.translatedTitle: In Bunia, the head of the WHO reaffirms his solidarity with the populations affected by Ebola
data.translatedDescription: The Director General of the World Health Organization (WHO), Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, arrived on Saturday May 30, 2026 in Bunia for a working visit dedicated to the fight against the Ebola epidemic affecting the east of the Democratic Republic of Congo. During a meeting with the press, he reaffirmed the WHO's commitment to the Congolese populations and authorities.

data.title: Le marché central de Kisangani assaini à l’initiative de Mgr Ndjadi Ndjate
data.description: Plusieurs centaines de jeunes ont redonné de l’éclat aux abords du marché central de Kisangani, qu’ils ont assaini ce samedi 30 mai 2026. Ils ont répondu à l’appel de l’archevêque de Kisangani, à travers le Bureau diocésain pour la Pastorale écologique et la protection de l’environnement de l’archidiocèse, en collaboration avec les autorités urbaines.
data.translatedTitle: The central market of Kisangani cleaned up at the initiative of Mgr Ndjadi Ndjate
data.translatedDescription: Several hundred young people restored the shine to the surroundings of the central market of Kisangani, which they cleaned up this Saturday, May 30, 2026. They responded to the call of the Archbishop of Kisangani, through the Diocesan Office for Ecological Pastoral and Environmental Protection of the archdiocese, in collaboration with the urban authorities.

ner.entity: Diocesan Office for Ecological Pastoral and Environmental Protection
ner.label: ORG

data.title: Suspension des voyages RDC-Ouganda : inquiétude du Nord-Kivu
data.description: Depuis plus d’une semaine, aucun vol n’est assuré entre la République démocratique du Congo et l’Ouganda. Le transport transfrontalier de passagers, notamment les bus et les ferries, est également suspendu par les autorités ougandaises dans le cadre des mesures de lutte contre l’épidémie d’Ebola qui touche les deux pays.
data.translatedTitle: Suspension of DRC-Uganda travel: concern in North Kivu
data.translatedDescription: For more than a week, no flights have been operated between the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda. Cross-border passenger transport, including buses and ferries, is also suspended by Ugandan authorities as part of measures to combat the Ebola epidemic affecting both countries.

data.title: Est de la RDC : le traumatisme exacerbé par l’escalade des violences armées (Expert)
data.description: Les violences armées répétées à la suite des conflits à l’Est de la RDC exposent plusieurs personnes au traumatisme dans la province du Sud-Kivu. Une équipe de psychologues, experts en santé mentale de la province, a documenté des cas extrêmes répertoriés au cours des trois derniers mois.
data.translatedTitle: Eastern DRC: trauma exacerbated by escalation of armed violence (Expert)
data.translatedDescription: Repeated armed violence following conflicts in eastern DRC exposes several people to trauma in the province of South Kivu. A team of psychologists, mental health experts in the province, has documented extreme cases recorded over the past three months.

data.title: Bruno Lemarquis: "je garde de la RDC le souvenir d'un pays merveilleux"
data.translatedTitle: Bruno Lemarquis: “I remember the DRC as a wonderful country”

data.title: Mambasa : la société civile alerte sur les conséquences humanitaires des attaques attribuées aux ADF
data.description: Les attaques attribuées aux rebelles des ADF continuent de faire de nombreuses victimes et de provoquer d’importants déplacements de population dans le territoire de Mambasa, en province de l’Ituri. L’Association pour la protection et la défense des enfants et des Femmes (APDEF) a dressé, vendredi 29 mai, un bilan alarmant des violences enregistrées au cours des trois dernières semaines dans la chefferie de Babila Babombi.
data.translatedTitle: Mambasa: civil society warns of the humanitarian consequences of attacks attributed to the ADF
data.translatedDescription: Attacks attributed to ADF rebels continue to cause numerous victims and cause significant population displacements in the Mambasa territory, in Ituri province. The Association for the Protection and Defense of Children and Women (APDEF) drew up, on Friday May 29, an alarming assessment of the violence recorded over the last three weeks in the Babila Babombi chiefdom.

data.title: Création de 64 zones d’exploitation pour les creuseurs artisanaux du Grand Katanga
data.description: Le Service d’Assistance et d’Encadrement des Exploitants Miniers Artisanaux, SAEMAPE en sigle vient de franchir une nouvelle étape dans l’encadrement des creuseurs artisanaux. A Kinshasa, son Directeur Général, Jean-Paul Kapongo, a annoncé l’ouverture de 64 zones d’exploitation artisanale (ZEA) viables dans l’espace Grand Katanga ainsi que la mise en place d’une assurance sociale en faveur des creuseurs.
data.translatedTitle: Creation of 64 exploitation zones for artisanal diggers in Greater Katanga
data.translatedDescription: The Assistance and Supervision Service for Artisanal Miners, SAEMAPE in acronym, has just taken a new step in the supervision of artisanal miners. In Kinshasa, its Director General, Jean-Paul Kapongo, announced the opening of 64 viable artisanal mining zones (ZEA) in the Greater Katanga area as well as the establishment of social insurance for diggers.

data.title: Le Service national prend la tête d’une Task Force chargée de la salubrité et de la circulation routière à Kinshasa
data.description: Le Service national a été placé à la tête d’une Task Force chargée d’améliorer la salubrité publique et la circulation routière à Kinshasa. La décision a été annoncée lors de la réunion du Conseil des ministres présidée vendredi 29 mai par le chef de l’État, Félix Tshisekedi, à la Cité de l’Union africaine.
data.translatedTitle: The National Service takes the lead of a Task Force responsible for sanitation and road traffic in Kinshasa
data.translatedDescription: The National Service was placed at the head of a Task Force responsible for improving public health and road traffic in Kinshasa. The decision was announced during the meeting of the Council of Ministers chaired on Friday May 29 by the Head of State, Félix Tshisekedi, at the Cité de l’Union Africaine.

data.title: Ebola en RDC : « Le pays a la capacité de contenir cette épidémie », affirme Tedros Adhanom
data.description: La République démocratique du Congo dispose de l’expérience et des capacités nécessaires pour venir à bout de la nouvelle épidémie d’Ebola qui sévit dans l’Est du pays.
data.translatedTitle: Ebola in the DRC: “The country has the capacity to contain this epidemic,” says Tedros Adhanom
data.translatedDescription: The Democratic Republic of Congo has the experience and capabilities necessary to overcome the new Ebola epidemic raging in the east of the country.

data.title: Ebola en Ituri : un appui de 15 000 USD pour renforcer la prise en charge des malades dans la zone de santé de Nyankunde
data.description: La zone de santé de Nyankunde, dans le territoire d’Irumu en Ituri, continue de faire face à l’épidémie de la maladie à virus Ebola. Dans ce contexte, un appui financier de 15 000 dollars américains a été remis jeudi 28 mai à l’Hôpital général de référence Centre médical évangélique de Nyankunde par un élu originaire du territoire. Cette contribution vise à soutenir les efforts de prise en charge des mala des.
data.translatedTitle: Ebola in Ituri: support of 15,000 USD to strengthen the care of patients in the Nyankunde health zone
data.translatedDescription: The Nyankunde health zone, in the territory of Irumu in Ituri, continues to face the epidemic of Ebola virus disease. In this context, financial support of 15,000 US dollars was given on Thursday May 28 to the General Reference Hospital Evangelical Medical Center of Nyankunde by an elected official from the territory. This contribution aims to support efforts to care for sick people.

data.title: Journée internationale des Casques bleus: le gouvernement de la RDC plaide pour un financement durable de la MONUSCO
data.description: La réduction des financements destinés aux opérations de maintien de la paix des Nations unies risque d'affecter l'efficacité de la MONUSCO en République démocratique du Congo ( RDC). C'est l'une des principales préoccupations exprimées par l'ambassadeur Noël Mbemba, délégué général du Gouvernement en charge de la MONUSCO, lors de la célébration de la Journée internationale des Casques bleus organisée, vendredi 29 mai à Kinshasa.
data.translatedTitle: International Day of Peacekeepers: the DRC government calls for sustainable funding for MONUSCO
data.translatedDescription: The reduction in funding for United Nations peacekeeping operations risks affecting the effectiveness of MONUSCO in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). This is one of the main concerns expressed by Ambassador Noël Mbemba, general delegate of the Government in charge of MONUSCO, during the celebration of the International Day of Blue Helmets organized on Friday May 29 in Kinshasa.

data.title: Scientists warn dangerous radon gas may be increasing lung cancer risks
data.description:
Air pollution is often linked to smoke from vehicles, dust and the burning of waste. But scientists say there is another dangerous pollutant in the air that people cannot see or smell — radon gas.

Researchers at the Ghana Atomic Energy Commission say the radioactive gas is naturally present in the environment, and prolonged exposure could increase the risk of lung cancer, even among non-smokers.

Senior Research Scientist at the Commission, Dr Irene Opoku-Ntim, explains.

data.title: EPA, Columbia University partner to map air pollution across Ghana — even in places without monitors
data.description:
For most of Ghana's history, knowing how polluted the air was in any given community came down to one question: Is there a monitor nearby? For the vast majority of the country, the answer has been no.

That is about to change.

Ghana's Environmental Protection Authority has formalised a partnership with Columbia University's Lamont-Doherty Earth Observatory to map PM2.5 levels, the tiny particles most dangerous to human health, across the entire country, going back as far as 2005. The announcement, made on March 29, 2026, fills a gap that has quietly enabled a crisis to deepen unseen.

data.title: Municipal Assemblies gain real-time pollution data as Breathe Accra expands air quality monitoring network
data.description:
The pollution is all around us. In the smoke from vehicles… the burning of waste… and the dust hanging over busy roads in Accra. But for a long time, there was limited scientific data to show just how polluted some communities really are. And without data, it has been difficult for authorities to act. Clean Air Fund Lead in Ghana, Desmond Appiah, says that remains a major challenge across Africa.

“The level of air quality data collection in Africa is very low. (0:43) Secondly, because it's low, we are not really putting the information in the hands of the policymakers, in the states that the policymakers can understand.” -  Desmond Appiah, Clean Air Fund

data.title: 2026 JoyNews Impact Makers honouree Dr Akunzule donates award prize to support women basket weavers in Upper East
data.description:
2026 JoyNews Impact Makers Awards honouree, Dr Anthony Akunzule, has donated part of his award prize money and his recognition plaque to support women basket weavers in the Upper East Region.

Dr Akunzule, who was honoured in the WASH and Women Empowerment category, presented the plaque he received at the awards to a group of 30 women basket weavers in Kolgo-Adua Sumbrungu, near Bolgatanga. He also donated GH₵3,000 from his award prize money to support their work and livelihoods.

data.title: Gold Fields highlights US$5bn investment, says over 70% of Ghana revenues stay in-country
data.description: Gold Fields has disclosed that it has invested approximately US$5 billion in Ghana over the past 30 years, revealing that more than 70 per cent of revenue generated from its operations remains within the country.

data.title: GNFS warns of economic disaster if safety lapses occur at Kpone power enclave

data.description: The President of the National Union of Ghana Students (NUGS), Rashid Ibrahim Esq., has warned of sustained student-led action if government proceeds with the renewal of Gold Fields’ mining lease at Tarkwa, linking the issue to xenophobic attacks on Africans in South Africa.

data.title: Ageing fire tenders, lack of hydrants threaten emergency response in Tema Region
data.description: The Ghana National Fire Service (GNFS) in the Tema Region is facing significant operational challenges due to ageing fire tenders, the absence of functional fire hydrants, and poor road infrastructure, a situation officials say is undermining emergency response efforts.

data.translatedDescription: The Ghana National Fire Service (GNFS) in the Tema Region is facing significant operational challenges due to ageing fire tenders, the absence of functional fire hydrants, and poor road infrastructure, a situation officials say is undermining emergency response efforts.

data.title: Barker-Vormawor challenges legitimacy of Anti-LGBTQ+ Bill approval
data.description: Private legal practitioner and activist Osagyefo Oliver Barker-Vormawor has raised questions regarding the procedural validity of Parliament’s recent passage of the controversial Anti-LGBTQ+ Bill, suggesting that the legislation may have been approved without the constitutionally required quorum.

data.title: Excessive Bail Conditions in Ghana: A threat to the presumption of innocence and the right to liberty guaranteed under the 1992 constitution
data.description: Across Ghana in recent years, bail conditions imposed on suspects and accused persons have become increasingly draconian, often involving astronomical cash sums, onerous surety and justification requirements as well as restrictive travel/reporting conditions that amount to de facto pre‑trial punishment.
data.translatedTitle: Excessive Bail Conditions in Ghana: A threat to the presumption of innocence and the right to liberty guaranteed under the 1992 constitution
data.translatedDescription: Across Ghana in recent years, bail conditions imposed on suspects and accused persons have become increasingly draconian, often involving astronomical cash sums, onerous surety and justification requirements as well as restrictive travel/reporting conditions that amount to de facto pre‑trial punishment.

data.title: Los niños de Raúl
data.description: La luz fuerte del mediodía se cuela por los cristales del amplio recibidor. Una fotografía intacta después de muchos años avisa, desde la entrada, la presencia del General en la casa grande de Teté. Ella lo recuerda y sonríe. “La primera niña que cargó fue Pelusa. Se encariñó muchísimo con ella. Lo que hizo por ella no lo había hecho nadie”, cuenta Teté, la guajira de la Sierra Maestra que dirigió durante 35 años la escuela Solidaridad con Panamá, en La Habana. The post Los niños de Raúl first appeared on Cubadebate .
data.translatedTitle: Raúl's children
data.translatedDescription: The strong midday light filters through the windows of the large hall. A photograph intact after many years warns, from the entrance, of the presence of the General in the big house of Teté. She remembers and smiles. "The first girl he picked up was Pelusa. He became very attached to her. What he did for her no one had done," says Teté, the Guajira from the Sierra Maestra who directed the Solidarity with Panama school in Havana for 35 years. The post Raúl's children first appeared on Cubadebate.

data.title: Concentración frente a Embajada de EE.UU. en Madrid contra bloqueo energético a Cuba

La cita tendrá lugar en el número 75 de la calle de Serrano, en el barrio de Salamanca de Madrid. data.title: Colombia activa este domingo el mayor despliegue de observación internacional para sus elecciones
data.description: El próximo domingo 31 de mayo, los colombianos elegirán a quien gobernará durante los próximos cuatro años. El Consejo Nacional Electoral (CNE) de Colombia movilizará este domingo 15 000 observadores —entre ellos 1 500 internacionales— para garantizar la transparencia de las elecciones presidenciales en las que votan más de 41,4 millones de colombianos. The post Colombia activa este domingo el mayor despliegue de observación internacional para sus elecciones first appeared on Cubadebate .
data.translatedTitle: This Sunday, Colombia activates the largest deployment of international observation for its elections
data.translatedDescription: Next Sunday, May 31, Colombians will elect who will govern for the next four years. This Sunday, the National Electoral Council (CNE) of Colombia will mobilize 15,000 observers—including 1,500 international observers—to guarantee the transparency of the presidential elections in which more than 41.4 million Colombians vote. The post Colombia activates this Sunday the largest deployment of international observation for its elections first appeared on Cubadebate.

data.title: Unicef reporta 77 niños muertos o heridos en una semana por ataques de Israel en Líbano
data.description: El Fondo de Naciones Unidas para la Infancia (Unicef) denunció este sábado que 77 niños murieron o resultaron heridos en Líbano durante los últimos siete días debido a la ofensiva israelí, mientras el presidente libanés Joseph Aoun urgió a Estados Unidos a lograr un alto el fuego.  En las últimas 24 horas, los ataques israelíes mataron a 31 personas e hirieron a 68 en territorio libanés. data.translatedDescription: The United Nations Children's Fund (UNICEF) reported this Saturday that 77 children were killed or injured in Lebanon during the last seven days due to the Israeli offensive, while Lebanese President Joseph Aoun urged the United States to achieve a ceasefire. data.description: La Editorial Oriente entregó el viernes en Santiago de Cuba los premios Oriente 2026, en el marco del aniversario 55 de la institución, con el objetivo de fomentar la creación literaria. Momento también aprovechado para la convocatoria al Premio Oriente 2027 que en esta edición permitirá concursar en literatura infanto-juvenil en el género poesía, y en ensayo histórico. The post Entregan premios Oriente 2026 en Santiago de Cuba por aniversario 55 de editorial first appeared on Cubadebate .

Moment also taken advantage of for the call for the 2027 Oriente Prize, which in this edition will allow competition in children's and youth literature in the poetry genre, and in historical essays. data.title: Parten canoístas cubanas Yarisleidis Cirilo y Yinnolis López hacia Colombia para base de entrenamiento
data.description: Las canoístas cubanas Yarisleidis Cirilo y Yinnolis Franchesca López parten hoy hacia Colombia para cumplir una base de entrenamiento de canoa monoplaza (C-1) y biplaza (C-2) en condiciones de altura hasta el 21 de junio, con la mira puesta en los Juegos Centroamericanos y del Caribe Santo Domingo 2026 y la Copa del Mundo en Montreal, Canadá. data.title: Tras la salida de la Guiteras, déficit se elevará a más de 2000 MW para el pico de este sábado
data.description: Este sábado 30 de mayo se estima en el horario de la media se estima una afectación de 1600 MW, mientras que para el horario de máxima demanda una disponibilidad de 1158 MW con una demanda máxima de 3200 MW, para un déficit de 2042 MW, por lo que de mantenerse las condiciones previstas se pronostica una afectación de 2072 MW en este horario. The post Tras la salida de la Guiteras, déficit se elevará a más de 2000 MW para el pico de este sábado first appeared on Cubadebate .

data.translatedDescription: This Saturday, May 30, during the average schedule, an impact of 1,600 MW is estimated, while for the peak demand schedule, an availability of 1,158 MW with a maximum demand of 3,200 MW, for a deficit of 2,042 MW, so if the expected conditions continue, an impact of 2,072 MW is forecast for this schedule. The post After the departure of Guiteras, the deficit will rise to more than 2000 MW for this Saturday's peak first appeared on Cubadebate.

data.title: Niño hondureño viaja a la NASA para campamento espacial en Estados Unidos
data.description: El hondureño André Enoc Mejía Romero, de apenas 10 años, inició este sábado un viaje que marca un hecho histórico para el país: por primera vez, representará a Honduras en un programa de formación espacial en la NASA . El menor viaja acompañado de su madre rumbo al Kennedy Space Center , en Cabo Cañaveral, Florida, donde participará del 1 al 7 de junio en un campamento educativo internacional enfocado en ciencia, tecnología y exploración espacial. El programa reúne a niños y jóvenes de distintas partes del mundo y contempla entrenamientos en robótica , astronomía y tecnología aeroespacial, además de simulaciones inspiradas en misiones espaciales, incluyendo experiencias de microgravedad. Al concluir la capacitación, André recibirá una certificación como aspirante a astronauta junior, reconocimiento que respalda su participación en esta experiencia formativa. Su interés por el espacio no es reciente. Desde temprana edad ha participado en cinco ediciones del NASA Space Apps Challenge, donde logró el People’s Choice Award en 2023 y 2024. También ha destacado en competencias nacionales de matemáticas, astronomía y astronáutica , consolidándose como uno de los estudiantes más sobresalientes en el área científica. El menor es fundador de Exoplanets Lab, un proyecto educativo con el que promueve la enseñanza de la astronomía entre niños y jóvenes en Honduras y otros países de la región. Además, se convirtió en el expositor más joven en participar en las Noches Astronómicas de la Universidad Nacional Autónoma de Honduras (Unah), un hecho sin precedentes en ese espacio académico. A su corta edad, su trayectoria ya ha sido reconocida a nivel internacional con el International Star Kids Awards 2025 , distinción que lo convirtió en el primer hondureño en ingresar a una comunidad global de niños prodigio. También recibió el Young Global Icon Award 2026, otorgado a jóvenes con liderazgo en ciencia espacial y educación STEM. La madre del menor, Lissa Mejía, agradeció el respaldo brindado por el Gobierno del presidente Nasry Asfura , señalando que ese apoyo ha sido clave para concretar la participación del niño en el programa. Recordó además que el mandatario recibió a André en Casa Presidencial meses atrás, donde el menor presentó sus proyectos científicos y compartió sus aspiraciones. “Mi mamá, el presidente cree en mí”, fue la frase que, según su madre, marcó profundamente al niño tras aquel encuentro. Para su familia, este viaje representa más que un logro académico: es la confirmación de que el talento hondureño puede abrirse camino en escenarios internacionales de alto nivel.
data.translatedTitle: Honduran boy travels to NASA for space camp in the United States
data.translatedDescription: Honduran André Enoc Mejía Romero, barely 10 years old, began this Saturday a trip that marks a historic event for the country: for the first time, he will represent Honduras in a space training program at NASA. The minor travels accompanied by his mother to the Kennedy Space Center, in Cape Canaveral, Florida, where he will participate from June 1 to 7 in an international educational camp focused on science, technology and space exploration. The program brings together children and young people from different parts of the world and includes training in robotics, astronomy and aerospace technology, as well as simulations inspired by space missions, including microgravity experiences. Upon completion of the training, André will receive a certification as an aspiring junior astronaut, a recognition that supports his participation in this training experience. His interest in space is not recent. From an early age he has participated in five editions of the NASA Space Apps Challenge, where he won the People's Choice Award in 2023 and 2024. He has also stood out in national mathematics, astronomy and astronautics competitions, establishing himself as one of the most outstanding students in the scientific area. The minor is the founder of Exoplanets Lab, an educational project that promotes the teaching of astronomy among children and young people in Honduras and other countries in the region. In addition, he became the youngest exhibitor to participate in the Astronomical Nights of the National Autonomous University of Honduras (Unah), an unprecedented event in that academic space. At his young age, his career has already been recognized internationally with the International Star Kids Awards 2025, a distinction that made him the first Honduran to enter a global community of child prodigies. He also received the Young Global Icon Award 2026, awarded to young people with leadership in space science and STEM education. The minor's mother, Lissa Mejía, thanked the government of President Nasry Asfura for the support, pointing out that this support has been key to achieving the child's participation in the program. He also recalled that the president received André at the Presidential House months ago, where the minor presented his scientific projects and shared his aspirations. “My mother, the president believes in me,” was the phrase that, according to his mother, deeply marked the boy after that meeting. For his family, this trip represents more than an academic achievement: it is confirmation that Honduran talent can make its way on high-level international stages.
