data.title: PSG tumba al Arsenal en tanda de penales y se corona bicampeón de Champions League
data.description: Budapest, Hungría.- Los penaltis, con dos tiros enviados fuera, los ejecutados por Eberechi Eze y Gabriel , alargaron la hegemonía europea del París Saint Germain , por segunda vez seguida vencedor de la Liga de Campeones , y encumbran la filosofía y el trabajo del técnico español Luis Enrique , que consiguió su tercer éxito como entrenador en la 'Champions ', el segundo con el equipo francés, que une al que obtuvo antes con el Barcelona . La final de Budapest prolongó el maleficio continental del Arsenal , que, a pesar de terminar invicto la competición, el único en conseguirlo, y tener encarrilado el partido, acabó abatido, derrotado, tal y como sucedió hace veinte años, en la única final que había jugado hasta ahora, superado por el Barcelona. Se repitió su historia y la del PSG, campeón por segundo año seguido y que se sobrepuso al tempranero gol que logró Kai Havertz pero que a la hora de juego neutralizó, de penalti, provocado por el español Christian Mosquera , Ousmane Dembelé , el Balón de oro del que no había noticias hasta ese momento. El PSG, que añade este éxito al de la Ligue 1, se adentra en el selecto club de entidades que ha conseguido revalidar el titulo alguna vez. Son ocho, pero solo el Real Madrid de Zinedine Zidane consiguió tres con el formato actual del torneo. Luis Enrique, el gran triunfador de la final, ya forma parte de los elegidos. Se une a Zidane, Pep Guardiola y Bob Paisley , como los que poseen tres coronas en este evento. El mejor ataque se impuso a la mejor defensa en la primera final desde 2018 en la que ambos equipos logran marcar. No pudo acabar con su maleficio el Arsenal, que perdió la final que jugó hace veinte años con el Barcelona, con Arsene Wenger al mando. A la segunda, tampoco pudo. El partido se adentró en un inicio inesperado casi desde el principio, que premió el desparpajo con el que el Arsenal irrumpió en el campo. Fue una aparente declaración de intenciones del cuadro de Mikel Arteta, que empezó con velocidad y una presión que tuvo recompensa a los seis minutos. Marquinhos se hizo un lío en el centro del campo y despejó mal ante el acoso de dos jugadores del equipo londinense. Uno de ellos, el alemán Kai Havertz, se llevó la pelota y recorrió cuarenta metros sin que nadie pudiera alcanzarle. Llegó al área y, aunque escorado, ejecutó un disparo con poco ángulo que batió al meta Matvej Safonov. Pilló al equipo de Luis Enrique con el pie cambiado y el Arsenal se puso por delante. Havert revivió la felicidad que ya saboreó un lustro atrás, en la final de 2021, cuando militaba en el Chelsea. Entonces se erigió en héroe. Su gol dio el título de la Liga de Campeones a los 'blues' ante el Manchester City. El tanto dio paso a la normalidad en la situación. El PSG acaparó la posesión, absolutamente (78 por ciento frente a 22) y el Arsenal hizo lo que mejor hace, contener, defender. Gabriel, agigantado junto a William Saliba en el centro de la zaga, evitó un disparo en boca de gol de Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. El PSG arrinconó cada vez más al Arsenal, pero no encontraba espacios. Fabián Ruiz, de cabeza, en el área pequeña, echó el balón alto. Dominó el equipo francés, pero no se vio en acción a David Raya. No tiró entre los tres palos el campeón, neutralizado por el cuadro inglés, que tuvo una gran ocasión de ampliar su renta en el añadido de la primera parte, también en las botas de Havertz, que taponó Marquinhos, en la única salida a la contra del conjunto de Arteta después del gol. Necesitaba más de Vitinha y de Joao Neves el PSG. Pero no había hueco por el centro. A Achraf Hakimi y Nuno Mendes les faltó profundidad para hacer daño. Hasta que a la hora de partido, cuando crecía más la insistencia parisina, llegó la acción que dio otro aire al choque. La jugada dejó en evidencia a Christian Mosquera. El español no pudo con Kvaratskhelia, que se adentró en el área. Le trabó y fue penalti. Se salvó de la tarjeta el valenciano, que pudo ser la segunda y la expulsión. Pero no se salvó del gol el Arsenal. Lanzó el penalti Ousmane Dembele, que no falló y estableció el empate. Una nueva dimensión, otro panorama asomó en el partido. El Arsenal se desató y el choque se abrió. Tuvo el segundo Kvaratskhelia en el minuto 77 en una contra, con el partido ya roto, y estrelló el balón en un poste. Se había estirado el Arsenal, que convirtió el duelo en un intercambio de golpes, en un correcalles donde la amenaza parisina era mayor. Bradley Barcola estuvo cerca del gol. Lo evitó David Raya. Y Vitinha al borde del final rozó el larguero primero y después pudo evitar la prórroga en otra contra. Treinta minutos más de final sobre el césped del Puskas Arena que agrandaron la relevancia de David Raya en momentos clave y que llevó el desenlace a los penaltis. El PSG marcó cuatro de ellos. Solo falló Nuno Mendes con una buena acción de David Raya. Pero Eberechi Eze y Gabriel, el último, lanzaron fuera y dejaron al Arsenal sin título y al PSG como campeón. 1 - París SG: Matvey Safonov; Achraf Hakimi, Marquinhos (Illia Zabarnyi, m.106), William Pacho, Nuno Mendes; Vitinha (Lucas Beraldo, m.106), Joao Neves, Fabián Ruiz (Warren Zaire-mery, m.95); Desire Doué, Ousmane Dembélé (Gonçalo Ramos, m.96+) y Khvicha Kvaratskhelia (Bradley Barcola, m.83). 1 - Arsenal: David Raya; Christian Mosquera (Jurrien Timber, m.66), William Saliba, Gabriel, Piero Hincapié; Declan Rice, Myles Lewis-Skelly (Martin Zubimendi, m.91), Martin Odegaard (Viktor Gyokeres, m.66), Bukayo Saka (Noni Madueke, m.83), Leandro Trossard (Gabriel Martinelli, m.83) y Kai Havertz (Ebrechi Eze, m.91) Goles: 0-1, m.6: Kai Havertz. 1-1, m.65: Ousmane Dembele, de penalti. Penaltis: G.Ramos (PSG): Gol (1-0); Gyokeres (Arsenal): Gol (1-1); Doue (PSG): Gol (2-1); Eze (Arsenal): falla (2-1); N.Mendes (PSG): falla (2-1); Rice (Arsenal): gol (2-2); Hakimi (PSG): gol (3-2); Martinelli (Arsenal): gol (3-3); Beraldo (PSG): gol (4-3); Gabriel (Arsenal): falla (4-3). Árbitro: Daniel Siebert (ALE). Mostró tarjeta amarilla a Christian Mosquera, Bukayo Saka, Viktor Gyokeres, Declan Rice y al entrenador, Mikel Arteta, del Arsenal; y a Joao Neves y Nuno Mendes, del París Saint Germain. Incidencias: Final de la Liga de Campeones disputada en el estadio Puskas Arena de Budapest ante unos 67.000 espectadores.
data.translatedTitle: PSG knocks down Arsenal in a penalty shootout and is crowned two-time Champions League champion
data.translatedDescription: Budapest, Hungary.- The penalties, with two shots sent wide, those executed by Eberechi Eze and Gabriel, extended the European hegemony of Paris Saint Germain, winner of the Champions League for the second time in a row, and elevated the philosophy and work of the Spanish coach Luis Enrique, who achieved his third success as a coach in the 'Champions', the second with the French team, which joins the one he obtained before with Barcelona. The final in Budapest prolonged the continental curse of Arsenal, who, despite finishing the competition undefeated, the only one to do so, and having the match on track, ended up dejected, defeated, just as happened twenty years ago, in the only final they had played in until now, surpassed by Barcelona. His story was repeated and that of PSG, champion for the second year in a row and which overcame the early goal that Kai Havertz scored but that at the hour mark he neutralized, with a penalty, caused by the Spanish Christian Mosquera, Ousmane Dembelé, the Ballon d'Or of which there was no news until that moment. PSG, which adds this success to that of Ligue 1, enters the select club of entities that have managed to retain the title at some point. There are eight, but only Zinedine Zidane's Real Madrid managed three with the current format of the tournament. Luis Enrique, the great winner of the final, is already part of the chosen ones. He joins Zidane, Pep Guardiola and Bob Paisley as those who have three crowns in this event. The best attack beat the best defense in the first final since 2018 in which both teams managed to score. Arsenal could not end its spell, losing the final they played twenty years ago with Barcelona, ​​with Arsene Wenger in charge. The second time, he couldn't either. The match entered into an unexpected start almost from the beginning, which rewarded the self-confidence with which Arsenal burst onto the field. It was an apparent declaration of intent from Mikel Arteta's team, which started with speed and pressure that was rewarded after six minutes. Marquinhos made a mess in the center of the field and made a poor clearance due to harassment from two players from the London team. One of them, the German Kai Havertz, took the ball and traveled forty meters without anyone being able to reach him. He reached the area and, although heeled, took a shot from a small angle that beat goalkeeper Matvej Safonov. He caught Luis Enrique's team on the wrong foot and Arsenal took the lead. Havert relived the happiness he already enjoyed five years ago, in the 2021 final, when he was a member of Chelsea. Then he became a hero. His goal gave the Blues the Champions League title against Manchester City. The goal gave way to normality in the situation. PSG monopolized possession, absolutely (78 percent compared to 22) and Arsenal did what they do best, contain, defend. Gabriel, huge alongside William Saliba in the center of the defense, avoided a goal-mouth shot by Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. PSG cornered Arsenal more and more, but could not find space. Fabián Ruiz, with a header, in the small area, threw the ball high. The French team dominated, but David Raya was not seen in action. The champion did not shoot between the three sticks, neutralized by the English team, who had a great opportunity to extend their advantage in the added time of the first half, also in the boots of Havertz, who was blocked by Marquinhos, in the only counterattack by Arteta's team after the goal. PSG needed more from Vitinha and Joao Neves. But there was no gap in the center. Achraf Hakimi and Nuno Mendes lacked depth to do damage. Until at game time, when the Parisian insistence was growing, the action came that gave another air to the clash. The play exposed Christian Mosquera. The Spaniard could not handle Kvaratskhelia, who entered the area. It blocked him and it was a penalty. The Valencian was saved from the card, which could have been the second and the expulsion. But Arsenal were not saved from the goal. Ousmane Dembele took the penalty, which did not miss and established the tie. A new dimension, another panorama emerged in the match. Arsenal broke loose and the clash opened up. Kvaratskhelia had the second in the 77th minute on a counterattack, with the game already broken, and hit the ball against a post. Arsenal had stretched, turning the duel into an exchange of blows, a street race where the Parisian threat was greater. Bradley Barcola was close to the goal. David Raya avoided it. And Vitinha on the verge of the end touched the crossbar first and then was able to avoid extra time on another counterattack. Thirty more minutes of the final on the Puskas Arena grass that increased the relevance of David Raya in key moments and that led to the outcome to penalties. PSG scored four of them. Only Nuno Mendes failed with a good action by David Raya. But Eberechi Eze and Gabriel, the last one, threw out and left Arsenal without a title and PSG as champions. 1 - Paris SG: Matvey Safonov; Achraf Hakimi, Marquinhos (Illia Zabarnyi, d.106), William Pacho, Nuno Mendes; Vitinha (Lucas Beraldo, m.106), Joao Neves, Fabián Ruiz (Warren Zaire-mery, m.95); Desire Doué, Ousmane Dembélé (Gonçalo Ramos, m.96+) and Khvicha Kvaratskhelia (Bradley Barcola, m.83). 1 - Arsenal: David Raya; Christian Mosquera (Jurrien Timber, m.66), William Saliba, Gabriel, Piero Hincapié; Declan Rice, Myles Lewis-Skelly (Martin Zubimendi, m.91), Martin Odegaard (Viktor Gyokeres, m.66), Bukayo Saka (Noni Madueke, m.83), Leandro Trossard (Gabriel Martinelli, m.83) and Kai Havertz (Ebrechi Eze, m.91) Goals: 0-1, m.6: Kai Havertz. 1-1, m.65: Ousmane Dembele, penalty. Penalties: G.Ramos (PSG): Goal (1-0); Gyokeres (Arsenal): Goal (1-1); Doue (PSG): Goal (2-1); Eze (Arsenal): miss (2-1); N.Mendes (PSG): failure (2-1); Rice (Arsenal): goal (2-2); Hakimi (PSG): goal (3-2); Martinelli (Arsenal): goal (3-3); Beraldo (PSG): goal (4-3); Gabriel (Arsenal): fails (4-3). Referee: Daniel Siebert (ALE). He showed a yellow card to Christian Mosquera, Bukayo Saka, Viktor Gyokeres, Declan Rice and the coach, Mikel Arteta, of Arsenal; and Joao Neves and Nuno Mendes, from Paris Saint Germain. Incidents: Champions League final played at the Puskas Arena stadium in Budapest in front of around 67,000 spectators.

data.title: Cossette López arremete contra sus críticos y denuncia ataques políticos
data.description: Tegucigalpa, Honduras.- La consejera del Consejo Nacional Electoral (CNE), Cossette López , lanzó una serie de fuertes declaraciones contra sus críticos y adversarios políticos , a quienes acusó de promover ataques sistemáticos, utilizar granjas de bots y desarrollar campañas de desprestigio en su contra. A través de un mensaje difundido en redes sociales, López afirmó que las denuncias realizadas por ella y su equipo no deben interpretarse como muestras de debilidad, sino como acciones respaldadas por la verdad. Además, sostuvo que los ataques han alcanzado incluso a sus familiares. "Denunciar con la verdad en la boca no es llorar, aunque eso es lo que querían lograr, incluso atacando a nuestras hijas y familia", expresó la funcionaria, al rechazar las críticas que ha recibido en medio de la creciente confrontación política. La titular del organismo electoral también aseguró que sus opositores se presentan como víctimas mientras mantienen campañas permanentes de cuestionamientos. "Nos pasan diciendo lloronas y los que pasan llorando son ustedes y no solo de ahorita, sino desde antes". También López señaló que quienes la critican cuentan con estructuras de propaganda digital financiadas con recursos públicos. "Tienen más bots que votos y más boca que gallardía", afirmó. Asimismo, cuestionó lo que calificó como una estrategia de ocultamiento de responsabilidades y ataques dirigidos principalmente contra mujeres. Según la consejera, existe una campaña organizada para desacreditar a quienes denuncian irregularidades. López también hizo referencia a resultados electorales y a supuestos intentos de fraude, señalando que ciertos sectores políticos no lograron alcanzar sus objetivos. En ese sentido, sostuvo que algunos actores continúan impulsando narrativas para justificar sus posiciones.
data.translatedTitle: Cossette López attacks his critics and denounces political attacks
data.translatedDescription: Tegucigalpa, Honduras.- The counselor of the National Electoral Council (CNE), Cossette López, launched a series of strong statements against her critics and political adversaries, whom she accused of promoting systematic attacks, using bot farms and developing smear campaigns against her. Through a message spread on social networks, López stated that the complaints made by her and her team should not be interpreted as signs of weakness, but as actions backed by the truth. In addition, he maintained that the attacks have even reached his family members. "Denouncing with the truth in your mouth is not crying, although that is what they wanted to achieve, even attacking our daughters and family," said the official, rejecting the criticism she has received in the midst of the growing political confrontation. The head of the electoral body also assured that her opponents present themselves as victims while maintaining permanent campaigns of questioning. "They pass us by calling us crybabies and the ones who pass by crying are you and not just now, but from before." López also pointed out that those who criticize her have digital propaganda structures financed with public resources. "They have more bots than votes and more mouth than gallantry," he said. Likewise, he questioned what he described as a strategy of hiding responsibilities and attacks directed mainly against women. According to the counselor, there is an organized campaign to discredit those who report irregularities. López also made reference to electoral results and alleged fraud attempts, pointing out that certain political sectors failed to achieve their objectives. In that sense, he maintained that some actors continue to promote narratives to justify their positions.

data.title: Autopsia confirma que director del Instituto Polivalente de SPS fue asesinado
data.description: San Pedro Sula, Honduras.- Las investigaciones sobre la muerte del licenciado Víctor Fiallos , director y fundador del Instituto Polivalente de San Pedro Sula, dieron un giro inesperado luego de que Medicina Forense confirmara que el educador fue asesinado y no murió por suicidio, como se creyó inicialmente. Fiallos fue encontrado sin vida dentro del centro educativo el viernes 29 de mayo. Los primeros reportes y las condiciones de la escena llevaron a considerar la posibilidad de que el docente se quitara la vida; sin embargo, los resultados de la autopsia descartaron esa hipótesis. El portavoz de la Dirección Policial de Investigaciones (DPI), subcomisario Juan Alexander Sabillón, informó que se trató de una muerte violenta y que los responsables modificaron la escena para desviar las investigaciones. "Los hechores modificaron la escena para hacernos creer que se trataba de un suicidio", declaró el funcionario policial, al confirmar que se trabaja en la identificación de los autores y en el esclarecimiento de los móviles del crimen. El caso ha generado conmoción en la comunidad debido a que ocurrió menos de 24 horas después del fallecimiento de Violeth Eunice Acosta, una estudiante de 14 años del mismo instituto, quien tomó la decisión de quitarse la vida. De acuerdo con versiones brindadas por amigos de la menor, ella había sido expulsada recientemente del centro educativo tras un incidente relacionado con un vape o cigarro electrónico. Según sus allegados, el dispositivo no le pertenecía. Aunque las autoridades no han establecido una relación entre ambos hechos, han señalado que las circunstancias que rodean las dos tragedias han encendido las alarmas en la zona y requieren una investigación exhaustiva. La DPI y el Ministerio Público continúan recopilando evidencias y realizando diligencias para esclarecer el asesinato del director Víctor Fiallos, determinar quiénes participaron en el crimen y establecer las razones detrás de este hecho que ha conmocionado a la comunidad educativa.
data.translatedTitle: Autopsy confirms that director of the SPS Multipurpose Institute was murdered
data.translatedDescription: San Pedro Sula, Honduras.- The investigations into the death of Mr. Víctor Fiallos, director and founder of the San Pedro Sula Polyvalent Institute, took an unexpected turn after Forensic Medicine confirmed that the educator was murdered and did not die by suicide, as was initially believed. Fiallos was found dead inside the educational center on Friday, May 29. The first reports and the conditions of the scene led to considering the possibility that the teacher took his own life; However, the results of the autopsy ruled out that hypothesis. The spokesperson for the Police Investigation Directorate (DPI), Deputy Commissioner Juan Alexander Sabillón, reported that it was a violent death and that those responsible modified the scene to divert the investigations. "The perpetrators modified the scene to make us believe that it was a suicide," declared the police official, confirming that work is being done to identify the perpetrators and clarify the motives for the crime. The case has generated shock in the community because it occurred less than 24 hours after the death of Violeth Eunice Acosta, a 14-year-old student at the same institute, who made the decision to take her own life. According to versions provided by friends of the minor, she had recently been expelled from the educational center after an incident related to a vape or electronic cigarette. According to those close to him, the device did not belong to him. Although authorities have not established a relationship between the two events, they have indicated that the circumstances surrounding the two tragedies have raised alarm bells in the area and require a thorough investigation. The DPI and the Public Ministry continue to collect evidence and carry out proceedings to clarify the murder of director Víctor Fiallos, determine who participated in the crime and establish the reasons behind this fact that has shocked the educational community.

data.title: Hondureño Omar Oliva lucha por su vida tras ser atacado por desconocidos en EE UU
data.description: Estados Unidos.- El joven hondureño Omar Oliva se encuentra debatiéndose entre la vida y la muerte luego de haber sido víctima de un atentado en Estados Unidos. De acuerdo con los primeros reportes, el hecho violento ocurrió durante la tarde del pasado 28 de mayo, cuando Oliva salía de su lugar de trabajo. Por razones que aún no han sido esclarecidas por las autoridades, fue atacado y sufrió heridas de gravedad, presuntamente por amigos cercanos a él. Tras el incidente, el hondureño, que es originario de la aldea de Salamá, en el municipio de Tocoa, departamento de Colón, fue trasladado de emergencia a un centro asistencial, donde permanece bajo vigilancia médica debido a la delicada condición en la que se encuentra. Hasta el momento, no se han brindado detalles oficiales sobre las circunstancias del ataque ni sobre la identidad de los responsables. Asimismo, se desconoce en qué estado de Estados Unidos ocurrió el hecho. La noticia ha generado preocupación entre habitantes de su comunidad de origen, quienes han expresado mensajes de apoyo y solidaridad mientras esperan información sobre su evolución médica. Se espera que en las próximas horas las autoridades estadounidenses o personas cercanas al joven puedan proporcionar más detalles sobre el caso y el estado de salud de Omar Oliva.
data.translatedTitle: Honduran Omar Oliva fights for his life after being attacked by unknown persons in the United States
data.translatedDescription: United States.- The young Honduran Omar Oliva is struggling between life and death after being the victim of an attack in the United States. According to the first reports, the violent incident occurred during the afternoon of May 28, when Oliva was leaving her workplace. For reasons that have not yet been clarified by the authorities, he was attacked and suffered serious injuries, allegedly by friends close to him. After the incident, the Honduran, who is originally from the village of Salamá, in the municipality of Tocoa, department of Colón, was rushed to a healthcare center, where he remains under medical surveillance due to the delicate condition in which he is found. So far, no official details have been provided about the circumstances of the attack or the identity of those responsible. Likewise, it is unknown in which state of the United States the incident occurred. The news has generated concern among residents of his home community, who have expressed messages of support and solidarity while they wait for information about his medical evolution. It is expected that in the next few hours the US authorities or people close to the young man will be able to provide more details about the case and Omar Oliva's health status.

data.title: Tri protiv jednog: Da li se isplati preći s dizela na hibrid?
data.description: Posljednjih godina evropsko tržište automobila doživjelo je veliku promjenu. Dizelski motori, koji su decenijama bili sinonim za malu potrošnju i velike kilometraže, polako su ustupili mjesto hibridima. Međutim, postavlja se pitanje – da li su hibridi zaista donijeli ono što se od njih očekivalo?
data.translatedTitle: Three against one: Is it worth switching from diesel to hybrid?
data.translatedDescription: In recent years, the European car market has undergone a major change. Diesel engines, which for decades were synonymous with low consumption and high mileage, slowly gave way to hybrids. However, the question arises - have the hybrids really brought what was expected of them?

data.title: Raste tržište nekretnina u RS-u: Trebinje prestiže Banju Luku po cijenama stanova, kvadrat košta čak 7.000 KM
data.description: Tržište nekretnina u Republici Srpskoj (RS) nastavlja da bilježi rast cijena, a stan po "pristojnoj" cijeni postaje sve teže pronaći čak i u manjim gradovima. Dok je nekada Banja Luka bila ubjedljivo najskuplja i najtraženija, danas joj ozbiljno parira Trebinje gdje je potražnja eksplodirala.
data.translatedTitle: The real estate market in RS is growing: Trebinje overtakes Banja Luka in terms of apartment prices, a square meter costs as much as 7,000 KM
data.translatedDescription: The real estate market in Republika Srpska (RS) continues to record price growth, and an apartment at a "decent" price is becoming increasingly difficult to find even in smaller cities. While Banja Luka used to be by far the most expensive and most sought after, today it is seriously rivaled by Trebinje, where demand has exploded.

data.description: Sukobi između navijača i policije širom Francuske doveli su do više od 400 hapšenja nakon pobjede PSG-a u finalu Lige prvaka protiv Arsenala.
data.translatedTitle: Riots in Paris after the Champions League final: More than 400 arrested, fierce clashes with the police broke out
data.translatedDescription: Clashes between fans and police across France led to more than 400 arrests following PSG's Champions League final win against Arsenal.

data.title: Flamingosi se vraćaju u Venecijansku lagunu, ekolozi bilježe rast populacije i oporavak staništa
data.description: Sve veći broj flamingosa u Venecijanskoj laguni privlači pažnju naučnika i ekologa, koji njihov dolazak smatraju pokazateljem poboljšanja stanja lokalnog ekosistema i uspjeha projekata obnove močvarnih područja.
data.translatedTitle: Flamingos are returning to the Venetian lagoon, ecologists are recording population growth and habitat recovery
data.translatedDescription: The increasing number of flamingos in the Venetian lagoon is attracting the attention of scientists and ecologists, who consider their arrival an indicator of the improvement of the state of the local ecosystem and the success of wetland restoration projects.

data.title: Najdublji upad u 26 godina: Izraelske trupe zauzele krstašku utvrdu u Libanu, vojska nadire ka velikim gradovima
data.description: Izraelske trupe zauzele su stratešku planinu na kojoj se nalazi krstaška tvrđava Beaufort na jugu Libana. Riječ je o njihovom najdubljem upadu na teritoriju ove zemlje u više od četvrt vijeka, saopštila je izraelska vojska u nedjelju.
data.translatedTitle: The deepest incursion in 26 years: Israeli troops occupy a Crusader fortress in Lebanon, the army advances towards major cities
data.translatedDescription: Israeli troops have captured the strategic mountain on which the Crusader fortress of Beaufort is located in southern Lebanon. This is their deepest incursion into the territory of this country in more than a quarter of a century, the Israeli army announced on Sunday.

data.title: Ove namirnice mogu utjecati na proizvodnju kolagena i doprinose ljepšem izgledu vaše kože
data.description: Kolagen je jedan od najvažnijih proteina u ljudskom tijelu, jer ima ključnu ulogu u očuvanju strukture kože, kostiju, mišića, tetiva, ligamenata i drugih vezivnih tkiva.
data.translatedTitle: These foods can affect the production of collagen and contribute to a more beautiful appearance of your skin
data.translatedDescription: Collagen is one of the most important proteins in the human body, because it plays a key role in preserving the structure of the skin, bones, muscles, tendons, ligaments and other connective tissues.

data.translatedDescription: Last night, the American rapper Kanye West held a concert at the Ataturk Olympic Stadium in Istanbul, where, according to the organizers and local media, the concert was attended by more than 118,000 visitors.

data.title: Ruski grad obavio gusti crni dim: Ukrajinci pogodili rafineriju u Saratovu, objavljeni snimci
data.description: Ukrajinska vojska je dronovima kasno uveče 30. maja izvela napad na rafineriju u ruskom gradu Saratov, a na društvenim mrežama pojavile su se fotografije i videosnimci na kojima se vide plamen i gust crni dim iznad rafinerije.
data.translatedTitle: A Russian city was enveloped in thick black smoke: Ukrainians hit a refinery in Saratov, published footage
data.translatedDescription: The Ukrainian army carried out an attack on a refinery in the Russian city of Saratov with drones late at night on May 30, and photos and videos showing flames and thick black smoke above the refinery appeared on social networks.

data.title: Fidan najavio da će Turska i Japan zajedno proizvoditi bespilotne letjelice, na pomolu novi tehnološki savez
data.description: Ministar vanjskih poslova Turske Hakan Fidan izjavio je jučer u Istanbulu da Ankara vidi veliki prostor za saradnju s Japanom u razvoju i proizvodnji bespilotnih letjelica.
data.translatedTitle: Fidan announced that Turkey and Japan will jointly produce unmanned aerial vehicles, a new technological alliance is on the horizon
data.translatedDescription: Turkey's Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said yesterday in Istanbul that Ankara sees great scope for cooperation with Japan in the development and production of unmanned aerial vehicles.

data.title: "Zavlači" li Trump Iran? Američki lider mijenja ploču i traži drastično oštriji sporazum s Iranom
data.description: Američki predsjednik Donald Trump poslao je Iranu revidiranu verziju predloženog mirovnog okvira koji sada sadrži strožije uslove, a sve s ciljem pojačavanja pritiska na Teheran da prihvati prekid vatre i okonča rat, prenose američki mediji.
data.translatedTitle: Is Trump "dragging" Iran? The American leader changes the table and demands a drastically tougher agreement with Iran
data.translatedDescription: US President Donald Trump has sent Iran a revised version of the proposed peace framework, which now contains stricter conditions, all with the aim of increasing pressure on Tehran to accept a ceasefire and end the war, according to US media.

data.title: Barbir senzacionalno savladao Jokera u Beogradu, Stošić brutalno nokautirao Hardyja
data.description: U Beogradskoj Areni sinoć je održan borilački spektakl FNC 31, koji je donio čak 11 mečeva i dvije borbe za pojas prvaka.
data.translatedTitle: Barbier sensationally defeated Joker in Belgrade, Stošić brutally knocked out Hardy
data.translatedDescription: The FNC 31 martial arts spectacle was held in Belgrade Arena last night, which brought as many as 11 matches and two fights for the championship belt.

data.title: Od zloglasnog radijskog poziva do Tomašice: Sistematsko istrebljenje i zločinačka namjera brisanja naroda
data.description: Danas se obilježava 31. maj – Dan bijelih traka. Ovo je dan sjećanja na žrtve stravičnih zločina počinjenih u Prijedoru i dolini Sane, kada je 1992. godine nesrpskom stanovništvu naređeno da svoje kuće obilježe bijelim čaršafima, a oko ruku vežu bijele trake.
data.translatedTitle: From the infamous radio call to Tomašica: Systematic extermination and the criminal intent to wipe out peoples
data.translatedDescription: Today is May 31 - White Ribbon Day. This is the day of remembrance for the victims of the terrible crimes committed in Prijedor and the Sana Valley, when in 1992 the non-Serb population was ordered to mark their houses with white sheets and tie white ribbons around their arms.

data.title: Spursi na krilima Wembanyame, nakon drame i majstorice, izborili NBA finale i sudar protiv Knicksa
data.description: San Antonio Spursi plasirali su se u NBA finale nakon što su u Oklahoma Cityju savladali Thunder rezultatom 111:103 u sedmoj utakmici finala Zapadne konferencije.
data.translatedTitle: Spurs on the wings of Wembanyama, after drama and masterwork, won the NBA finals and a clash against the Knicks
data.translatedDescription: The San Antonio Spurs advanced to the NBA Finals after defeating the Thunder in Oklahoma City with a score of 111:103 in the seventh game of the Western Conference Finals.

data.title: Zastrašujući slučaj: Muškarac prodao 1.200 paketa otrova ljudima koji su planirali samoubistvo, brojna su izvršena
data.description: Kenneth Law (60) priznao je krivicu po 14 tačaka optužnice za pomaganje pri samoubistvima u Kanadi, nakon što je putem interneta prodavao otrovne hemikalije osobama koje je upoznao na forumima posvećenim samoubistvu.
data.translatedTitle: Terrifying case: A man sold 1,200 packages of poison to people who planned suicide, many were executed
data.translatedDescription: Kenneth Law, 60, pleaded guilty to 14 counts of aiding and abetting suicide in Canada after selling toxic chemicals online to people he met on suicide forums.

data.title: JD Vance iznervirao Trumpovu "ledenu ženu": Wiles zatražila da uzme pauzu od društvenih mreža jer se svađao
data.description: Šefica kabineta predsjednika Sjedinjenih Američkih Država Donalda Trumpa, Susie Wiles, je imala okršaj s JD Vanceom, potpredsjednikom SAD-a, a razlog je njegova aktivnost na društvenim mrežama.
data.translatedTitle: JD Vance pissed off Trump's 'ice woman': Wiles asked to take a break from social media because he was arguing
data.translatedDescription: The chief of staff of the President of the United States of America, Donald Trump, Susie Wiles, had a clash with JD Vance, the vice president of the United States, and the reason is his activity on social networks.

data.title: Problemi za porodicu Trump: Otvaranje gradilišta u Albaniji se pretvorilo u sukob osiguranja i demonstranata
data.description: Firma povezana s kćerkom predsjednika Sjedinjenih Američkih Država Donalda Trumpa, Ivankom Trump, i njenim suprugom Jaredom Kushnerom je počela izgradnju luksuznog odmarališta u Albaniji, ali je na otvaranju gradilišta došlo do haosa.
data.translatedTitle: Trouble for the Trump family: The opening of a construction site in Albania turned into a clash between security and protesters
data.translatedDescription: A company associated with the daughter of the President of the United States of America, Donald Trump, Ivanka Trump, and her husband, Jared Kushner, has begun construction of a luxury resort in Albania, but there was chaos at the opening of the construction site.

data.title: NATO od švedskog otoka planira napraviti tvrđavu: Gotland bi u slučaju sukoba s Rusijom mogao biti ključan
data.description: NATO ubrzano radi na jačanju odbrane švedskog ostrva Gotland u Baltičkom moru, koje vojni planeri sve više smatraju jednom od najizloženijih i strateški najvažnijih linija odbrane protiv Rusije, piše Politico.
data.translatedTitle: NATO plans to turn a Swedish island into a fortress: Gotland could be crucial in the event of a conflict with Russia
data.translatedDescription: NATO is rapidly working to strengthen the defenses of the Swedish island of Gotland in the Baltic Sea, which military planners increasingly consider one of the most exposed and strategically important lines of defense against Russia, writes Politico.

data.title: Rusija optužila Ukrajinu za napad na nuklearnu elektranu, Medvedev zaprijetio udarom na članice NATO-a
data.description: Rusija je optužila snage ukrajinske vojske da su dronom gađali nuklearnu elektranu Zaporožje, koja se nalazi pod kontrolom ruskih snaga u Ukrajini.
data.translatedTitle: Russia accused Ukraine of attacking the nuclear power plant, Medvedev threatened to attack NATO members
data.translatedDescription: Russia has accused Ukrainian military forces of using a drone to target the Zaporozhye nuclear power plant, which is under the control of Russian forces in Ukraine.

data.title: Glumac Edin Hasanović nosio značku s palestinskom zastavom na dodjeli Njemačkih filmskih nagrada
data.description: Glumac Edin Hasanović nosio značku s palestinskom zastavom na dodjeli Njemačkih filmskih nagrada. I sam je višestruki dobitnik ove nagrade, a sada je bio u ulozi voditelja događaja.
data.translatedTitle: Actor Edin Hasanović wore a badge with the Palestinian flag at the German Film Awards
data.translatedDescription: Actor Edin Hasanović wore a badge with the Palestinian flag at the German Film Awards. He himself is a multiple winner of this award, and now he was in the role of host of the event.

data.title: Procurio snimak sa sastanka: Čović ponovo vrijeđao Lučića i pitao se zbog čega Petorka "skida" glasove HDZ-u
data.description: Predsjednik HDZ-a Dragan Čović je iznio niz uvreda i teških kvalifikacija na račun kandidata stranaka Petorke za člana Predsjedništva Bosne i Hercegovine Zdenka Lučića na sastanku predsjedništva Hrvatskog narodnog sabora (HNS), održanog prethodne sedmice.
data.translatedTitle: Leaked footage from the meeting: Čović insulted Lučić again and wondered why Petorka was "removing" votes from HDZ
data.translatedDescription: HDZ President Dragan Čović presented a series of insults and harsh qualifications against the candidate of the Five parties for the Presidency of Bosnia and Herzegovina, Zdenko Lučić, at the meeting of the Presidency of the Croatian National Assembly (HNS), held last week.

data.title: Proizvođač kreme za intimnu njegu muškaraca tuži Brada Pitta, traže odštetu od 75.000 dolara
data.description: Holivudski glumac Brad Pitt našao se u središtu neobičnog pravnog spora nakon što je protiv njegove kozmetičke kompanije podnesena tužba zbog navodne povrede zaštitnog znaka.
data.translatedTitle: The manufacturer of a men's intimate care cream is suing Brad Pitt, seeking $75,000 in damages
data.translatedDescription: Hollywood actor Brad Pitt has found himself at the center of an unusual legal dispute after his cosmetics company was sued for alleged trademark infringement.

data.title: Vaso Bakočević šokantno nokautiran u Beogradu, hrvatski borac na debiju jednim udarcem ugasio "Psiha"
data.description: Jedna od najvećih i najpopularnijih zvijezda regionalne borilačke scene, Vaso "Psiho" Bakočević, doživio je težak poraz na FNC 31 spektaklu u Beogradu. Njega je u MMA debiju savladao hrvatski borac Hrvoje Sep.
data.translatedTitle: Vaso Bakočević was shockingly knocked out in Belgrade, the Croatian fighter on his debut extinguished "Psycho" with one punch
data.translatedDescription: One of the biggest and most popular stars of the regional martial arts scene, Vaso "Psiho" Bakočević, suffered a heavy defeat at the FNC 31 spectacle in Belgrade. He was defeated in his MMA debut by Croatian fighter Hrvoje Sep.

data.title: Predstavljamo grupu "A" by MrBit: Meksiko se uzda u domaći teren, Son s Korejom želi veliki rezultat
data.description: Svjetsko prvenstvo 2026. godine će trajati od 11. juna do 19. jula, a portal Klix.ba će u seriji tekstova predstaviti sve grupe počevši s grupom A u kojoj se nalaze jedan od domaćina Meksiko, Južna Afrika, Južna Koreja te Češka Republika.
data.translatedTitle: Introducing group "A" by MrBit: Mexico is confident in its home field, Son wants a big result with Korea
data.translatedDescription: The 2026 World Cup will last from June 11 to July 19, and the Klix.ba portal will present all the groups in a series of articles, starting with Group A, which includes one of the hosts Mexico, South Africa, South Korea and the Czech Republic.

data.title: Misteriozna eksplozija potresla sjeveroistok Amerike, meteorolog tvrdi da je uzrok meteor
data.description: Zvuk eksplozije je potresao saveznu državu Massachusetts, na sjeveroistoku Sjedinjenih Američkih Država, a lokalni meteorolog tvrdi da je u pitanju eksplozija meteora.
data.translatedTitle: A mysterious explosion rocked the northeast of America, the meteorologist claims that the cause was a meteor
data.translatedDescription: The sound of the explosion shook the federal state of Massachusetts, in the northeast of the United States of America, and the local meteorologist claims that it was a meteor explosion.

data.title: Kako odabrati ljetnu posteljinu za hladan i udoban san bez znojenja
data.description: Ljetne noći mogu brzo postati neugodne jer vrućina i vlaga remete san, uzrokujući znojenje i buđenje. Stručnjaci za spavanje naglašavaju da odabir prave posteljine može imati značajan utjecaj na tjelesnu temperaturu i kvalitetu sna tokom vrućih mjeseci.
data.translatedTitle: How to choose summer bedding for a cool and comfortable sleep without sweating
data.translatedDescription: Summer nights can quickly become uncomfortable as the heat and humidity disrupt sleep, causing you to sweat and wake up. Sleep experts emphasize that choosing the right bedding can have a significant impact on body temperature and sleep quality during the hot months.

data.title: Few artists in Estonia find Spotify a good source of income
data.description: According to Mati Kaalep, CEO of the Estonian Authors' Society, Spotify streams still do not correlate with the compensation received, which means that in Estonia there are few artists for whom Spotify is a good revenue source.

data.title: Kaupo Meiel: A lone equestrian came to our town
data.description: Over the next 10–20 years, equestrian monuments should be erected across Estonia in every city, town, and village in Estonia. Worthy people would receive worthy monuments, and artists could earn money for their creative union, that has been driven into poverty by scammers, reflects Kaupo Meiel.

data.title: LUGEMISSOOVITUS ⟩ «Justnagu nooremale seltskonnale mõeldud kraam. Aga samas jäin ise huviga lugema»
data.description: Rahvusraamatukogu kultuurinõunik Karl Martin Sinijärv soovitab lugeda Adam Mireki raamatut «Sinu sisikond ja muu kraam ehk luubi all on inimkeha».
data.translatedTitle: RECOMMENDED READING ⟩ «Just like stuff for a younger crowd. But at the same time, I stayed reading with interest»
data.translatedDescription: Karl Martin Sinijärv, cultural advisor of the National Library, recommends reading Adam Mirek's book "Your guts and other stuff, or the human body under the magnifying glass".

data.title: PÜHAPÄEVA STUUDIO ⟩ Miks me oleme kurjad ja kurvad? Stuudios on Anna-Kaisa Oidermaa
data.description: Miks on nii, et isegi aasta kõige ilusamal ajal on paljud meist kurjad ja kurvad. Mida endaga ette võtta, et suudaks jälle elust rõõmu tunda ja mõnikord ka molutada, sellest räägime Pühapäeva stuudios kliinilise psühholoogi Anna-Kaisa Oidermaaga.
data.translatedTitle: SUNDAY STUDIO ⟩ Why are we mean and sad? Anna-Kaisa Oidermaa is in the studio
data.translatedDescription: Why is it that even at the most beautiful time of the year, many of us are mean and sad. What to do with yourself in order to be able to enjoy life again and sometimes to beg, that's what we're talking about in the Pühäpää studio with clinical psychologist Anna-Kaisa Oidermaa.

data.title: 3 ootamatut asja, mis võivad kodus wifi-ühendust häirida
data.description: Koduse interneti kvaliteet ei sõltu alati ainult teenusepakkujast – sageli mängib palju suuremat rolli see, kuhu ruuter on paigutatud ja millised seadmed seda ümbritsevad.
data.translatedTitle: 3 unexpected things that can interfere with Wi-Fi at home
data.translatedDescription: The quality of home internet does not always depend only on the service provider - often, where the router is placed and what devices surround it play a much bigger role.

data.title: Trump: Iraan on nõustunud tuumarelvadest loobuma
data.description: USA president Donald Trump ütles, et on saanud Iraanilt tagatise, et riik ei arenda tuumarelvi; samal ajal ilmusid teated, et ta on saatnud Teheranile tagasi karmima rahuettepaneku.
data.translatedTitle: Trump: Iran has agreed to give up nuclear weapons
data.translatedDescription: US President Donald Trump said he had received assurances from Iran that the country would not develop nuclear weapons; at the same time, reports surfaced that he had sent back a tougher peace proposal to Tehran.

data.title: Tartu meistritiitlini vedanud Karl Johan Lips liitub eestlastele tuttava Poola klubiga
data.description: Tartu Ülikool Maks & Mooritsa meeskonnaga Eesti meistritiitli võitnud Karl Johan Lips liitub järgmiseks hooajaks Poola kõrgliigaklubi Ostrówi Wielkopolski Staliga, kus on varemgi eestlased mänginud.
data.translatedTitle: Karl Johan Lips, who led Tartu to the championship, will join the Polish club familiar to Estonians
data.translatedDescription: Karl Johan Lips, who won the Estonian championship with the University of Tartu Maks & Mooritsa team, will join the Polish Premier League club Ostrów Wielkopolski Stal for the next season, where Estonians have played before.

data.title: Metsavana: kuni jaanipäevani on ilm nagu Ameerika mäed, tuleb natuke äikest ja natuke päikest
data.description: Kuna kevad oli veniv ja jahedapoolne, tuleb ka suve esimene pool jahedam, arvab Metsavana. Jaanipäeva ennustab ta kuiva ja päikesepaistelisena ning juuli tulevat kõige soojem suvekuu.
data.translatedTitle: Metsavana: until Midsummer, the weather will be like the American mountains, there will be some thunder and some sun
data.translatedDescription: Since the spring was long and on the cool side, the first half of the summer will also be cooler, Metsavana thinks. He predicts Midsummer to be dry and sunny, and July will be the warmest summer month.

data.title: RAINER SAKS ⟩ Ukrainlased tabasid kahte Venemaa sõjalennukit
data.description: Ukraina presidendi teatel kõnelesid Ukraina partnerid Venemaaga manitsevalt uue suurema Vene armee õhulöögi teemal, mida Venemaa Ukraina luure andmetel ette valmistas. Sellele vaatamata hoiatas Ukraina president eile ukrainlasi, et uue õhurünnaku oht on ikkagi suur. Ukraina president ei nimeta, kes partneritest sellel teemal Venemaa esindajatega suhtles, kuid vaevalt et peale USA keegi selles rollis võis esineda, kirjutab julgeolekuekspert Rainer Saks.
data.translatedTitle: RAINER SAKS ⟩ Ukrainians shot down two Russian warplanes
data.translatedDescription: According to the President of Ukraine, Ukraine's partners had admonishing talks with Russia about a new major airstrike by the Russian army, which Russia was preparing according to Ukrainian intelligence. Despite this, the President of Ukraine warned Ukrainians yesterday that the risk of a new air attack is still high. The president of Ukraine does not name which of the partners communicated with Russian representatives on this topic, but it is unlikely that anyone other than the US could have acted in this role, writes security expert Rainer Saks.

data.title: Tööpuudus Soomes kasvab
data.description: Soomes oli aprilli lõpus 333 200 registreeritud töötut, mis on 20 000 inimese ehk kuue protsendi võrra rohkem kui aasta tagasi, kirjutab Yle.
data.translatedTitle: Unemployment in Finland is increasing
data.translatedDescription: There were 333,200 registered unemployed in Finland at the end of April, which is 20,000 people or six percent more than a year ago, writes Yle.

data.title: KOOLILEGEND ⟩ Õpetajad ei ütle «mine kooliõe juurde», vaid «mine Galina juurde»
data.description: Mitmed karjäärinõustajad soovitavad töökohta iga teatud perioodi tagant vahetada, kuid Tallinna Kunstigümnaasiumi kooliõde Galina Duminica on ehe näide sellest, kuidas missioon teisi aidata hoiab inimest ühes kohas. Rohkem kui 40 aasta pikkuse staažiga meedik tõestab, et pühendumus kogukonnale kaalub üles vajaduse ametiredelil tormata.
data.translatedTitle: SCHOOL LEGEND ⟩ Teachers don't say "go to the school nurse", but "go to Galina"
data.translatedDescription: Many career counselors recommend changing jobs every certain period, but Galina Duminica, a school nurse at the Tallinn Art Gymnasium, is a prime example of how the mission to help others keeps a person in one place. A medic with more than 40 years of experience proves that commitment to the community outweighs the need to rush up the career ladder.

data.title: PUNKTITABEL ⟩ Liider Evans kasvatas hiilgava esitusega jõuliselt edu
data.description: Autoralli MM-sarja hooaeg jõudis poole peale. Seitsmenda, viimase asfaldietapi võitis kindlalt üldliider Elfyn Evans, kelle edu näib nüüd päris soliidne. Samas peab tema hakkama kruusal nüüd teid lahti lükkama.
data.translatedTitle: POINTS TABLE ⟩ Leader Evans built up a strong lead with a brilliant performance
data.translatedDescription: The season of the World Rally Championship reached the halfway point. Overall leader Elfyn Evans won the seventh, the last asphalt stage, whose success now seems quite solid. At the same time, he has to start pushing you away from the gravel now.

data.title: BLOGI ⟩ Jaapani ralli: hooaja viimasel asfaldietapil säras Evans, Toyotale nelikvõit
data.description: Autoralli MM-sarja seitsmendal, hooaja viimasel asfaldietapil Jaapanis polnud vastast Elfyn Evansile. Toyotale kindlustasid nelikvõidu Sebastien Ogier, Sami Pajari ja Takamoto Katsuta. Ford Fiesta probleemide tõttu poodiumikohalt viiendaks langenud Romet Jürgensoni näitas WRC2 konkurentsis head kiirust. Postimees vahendas võistlust otseblogis.
data.translatedTitle: BLOG ⟩ Rally Japan: Evans shined on the final asphalt stage of the season, Toyota's quadruple victory
data.translatedDescription: There was no opponent for Elfyn Evans on the seventh, last asphalt stage of the season in Japan. Sebastien Ogier, Sami Pajari and Takamoto Katsuta secured four victories for Toyota. Romet Jürgenson, who fell from the podium to fifth due to problems with his Ford Fiesta, showed good speed in the WRC2 competition. Postimees mediated the competition on a live blog.

data.title: «Tean, et olen paksuks läinud!» USA lauljatar ei jäänud kriitikutele vastust võlgu
data.description: 36-aastane USA lauljatar Bebe Rexha väisas hiljuti Ameerika muusikaauhindade galat ja jäi ette kriitikutele.
data.translatedTitle: "I know I've gotten fat!" The US singer did not owe the critics an answer
data.translatedDescription: The 36-year-old American singer Bebe Rexha recently graced the American Music Awards gala and was ahead of the critics.

data.title: TEADLASTE UUS AVASTUS ⟩ Paljudel igapäevases kasutuses olev käsimüügiravim suurendab dementsuse riski
data.description: Teadlased on tänaseks teinud uue avastuse: ravimil, mida miljonid inimesed iga päev kasutavad, võib olla seos dementsusega. Miks ja kuidas see dementsust põhjustab?
data.translatedTitle: NEW DISCOVERY BY SCIENTISTS ⟩ An over-the-counter drug used by many on a daily basis increases the risk of dementia
data.translatedDescription: Scientists have made a new discovery today: a drug used by millions of people every day may have a link to dementia. Why and how does it cause dementia?

data.title: Tiitlikaistja langes Prantsusmaa lahtistel konkurentsist
data.description: Tiitlikaitsja ameeriklanna Coco Gauff on järjekordne suurnimi, kes pidi Prantsusmaa lahtistelt lahkuma, olles kolmandas ringis kaotanud Austria tennisistile Anastasia Potapovale 6:4, 6:7 (1:7), 4:6.
data.translatedTitle: The defending champion fell out of contention at the French Open
data.translatedDescription: Defending champion American Coco Gauff is another big name who had to leave the French Open, having lost to Austrian tennis player Anastasia Potapova 6:4, 6:7 (1:7), 4:6 in the third round.

data.title: FOTO ⟩ Tundmatu laskja valis sihtmärgiks Tallinna elanike autod
data.description: Lasnamäel elav Vladimir alustas nädalat ebameeldiva avastusega: Kivila tänava maja hoovis seisnud tema naise auto esiklaasis haigutas kuuliauk. Varsti selgus, et sama oli juhtunud ka teistega.
data.translatedTitle: PHOTO ⟩ The unknown shooter targeted the cars of Tallinn residents
data.translatedDescription: Vladimir, who lives in Lasnamäe, started the week with an unpleasant discovery: a bullet hole gaped in the windshield of his wife's car parked in the yard of the house on Kivila street. It soon became clear that the same thing had happened to others.

data.title: Julge eksperiment: Hiina uurib inimese paljunemise võimalikkust kosmoses
data.description: Kas inimene suudab kunagi kosmoses järglasi saada? Hiina teadlased otsivad sellele küsimusele vastust eksperimendiga, mis võib tulevikus määrata Kuu ja Marsi koloniseerimise võimalikkuse. Tiangongi kosmosejaamas uuriti esimest korda inimese tüvirakkudest loodud tehisembrüote arengut mikrogravitatsioonis.
data.translatedTitle: Bold experiment: China is investigating the possibility of human reproduction in space
data.translatedDescription: Will humans ever be able to have offspring in space? Chinese scientists are looking for an answer to this question with an experiment that may determine the possibility of colonizing the Moon and Mars in the future. At the Tiangong space station, the development of artificial embryos created from human stem cells in microgravity was studied for the first time.

data.title: Ukraina kaitsevägi eitab Zaporižžja tuumajaama ründamist
data.description: Ukraina kaitsevägi eitas laupäeval Vene allikate levitatud väiteid, mille kohaselt olevat Ukraina droon rünnanud Zaporižžja tuumaelektrijaama rajatisi vahendas Ukrinform.
data.translatedTitle: Ukraine's defense forces deny attacking the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
data.translatedDescription: On Saturday, the Defense Forces of Ukraine denied the claims spread by Russian sources, according to which a Ukrainian drone attacked the facilities of the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, Ukrinform reported.

data.title: Ukrainlanna kritiseeris Prantsusmaa lahtistel teravalt Venemaa tennisiste
data.description: Prantsusmaa lahtistel mängiv ukrainlanna Oleksandra Oliynykova ütles, et ei saa vaikida, kui inimesi tapetakse ning jätkas Venemaa tennisistide teravat kritiseerimist, kuna nad ei mõista hukka sõda tema riigis.
data.translatedTitle: The Ukrainian woman sharply criticized the Russian tennis players at the French Open
data.translatedDescription: Ukrainian Oleksandra Oliynykova, playing at the French Open, said she could not remain silent when people were killed and continued her sharp criticism of Russian tennis players for not condemning the war in her country.

data.title: ILU HIND ⟩ Marilyn Monroe figuuri saladus oli dieet, mida tänapäeva arstid kunagi ei soovitaks
data.description: 1. juunil on 100. sünniaastapäev Marilyn Monroel – popkultuuri superstaaril, kelle liivakellafiguur ja blond soeng on dikteerinud ilustandardeid juba terve sajandi. 1962. aastal traagiliselt lahkunud Marilyni kujutatakse kui glamuurset Hollywoodi diivat, kes võttis šampanjavanne ja sõi voodis šokolaadi. Särava fassaadi taga oli peidus aga hoopis teistsugune naine.
data.translatedTitle: THE PRICE OF BEAUTY ⟩ The secret to Marilyn Monroe's figure was a diet that modern doctors would never recommend
data.translatedDescription: June 1st is the 100th birthday of Marilyn Monroe, the pop culture superstar whose hourglass figure and blonde hairdo have dictated beauty standards for a century. Marilyn, who died tragically in 1962, is portrayed as a glamorous Hollywood diva who took champagne baths and ate chocolate in bed. But behind the shiny facade was a completely different woman.

data.translatedDescription: On Saturday, five traffic accidents with casualties took place in Estonia, in which a total of seven people were injured and one died.

data.title: Tubakavaba päev: kas on aeg rääkida hoopis nikotiinivabast päevast?
data.description: Suitsetamise levimus on paljudes riikides, nagu ka Eestis, viimastel kümnenditel oluliselt langenud.
data.translatedTitle: Tobacco-free day: is it time to talk about nicotine-free day instead?
data.translatedDescription: The prevalence of smoking has decreased significantly in many countries, as well as in Estonia, in recent decades.

data.title: Sten Priinits unistab olümpiapiletist, kuigi vanus ütleb midagi muud: see on lihtsalt nii ebareaalne asi, mida teha
data.description: Eesti meeste epeevehklemise esinumber Sten Priinits tegi poolteist aastat tagasi elumuutuse ja kolis koos perega Luksemburgi. Seal teenib ta leiba vehklemistreenerina, kuid saab selle kõrvalt jätkata tipptasemel vehklemisega. 38-aastase Haapsalust pärit Priinitsa suur eesmärk on läbida üliraske valiksõel 2028. aasta Los Angelese olümpiale ning enne seda noppida individuaalne tiitlivõistluste medal.
data.translatedTitle: Sten Priinits dreams of an Olympic ticket, although age says otherwise: it's just such an unrealistic thing to do
data.translatedDescription: Estonian men's epee number one, Sten Priinits, made a life change a year and a half ago and moved to Luxembourg with his family. There he earns his living as a fencing coach, but can continue fencing at the highest level on the side. The big goal of 38-year-old Priinitsa from Haapsalu is to pass the extremely difficult selection screen for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics and before that to pick up an individual title competition medal.

data.title: Klaipėdoje prie daugiabučio namo sudegė biotualetas, įtariamas padegimas
data.description: Klaipėdoje prie daugiabučio namo kilus gaisrui sudegė biotualetas, taip pat apdegė pastato siena.
data.translatedTitle: In Klaipėda, a bio-toilet burned down near an apartment building, arson is suspected
data.translatedDescription: In Klaipėda, a fire broke out near an apartment building, and a bio-toilet burned down, as well as the wall of the building.

data.title: Kaune pavogtas „Toyota RAV4“ automobilis rastas po pusvalandžio
data.description: Kaune iš gyvenamojo namo kiemo pavogtas automobilis buvo surastas praėjus maždaug pusvalandžiui po vagystės pastebėjimo, sekmadienį pranešė Policijos departamentas.
data.translatedTitle: The stolen Toyota RAV4 car in Kaunas was found half an hour later
data.translatedDescription: A car stolen from the yard of a residential house in Kaunas was found about half an hour after the theft was noticed, the Police Department reported on Sunday.

data.title: Nepaisant Minsko kalbų, Lietuva negavo prašymų grąžinti Šiauliuose perlaidojamus sovietų karius
data.description: Nepaisant Minsko svarstymų, Lietuva negavo prašymų grąžinti Šiauliuose perlaidojamų sovietų karių palaikus, tuo metu miesto meras sako, kad tokio prašymo nė nesvarstytų, nors ir pripažįsta, kad idėja turi logikos.
data.translatedTitle: Despite the Minsk speeches, Lithuania did not receive requests to return the Soviet soldiers buried in Šiauliai
data.translatedDescription: Despite the discussions in Minsk, Lithuania did not receive requests to return the remains of Soviet soldiers buried in Šiauliai, at that time the mayor of the city said that he would not even consider such a request, although he admits that the idea has logic.

data.title: Dzūkijoje – paauglė prieš policininkę: po susirėmimo pareigūnei prireikė medikų
data.description: Buvo gautas pranešimas iš Krokialaukio, kad viena paauglė rėkauja, spardo automobilius, elgiasi neadekvačiai. Sulaikymo metu nepilnametė pasipriešino pareigūnei, pastarajai prireikė medikų. Paauglė sutramdyta, bet areštinės išvengė atsižvelgiant į jos vaikišką amžių.
data.translatedTitle: In Dzūkija - a teenage girl against a policewoman: after the clash, the officer needed medical attention
data.translatedDescription: A report was received from Krokialaukis that a teenage girl was screaming, kicking cars and behaving inappropriately. During the arrest, the minor resisted the officer, the latter required medical attention. The teenager was restrained, but was not arrested due to her young age.

data.title: „Kaune vaikšto vyras, rankoje laiko ginklą“: toks skambutis 112 sukėlė ir ginkluotas tarnybas
data.description: Įtariamasis, pas kurį rastas ir paimtas „airsoft“ tipo pistoletas, neblaivus (2,74 prom.) uždarytas į areštinę.
data.translatedTitle: "A man is walking in Kaunas, holding a gun in his hand": such a call to 112 also triggered the armed services
data.translatedDescription: The suspect, who was found and seized with an "airsoft" pistol, was intoxicated (2.74) and was taken into custody.

data.title: Pareigūnai įspėja dėl Baltarusijos panaudojimo kaip placdarmo naujam Rusijos puolimui Ukrainoje
data.description: Daugiau nei prieš ketverius metus autoritarinis Baltarusijos prezidentas Aliaksandras Lukašenka leido savo ilgametei sąjungininkei Rusijai pasinaudoti šalies teritorija invazijai į Ukrainą. Dabar Kyjivo pareigūnai įspėja, kad A. Lukašenka gali vėl leisti savo šaliai tapti placdarmu naujoms Kremliaus pajėgų atakoms.
data.translatedTitle: Officials warn of using Belarus as a springboard for a new Russian offensive in Ukraine
data.translatedDescription: More than four years ago, the authoritarian president of Belarus, Alexander Lukashenko, allowed his long-time ally Russia to use the country's territory to invade Ukraine. Now officials in Kyiv are warning that A. Lukashenka may once again allow his country to become a springboard for new attacks by Kremlin forces.

data.title: Karas Ukrainoje. „The Telegraph“: drono smūgis Rumunijoje pakėlė Putino karą su Europa į naują pavojingą lygį
data.description: Naujausias žinias apie karą Ukrainoje skaitykite žemiau.
data.translatedTitle: War in Ukraine. The Telegraph: Drone strike in Romania has taken Putin's war with Europe to a dangerous new level
data.translatedDescription: Read the latest news about the war in Ukraine below.

data.title: Viešas policijos vadovo kalbas dėl lėšų poreikio kitiems metams ministras vadina politikavimu
data.description: Policijos generalinio komisaro viešai išsakytą pareiškimą, jog Vidaus reikalų ministerijos bus prašoma kitų metų biudžete numatyti papildomą finansavimą, pastarosios vadovas Vladislavas Kondratovičius vadina politikavimu.
data.translatedTitle: The minister calls the police chief's public speeches about the need for funds for next year politicking
data.translatedDescription: The head of the latter, Vladislavas Kondratovičius, calls the statement made publicly by the Commissioner General of the Police that the Ministry of the Interior will be asked to provide additional funding in the next year's budget, politicking.

data.title: Donaldas Trumpas: Iranas sutiko nekurti branduolinio ginklo
data.description: JAV prezidentas Donaldas Trumpas (Donaldas Trampas) pareiškė užsitikrinęs Irano garantijas, kad šalis nekurs branduolinio ginklo, žiniasklaidai paskelbus, jog Teheranui jis išsiuntė griežtesnį taikos pasiūlymą.
data.translatedTitle: Donald Trump: Iran has agreed not to build a nuclear weapon
data.translatedDescription: US President Donald Trump has said he has secured assurances from Iran that the country will not build a nuclear weapon, after media reports said he had sent a tougher peace offer to Tehran.

data.title: Anykščių rajone neblaivus vyras įtariamas padegęs gyvenamojo namo vidų
data.description: Anykščių rajone šeštadienio vakarą neblaivus vyras, įtariama, padegė gyvenamojo namo vidų.
data.translatedTitle: A drunken man is suspected of setting fire to the interior of a residential building in Anykščiai district
data.translatedDescription: In the Anykščiai district, a drunken man allegedly set fire to the interior of a residential house on Saturday evening.

data.title: Izraelio kariuomenė pranešė plečianti sausumos operacijas Libane į naujas teritorijas
data.description: Izraelio kariuomenė sekmadienį pranešė, kad jos pajėgos žengia į priekį Libane, vykdydamos išplėstas sausumos operacijas, kuriomis siekiama sustiprinti karines pozicijas šalies pietuose prieš Irano remiamą grupuotę „Hezbollah“.
data.translatedTitle: The Israeli military has announced that it is expanding its ground operations in Lebanon to new areas
data.translatedDescription: Israel's military said on Sunday that its forces were advancing in Lebanon as part of expanded ground operations aimed at strengthening military positions in the country's south against Iran-backed Hezbollah.

data.title: Zarasų rajone rasti galimai žmogaus kaulai
data.description: Vykdant kasimo darbus Zarasų rajone rasti galimai žmogaus kaulai, sekmadienį pranešė Utenos apskrities policija.
data.translatedTitle: Possible human bones found in Zarasai district
data.translatedDescription: Possible human bones were found during excavation work in the Zarasai district, Utena County Police reported on Sunday.

data.title: Pasienyje su Baltarusija apgręžti šeši neteisėti migrantai
data.description: Lietuvos pasienyje su Baltarusija praėjusią parą apgręžti šeši neteisėti migrantai, sekmadienį pranešė Valstybės sienos apsaugos tarnyba.
data.translatedTitle: Six illegal migrants were stopped at the border with Belarus
data.translatedDescription: The State Border Guard Service reported on Sunday that six illegal migrants were stopped at the Lithuanian border with Belarus.

data.title: Atkurti Irane iššaudytų raketų atsargas Amerikai prireiks laiko: Trumpui – dilema, ką daryti
data.description: Vašingtono „Strateginių ir tarptautinių studijų centras“ (CSIS) paskelbtoje analizėje teiga, kad JAV gynybos įmonėms prireiks mažiausiai trejų metų, kad atkurtų raketų atsargas, skirtas trims pagrindinėms ginklų sistemoms, plačiai naudojamoms kare su Iranu.
data.translatedTitle: It will take time for America to restore the stockpile of missiles fired in Iran: Trump - a dilemma of what to do
data.translatedDescription: An analysis published by Washington's Center for Strategic and International Studies (CSIS) claims that it will take at least three years for US defense companies to rebuild their stockpile of missiles for the three main weapons systems widely used in the war with Iran.

data.title: Nematoma Lietuva: dūminė troba ir vienišiaus Adomo gyvenimas

data.translatedTitle: Invisible Lithuania: the smoky farmhouse and the life of lonely Adam
data.translatedDescription: He had already covered five kilometers on his bicycle ride home from the shop through sandy fields, forest paths and a suspension bridge over a river. There are still a couple left until home. He goes shopping like this at least once a week.

data.translatedDescription: In Vilnius, in the concert hall of the Lithuanian State Symphony Orchestra, the ceremony of the national film awards "Silver Crane" will be held on Sunday.

data.translatedTitle: When the calendar summer comes, the heat will increase
data.translatedDescription: After cooler and rainier days, the weather in Lithuania will gradually improve. Although it will rain briefly in some, mainly eastern regions of the country on Sunday, the first day of the calendar summer should be dry and warm.

data.title: Kasparovas – apie JAV ir Kremliaus suokalbį: nematoma ranka išlaiko Trumpą ant vandens
data.description: Šachmatai išmokė buvusį pasaulio čempioną Garį Kasparovą, laikomą geriausiu pasaulio šachmatininku, apmąstyti kelis ėjimus į priekį, ieškoti priešininko silpnybių, matyti sistemą kaip visumą ir atskirti strategiją nuo triukšmo. Tokia pačia logika jis vadovaujasi žvelgdamas į politiką, kurios akiratyje – Rusija ir Vladimiras Putinas. Interviu leidiniui „Postimees“ G.Kasparovas pasidalijo savo žvilgsniu – į V.Putino silpnybes, Rusijos ateitį ir Europos perspektyvas.
data.translatedTitle: Kasparov - about the US-Kremlin collusion: an invisible hand keeps Trump afloat
data.translatedDescription: Chess taught former world champion Garry Kasparov, considered the best chess player in the world, to think several moves ahead, look for his opponent's weaknesses, see the system as a whole, and separate the strategy from the noise. He follows the same logic when looking at politics, with Russia and Vladimir Putin in his sights. In an interview with "Postimees" publication, G. Kasparov shared his view - on V. Putin's weaknesses, Russia's future and Europe's prospects.

data.title: US Forces Strike Cargo Ship Violating Iranian Blockade in Gulf of Oman
data.description: The US military executed a kinetic strike disabling the Gambia-flagged cargo vessel Lian Star in the Gulf of Oman after it repeatedly attempted to breach the US-led maritime blockade on Iran. US Central Command (CENTCOM) confirmed the incident occurred on May 29, noting the vessel ignored multiple warnings before an American aircraft fired an AGM-114 Hellfire missile directly into its engine room, leaving the ship adrift.

data.title: One Dead in Chernihiv Region Following Massive Russian Drone Assault
data.description: Early Sunday morning, Russian forces executed a massive aerial assault against Ukraine, deploying 229 combat and decoy drones from multiple directions, including Oryol, Kursk, and occupied Crimea. Ukrainian air defense forces successfully shot down or electronically suppressed 212 of the incoming UAVs across northern and eastern regions. Despite the high interception rate, 14 strike drones hit 11 locations, including a fatal strike in the Koriukivka district of the Chernihiv region.

data.title: Ukrainian Drone Blitz Sparks Fires at Russian Oil Depots and Key Rosneft Refinery
data.description: A coordinated Ukrainian drone offensive overnight Saturday-Sunday successfully breached Russian air defenses, striking critical energy infrastructure deep inside Russia. In the Saratov region, loitering munitions struck the strategic Saratov Oil Refinery (NFP) – a key Rosneft facility in the Volga region – igniting a fuel tank farm and reportedly damaging an isomerization unit.

data.title: Tusk Urges NATO to Act as Medvedev Warns ‘Peaceful Sleep of EU Citizens’ Is Over
data.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk has called on NATO allies to take growing Russian provocations seriously following a serious airspace violation in Romania and subsequent hostile rhetoric from Moscow. The diplomatic clash was triggered when a Russian drone crashed into a residential building in the Romanian city of Galați during an attack on Ukraine, injuring a woman and a child in the first such incident to cause casualties in a populated NATO area.

data.title: US Drone Warfare Shifts Focus to Rapid Scaling and Adaptive Tech Inspired by Ukraine
data.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stated that the US is fundamentally shifting its drone warfare strategy based on lessons learned from Ukraine, moving the focus from merely holding advanced systems to mastering rapid production and week-by-week technical adaptation. Hegseth highlighted that US President Donald Trump’s upcoming 2027 budget allocates an unprecedented $56 billion toward securing drone supremacy and integrating Ukrainian battlefield data.

data.title: Ukraine Rejects Russian Accusations of Drone Strike on Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant
data.description: Ukraine’s Southern Defense Forces have dismissed Kremlin accusations regarding an alleged Ukrainian drone strike on Power Unit No. 6 of the occupied Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant (ZNPP). Ukrainian military officials emphasized that the claims are a standard Russian information provocation designed to deflect international attention from Moscow’s tactical losses. The defense forces provided concrete technical and physical evidence showing that the Armed Forces of Ukraine do not possess the specific heavy fiber-optic drones required to cause such damage.

data.title: Poroshenko: Now Is the Time to Force Putin Into Peace
data.description: During the Black Sea Security Forum, Ukraine’s fifth president Petro Poroshenko spoke about the risks Ukraine faced in 2014 and the situation now which – in his view – is significantly better and could create an opportunity to force Russia into a peace agreement on Ukraine’s terms.

data.title: NATO Military Chief Reassures Washington on 5% GDP Spending Goal
data.description: The Chairman of the NATO Military Committee, Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone, stated that European allies are systematically expanding their military capabilities to meet an unprecedented defense spending target of 5% of individual member GDP. The Italian admiral’s remarks followed a blistering speech delivered by US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth at the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore, where the Pentagon chief heavily criticized European partners for emptying their militaries and leaving Western Europe desperately playing catch-up.
data.translatedTitle: NATO Military Chief Reassures Washington on 5% GDP Spending Goal
data.translatedDescription: The Chairman of the NATO Military Committee, Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone, stated that European allies are systematically expanding their military capabilities to meet an unprecedented defense spending target of 5% of individual member GDP. The Italian admiral’s remarks followed a blistering speech delivered by US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth at the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore, where the Pentagon chief heavily criticized European partners for emptying their militaries and leaving Western Europe desperately playing catch-up.

data.title: Iranian Missile Strike on US Base in Kuwait Wounds 5 and Destroys MQ-9 Reapers
data.description: Iran launched a short-range ballistic missile targeting the US Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait over the past 24 hours, directly threatening a pending peace agreement. Kuwaiti air defense systems intercepted the Iranian Fateh-110 missile, but falling debris wounded approximately five US service members and civilian contractors, while completely destroying one MQ-9 Reaper drone and severely damaging another.

data.title: Pentagon Promises US Will ‘Find a Way’ to Sustain Help for Ukraine’s Defense
data.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth strongly emphasized that the United States will find a concrete way to ensure Ukraine can continue defending itself against foreign aggression. While praising Ukraine’s high combat efficiency, Hegseth defended the administration’s strategy of successfully pushing European allies to step up their financial and material support.

data.title: Sky-High War Overheads Stagnate Russia’s Civilian Sectors
data.description: The staggering costs of Russia’s war against Ukraine have fractured the country’s domestic market into a distinct “dual economy,” characterized by an overheated military-industrial complex and severe stagnation across civilian sectors. Skyrocketing capital, labor, and product costs – compounded by aggressive tax hikes and increased internal borrowing – have paralyzed non-military industries as the initial boost from state defense spending dries up.

data.title: Zelensky Convenes High-Level Meeting to Set Defense Amid US Diplomacy Shift
data.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky  led a specialized strategic meeting on Saturday alongside key Ukrainian officials to coordinate the nation’s next diplomatic, military, and humanitarian steps. The session focused heavily on managing daily communications with US and European envoys regarding the delivery of advanced anti-ballistic air defense capabilities and finalizing bilateral drone production agreements, including an upcoming “drone deal” with the European Union.
data.translatedTitle: Zelensky Convenes High-Level Meeting to Set Defense Amid US Diplomacy Shift

The session focused heavily on managing daily communications with US and European envoys regarding the delivery of advanced anti-ballistic air defense capabilities and finalizing bilateral drone production agreements, including an upcoming “drone deal” with the European Union.

data.title: Estonia Deploys First Border Anti-Drone Monitoring Systems
data.description: Estonia has installed and activated its first stationary drone detection and monitoring systems across three key land border sectors in the southeastern region. Estonian Interior Minister Igor Taro confirmed that the deployment marks the beginning of a larger strategic initiative to build a comprehensive, nationwide anti-drone radar shield. To cover areas currently lacking stationary sensors, the Estonian Police and Border Guard Board will deploy newly acquired mobile tracking units while fast-tracking construction for the remaining border segments.

To cover areas currently lacking stationary sensors, the Estonian Police and Border Guard Board will deploy newly acquired mobile tracking units while fast-tracking construction for the remaining border segments.

data.title: Poland Becomes First Nation to Receive SAFE Loan Funding for Defense Procurement
data.description: Poland on Friday became the first country to receive its initial payout from the European Commission’s €150 billion Security Action For Europe (SAFE) loan program, securing €6.6 billion of its €43.7 billion total defense allocation. The funding release comes amid a massive domestic military acquisition drive, with Prime Minister Donald Tusk announcing a total of 40 active contracts valued at 100 billion zlotys (€23.6 billion) for national equipment including tactical trucks, tankers, and loitering munitions.
data.translatedTitle: Poland Becomes First Nation to Receive SAFE Loan Funding for Defense Procurement

data.title: Zelensky Enacts New Sanctions Aligning with EU Package
data.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky signed decrees on Saturday, enacting National Security and Defense Council decisions to synchronize Ukraine’s sanctions with the EU’s 20th package. The synchronized measures encompass 120 individuals and organizations, specifically adding 16 Russian citizens and 31 companies spanning Russia, Belarus, the UAE, Kyrgyzstan, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, and occupied territories.

data.title: EU to Unlock €16.4 Billion in Frozen Funds for Hungary Following Reforms
data.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen confirmed that the EU will unlock €16.4 billion of previously frozen recovery and cohesion funds for Hungary following successful policy reforms under the country’s new government. The financial package includes €10 billion from the Next Generation EU recovery fund, €4.2 billion in cohesion funds, and an additional €2.2 billion tied to the completion of academic freedom benchmarks.
data.translatedTitle: EU to Unlock €16.4 Billion in Frozen Funds for Hungary Following Reforms
data.translatedDescription: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen confirmed that the EU will unlock €16.4 billion of previously frozen recovery and cohesion funds for Hungary following successful policy reforms under the country’s new government. The financial package includes €10 billion from the Next Generation EU recovery fund, €4.2 billion in cohesion funds, and an additional €2.2 billion tied to the completion of academic freedom benchmarks.

data.title: Drone Sighting Forces Hour-Long Ground Stop at Munich Airport
data.description: Munich Airport completely halted all flight operations for over an hour on Saturday morning, May 30, following a suspected drone intrusion near the airfield. The security shutdown began around 9:00 a.m. local time after multiple pilots reported seeing a suspicious aerial object close to the facility, prompting Federal Police to completely close both runways.

data.title: Morning in Ukraine
data.description: The economy plays a pivotal role in a nation’s security, prosperity, growth, and just about everything else that matters. It is an aggregate of capital, labor, technologies, innovations, human capital, and ecology. If properly planned and managed, it will signal the dawn of a beautiful new “morning” in Ukraine. In the hands of an incompetent or uninterested political and economic faux “elite,” they will create chaos and waste.
