In the hands of an incompetent or uninterested political and economic faux “elite,” they will create chaos and waste.

data.title: Crimea Imposes Strict Gasoline Rationing as Land Corridor Collapse Sparks Fuel Crisis
data.description: The Russian occupation administration in Crimea has introduced strict fuel rationing across the peninsula, capping the sale of A-95 gasoline at 20 liters per day per person starting Saturday, May 30. The regional decree, announced by the Russian-installed head Sergei Aksyonov, mimics near-identical restrictions enforced earlier in occupied Sevastopol to curb widespread public panic.

data.title: Russian Double-Tap Strike on Zaporizhzhia Industrial Zone Kills One, Wounds Three
data.description: Russian forces executed a deadly “double-tap” drone assault against the industrial infrastructure of Zaporizhzhia on Saturday. Following an initial early morning strike that left a 40-year-old worker critically injured, Russian forces launched a repeat strike on the same facility, igniting a massive fire and damaging nearby residential buildings. One of the wounded victims later died in the hospital from severe trauma.

One of the wounded victims later died in the hospital from severe trauma.

data.title: NATO Condemns Russia After Drone Explodes at Romanian Apartment Block
data.description: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte sharply criticized Russia’s “reckless” behavior and pledged to defend every inch of alliance territory after a Russian strike drone entered Romanian airspace and exploded against a 10-story apartment block in Galați. The unprecedented impact tore through a top-floor flat, wounding a woman and a child.

data.title: Russia’s Oreshnik Missile Built 9 Years Ago with Local Parts
data.description: Ukrainian missile forensics experts have debunked key Kremlin claims regarding the “Oreshnik” intermediate-range ballistic missile, revealing that the weapon is nearly a decade old and contains exclusively Russian and Belarusian components. Presenting recovered electronic circuitry from a January 2026 strike on a gas depot in the Lviv region, analysts demonstrated that the missile was actually assembled in 2017 using components dated 2016 or earlier.

data.title: Ukraine Damages Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker and Feodosia Oil Terminal
data.description: The Unmanned Systems Forces (USF) of Ukraine executed a massive, coordinated deep-strike operation overnight into May 30, successfully striking 23 military targets and strategic facilities deep inside Russian territory and occupied regions. Long-range drones damaged a Russian shadow fleet oil tanker and the “Kurgannefteprodukt” oil depot in Taganrog.

data.title: Putin Claims War ‘Nearing Its End’ Based on Supposed Russian Advances
data.description: Speaking to state outlets on Friday, Russian President Vladimir Putin asserted that his analysis of the current battlefield situation indicates the war against Ukraine is approaching its final phase. Putin claimed that Russian forces are advancing across all operational directions, though he acknowledged that establishing a definitive timeline for the conclusion of hostilities remains impossible under active combat conditions.

data.title: The "Artificial Friction" Method: A Simple Way to Beat Smartphone Addiction
data.description: The problem of impulsive scrolling through social media and news feeds, which robs modern city dwellers of hours of productive time, has found a simple and effective solution. Behavioral psychologists from the University of Cambridge have published the results of a study on the mechanisms of habit formation, proposing a method called "artificial friction."
data.translatedTitle: The "Artificial Friction" Method: A Simple Way to Beat Smartphone Addiction
data.translatedDescription: The problem of impulsive scrolling through social media and news feeds, which robs modern city dwellers of hours of productive time, has found a simple and effective solution. data.title: How to Escape Digital Burnout Without a Radical Retreat
data.description: Modern humans have developed an amazing evolutionary skill: they can simultaneously read an analytical report, listen to TV news in the background, respond to voicemails or work notifications, chat with colleagues or family members, and grab a snack on the go. data.title: DSP o Maquiavélico Ganancioso
data.description: Guineenses, mais uma vez, venho para vos alertar sobre o perigo que Domingos Simões Pereira representa para a Guiné-Bissau. Faço esse alerta a todos os guineenses sem exceção que se encontre no país ou no estrangeiro, ao PAIGC em especial e na pessoa do Cipriano Cassamá em concreto. Alerta esse sobre o verdadeiro DSP, o verdadeiro espírito que move esse sujeito, o qual alguns ainda continuam a acreditar para não dizer adorar. Domingos Simões Pereira é um manipulador, um verdadeiro chantagista e calculista provavelmente, tipo de comportamento que ultrapassa o nível de psicopata. U m ambicioso desmedido, um verdadeiro criminoso que sabe como e quando cometer o crime. Ele jamais coabitaria não só com JOMAV, assim como com qualquer presidente que seria eleito, a não ser o que ele apoiou disfarçadamente. Isto porque ele tem sua própria agenda, e o PAIGC é simplesmente uma plataforma para sua concretização. DSP jamais coabitaria com JOMAV porque o seu candidato preferido era o Paulo Gomes e sempre será, o qual juntamente com Tchitchi vão delineando mecanismo de modo a serem os novos donos da Guiné-Bissau. Segundo eles este é um processo a médio prazo, e é preciso coragem e paciência para concretiza-lo. Ganhar o congresso não importa em que circunstância e ter novamente o partido na mão, é uma fase concluída em proveito deles, enquanto verdadeiros militantes do PAIGC estão a bater palmas. Depois dessa eleição legislativa, não importa o resultado, o Cipriano Cassama que se prepare a mala ou fica de bico fechado, pois o candidato preferido para o partido será o Paulo Gomes, e esse sim deve ter a voz dentro do partido. DSP é um ambicioso desmedido, nunca teve consideração por ninguém, JOMAV muito menos, o sujeito é um maquiavélico nato, Cipriano Casama será descartado quando menos esperar podes tomar a nota. Guineenses, falar do Paulo Gomes e Tchitchi é falar do MCCI e demais outras organizações e personalidades camufladas no nosso país. Esses dois indivíduos são os principais financiadores do MCCI e demais outras personalidades boca de aluguel na cidade de Bissau. O MCCI, Milícia idealizado por JBV e DSP, agora financiado e dirigido por "futuro triângulo do poder" ou seja, "DSP, Paulo Gomes e Tchitchi", têm 3 principais objectivos: 1º Perturbar a ordem pública em nome da cidadania, difamar e tentar descredibilizar qualquer que seja organizações ou indivíduos não alinhados ao triângulo, de modo a suportar suas caminhadas na busca do poder. 2º Caso se concretize o objectivo do triângulo, o papel da Milícia do MCCI passará a ser de vigilância constante a todos os adversários de modo a garantir falsa paz social e o poder de controlo. 3º Tentar ganhar credibilidade junto das organizações internacionais e regionais, através de suas visitas e actividades de fachada, para quando houver as tais actividades de perturbações de ordem pública, poderem ganhar notoriedade. Mas isso não deve preocupar ninguém, pois estão bem identificados e bem caçados, dentro e fora da Guiné-Bissau. Não tenho nada contra ninguém, mas quem continuar a perturbar verdadeira paz social dos guineenses em troca de benefícios como sempre foi nos últimos anos dessa crise, e que sempre tenho tolerado, então que fique claro "estou firme e determinado para tudo e todos". Para finalizar, gostaria de vos deixar uma reflexão com a seguinte frase: " Domingos Simões Pereira é um perigo grave para o futuro do país ". Isto porque publicar aqui tudo que é necessário para provar ou sustentar a razão dessa frase, só pode agravar ainda mais a paz social que tanto necessitamos. Chega, chega não podemos continuar a viver nessa turbulência vida toda, meus irmãos guineenses, não é saudável, é tóxico, não é justo para um povo que tanto sofreu. António Aly Silva » aaly.silva@gmail.com » aaly_silva@hotmail.com » Tel. (+245) 668 31 13
data.translatedTitle: DSP the Greedy Machiavellian
data.translatedDescription: Guineans, once again, I come to warn you about the danger that Domingos Simões Pereira represents for Guinea-Bissau. I issue this warning to all Guineans without exception, whether in the country or abroad, to PAIGC in particular and to Cipriano Cassamá in particular. This warns about the true DSP, the true spirit that moves this guy, which some still continue to believe in, not to say adore. Domingos Simões Pereira is a manipulator, a true blackmailer and probably calculating, a type of behavior that goes beyond the level of psychopath. A disproportionately ambitious man, a true criminal who knows how and when to commit the crime. He would never cohabit not only with JOMAV, as well as with any president who would be elected, except the one he covertly supported. This is because he has his own agenda, and PAIGC is simply a platform for its achievement. DSP would never cohabit with JOMAV because its preferred candidate was Paulo Gomes and always will be, who together with Tchitchi are outlining a mechanism to become the new owners of Guinea-Bissau. According to them, this is a medium-term process, and it takes courage and patience to achieve it. Winning the congress no matter what the circumstances and having the party in hand again, is a phase completed to their advantage, while true PAIGC activists are clapping. After this legislative election, no matter the result, Cipriano Cassama must prepare his suitcase or keep his mouth shut, as the preferred candidate for the party will be Paulo Gomes, and he must have a voice within the party. DSP is an excessively ambitious person, he never had any consideration for anyone, JOMAV even less so, the guy is a born Machiavellian, Cipriano Casama will be discarded when he least expects it and he can take notice. Guineans, talking about Paulo Gomes and Tchitchi is talking about MCCI and other organizations and camouflaged personalities in our country. These two individuals are the main financiers of MCCI and other well-known personalities in the city of Bissau. The MCCI, Militia created by JBV and DSP, now financed and directed by "future triangle of power" that is, "DSP, Paulo Gomes and Tchitchi", has 3 main objectives: 1st Disrupt public order in the name of citizenship, defame and attempt to discredit any organizations or individuals not aligned with the triangle, in order to support their journeys in search of power. 2nd If the objective of the triangle is achieved, the role of the MCCI Militia will become constant surveillance of all adversaries in order to guarantee false social peace and the power of control. 3rd Try to gain credibility with international and regional organizations, through your visits and cover activities, so that when there are public disturbances, they can gain notoriety. But this should not worry anyone, as they are well identified and well hunted, inside and outside Guinea-Bissau. I have nothing against anyone, but whoever continues to disturb the true social peace of Guineans in exchange for benefits, as has always been the case in the last years of this crisis, and which I have always tolerated, then let it be clear "I am firm and determined for everything and everyone". To conclude, I would like to leave a reflection with the following sentence: " Domingos Simões Pereira is a serious danger for the future of the country ". This is because publishing here everything necessary to prove or support the reason for this sentence can only further worsen the social peace that we so desperately need. Enough, enough, we cannot continue to live in this turbulence our whole lives, my Guinean brothers, it is not healthy, it is toxic, it is not fair for a people who have suffered so much. Antonio Aly Silva » aaly.silva@gmail.com » aaly_silva@hotmail.com » Tel. (+245) 668 31 13

data.title: DSP, UM PERIGO GRAVE PARA FUTURO DO PAÍS
data.description: Os meios de comunicação também são as formas de manipulação mais utilizadas pelos poderes políticos, dado o seu impacto social. As informações são manipuladas não apenas tendo em vista omitir factos relevantes, mas também distorcer o conteúdo da informação veiculada, produzir ou forjar a opinião pública, de modo que a mesma se ajuste às ideias dos gananciosos. A única forma dos cidadãos evitarem cair nestes processos de manipulação é tornarem-se mais vigilantes em relação às instituições democráticas e aos órgãos de informação, adoptando uma atitude de permanente reflexão crítica sobre a informação que lhes é fornecida. Na Guiné-Bissau, nos últimos anos, cresceu exponencialmente o número de pessoas mediocres, pessoas sem escrúpulos ligadas à produção de rádios e outros meios de comunicação com influencia na nossa sociedade, gente que apesar da sua enorme influência na sociedade, trabalha na mais completa impunidade e sem qualquer controlo ético/democrático. Obcecado pelo poder, ciente da dificuldade do povo guineense em avaliar informações, ciente do poder dos instrumentos de comunicação, Domingos Simões Pereira (DSP) nunca menosprezou esses instrumentos para atingir seu objectivo, sempre usou-os de forma desonesta como agora está a fazer tudo por tudo para manter no controlo desses veicúlos, mesmo que isso custe a vida dos outros. Governou na corrupção, no nepotismo e no desvios de somas astronómicas do dinheiro de povo, que muito serviria para investimentos na saúde, educação e outros serviços publicos, para beneficiar familiares e amigos. Finge que preocupa com os problemas do país, mas só engana o povo honesto, humilde e trabalhador que infelizmente sofre muito, não sei até quando, devido a sua paciência e tolerância aos governantes como DSP, criminoso travestido em politico que vive na custa de povo e acima de tudo ainda fa-lo refem do próprio suor. Roubou e decepcionou tanto não só aos guineenses assim como a comunidade internacional que sempre acreditou que o sujeito era ideal para ajudar esse povo a sair do ciclo de sofrimento que parece infinito. Foi demitido, não conformou e está a fazer tudo na medida do possível para continuar a complicar a vida dos guineenses. Razão disso é que depois de perder a batalha nos meios de comunicações mais modernos nomeadamente os blogues onde investiu grandes somas do dinheiro de povo, para fazer a lavagem cerebral dos menos instruídos e não só. Fugiu do facebook onde sempre frequentava e comunicava com todos tentado passar a mensagem de um politico moderno e aberto a diálogo/opiniões, mas que afinal era simplesmente um falso modernista. Caiu a mascara e já não consegue enganar ninguem, pois a sua credibilidade está abaixo de zero, para não dizer outra coisa. Camaradas, para conhecimento geral, com o dinheiro roubado que custou suor de povo guineense, DSP decidiu avançar com um outro novo plano maquiavelico, para criar a sua própria estação de rádio. Documento António Aly Silva » aaly.silva@gmail.com » aaly_silva@hotmail.com » Tel. (+245) 668 31 13
data.translatedTitle: DSP, A SERIOUS DANGER TO THE FUTURE OF THE COUNTRY
data.translatedDescription: The media is also the form of manipulation most used by political powers, given its social impact. Information is manipulated not only with a view to omitting relevant facts, but also distorting the content of the information conveyed, producing or forging public opinion, so that it fits the ideas of the greedy. The only way for citizens to avoid falling into these manipulation processes is to become more vigilant in relation to democratic institutions and information bodies, adopting an attitude of permanent critical reflection on the information provided to them. In Guinea-Bissau, in recent years, the number of mediocre people has grown exponentially, unscrupulous people linked to the production of radio stations and other means of communication with influence in our society, people who, despite their enormous influence in society, work with complete impunity and without any ethical/democratic control. Obsessed with power, aware of the difficulty of the Guinean people in evaluating information, aware of the power of communication instruments, Domingos Simões Pereira (DSP) never underestimated these instruments to achieve his objective, he always used them dishonestly and is now doing everything he can to maintain control of these vehicles, even if it costs the lives of others. He ruled through corruption, nepotism and the embezzlement of astronomical sums of people's money, which would largely be used for investments in health, education and other public services, to benefit family and friends. He pretends to care about the country's problems, but he only deceives the honest, humble and hard-working people who unfortunately suffer a lot, I don't know for how long, due to his patience and tolerance towards rulers like DSP, a criminal disguised as a politician who lives at the expense of the people and, above all, still holds them hostage to his own sweat. He stole and disappointed so much not only the Guineans but also the international community that always believed that the guy was ideal to help these people get out of the cycle of suffering that seems infinite. He was fired, did not comply and is doing everything possible to continue complicating the lives of Guineans. The reason for this is that after losing the battle in the most modern means of communications, namely blogs, where he invested large sums of people's money, to brainwash the less educated and others. He fled Facebook where he always visited and communicated with everyone, trying to convey the message of a modern politician open to dialogue/opinions, but who, in the end, was simply a false modernist. The mask has fallen and it is no longer able to deceive anyone, as its credibility is below zero, to say the least. Comrades, for general knowledge, with the stolen money that cost the Guinean people sweat, DSP decided to move forward with another new Machiavellian plan, to create its own radio station. data.title: Analyst says renewal of S. Sudan sanctions is ‘significant and timely’

Except for the indigenous people, who we know as the oldest population group, all others have come to Suriname in the past five hundred years. Together we have succeeded in creating a society [...]

This concerns a total quantity of more than 537 kilograms of this chemical, which was stored in a secure container on the premises. The missing barrels were discovered by agency employees on Friday morning. […]

data.translatedDescription: Why do stress and anxiety decrease intimate desire on a daily basis? Why this is not a hormonal problem or lack of love and how to reverse it.

data.title: Aumentó la proporción de jóvenes pobres que ingresaron a estudiar a la Udelar en el último quinquenio
data.description: El último informe de gestión de la universidad pública con mayor matrícula del país arrojó que un 25% de los estudiantes se desvinculó al primer año, y que casi un 3% egresó al cuarto año.
data.translatedTitle: The proportion of poor young people who entered to study at Udelar increased in the last five years
data.translatedDescription: The latest management report from the public university with the largest enrollment in the country showed that 25% of students dropped out in the first year, and that almost 3% graduated in the fourth year.

data.title: Caso del descuento de US$ 25.000 por camioneta del presidente Orsi golpea su principal capital político

data.translatedDescription: The ruling party recognizes communication errors by the Presidency. So far the government has only shown the invoice for the commercial operation between the president and the company.

data.title: Federación Rural: "Vivimos en un país caro, con una burocracia estatal hipertrofiada, generadora de un pesado déficit, muy nocivo"
data.description: Finalizó el 109° Congreso anual de la Federación Rural, un congreso que quedará en la historia de la gremial, por haber sido el primero en realizarse de forma conjunta con el Congreso de Intendentes. Este año, se realizó en la previa al encuentro, un simposio internacional de garrapata, lo que generó una gran concurrencia de productores, profesionales y referentes de las gremiales desde el día miércoles hasta este sábado. En el acto final, estuvo presente el Presidente de la República, Profesor Yamandú Orsi, juntamente con los ministros Gabriel Oddone, de economía, y Alfredo Fratti, de ganadería. Junto a ellos estuvieron representantes del Congreso de Intendentes, así como también referentes políticos de todos los partidos.
data.translatedTitle: Rural Federation: "We live in an expensive country, with a hypertrophied state bureaucracy, generating a heavy deficit, which is very harmful"
data.translatedDescription: The 109th Annual Congress of the Rural Federation ended, a congress that will remain in the history of the union, for having been the first to be held jointly with the Congress of Mayors. This year, an international tick symposium was held prior to the meeting, which generated a large attendance of producers, professionals and representatives of the unions from Wednesday to Saturday. At the final event, the President of the Republic, Professor Yamandú Orsi, was present, along with the ministers Gabriel Oddone, of economy, and Alfredo Fratti, of livestock. Along with them were representatives of the Congress of Mayors, as well as political leaders from all parties.

data.title: Volvió la disparidad
data.description: Al igual que sucedió durante las semanas de fuertes bajas en los precios durante marzo, volvió la disparidad al mercado de hacienda gorda en la plaza local. Hay empresas que se alejaron del mercado o pasan referencias de precios más bajos, en tanto que otras mantienen los mismos niveles de precios o incluso algunos centavos más que la semana pasada.
data.translatedTitle: The disparity returned
data.translatedDescription: As happened during the weeks of sharp price declines during March, disparity returned to the fat hacienda market in the local plaza. There are companies that have moved away from the market or passed lower price references, while others maintain the same price levels or even a few cents more than last week.

data.title: SIAL Shanghái despejó algunas dudas, otras no
data.description: Del lunes 18 al miércoles 20 de mayo se llevó adelante en Shanghái la edición del año 2026 de la feria del SIAL, en la que, en lo que refiere al mercado de la carne vacuna, no faltaron novedades ni grandes signos de interrogación acerca de lo que deparará el futuro inmediato.
data.translatedTitle: SIAL Shanghai cleared up some doubts, others not
data.translatedDescription: From Monday, May 18 to Wednesday, May 20, the 2026 edition of the SIAL fair was held in Shanghai, where, regarding the beef market, there was no shortage of news or big question marks about what the immediate future will hold.

data.title: Nueva suba del ganado, ajustan granos
data.description: La faena bajó la semana previa según la información del INAC, remarcando que estamos -claramente- en un periodo de menor oferta en comparación con el año pasado. Si bien empiezan a aparecer más ganados preparados, particularmente en el norte, la cantidad de ganado prontos sigue siendo relativamente escasa, con un protagonismo clave de los corrales. En este contexto, el precio del ganado para faena sigue fortaleciéndose y subiendo. La demanda exterior es la que pauta los precios a lo largo de toda la cadena cárnica, y sigue muy firme.
data.translatedTitle: New rise in cattle, grains adjusted
data.translatedDescription: The slaughter fell the previous week according to information from INAC, highlighting that we are -clearly- in a period of lower supply compared to last year. Although more prepared cattle are beginning to appear, particularly in the north, the number of ready cattle remains relatively low, with corrals playing a key role. In this context, the price of cattle for slaughter continues to strengthen and rise. Foreign demand is what sets prices throughout the entire meat chain, and it remains very firm.

data.title: Intermedio: Racing y Defensor Sporting empataron sin goles en el Parque Osvaldo Roberto
data.description: El Cervecero llegó a cinco unidades en el grupo A, mientras que el Violeta sumó su primer punto y cortó una racha de tres derrotas seguidas.
data.translatedTitle: Intermission: Racing and Defensor Sporting tied without goals at Parque Osvaldo Roberto
data.translatedDescription: The Brewer reached five points in group A, while the Violeta added its first point and ended a streak of three consecutive losses.

data.title: Remo: La uruguaya Nicole Yarzón logró el quinto puesto en la Copa del Mundo de Sevilla
data.description: La celeste cerró su labor en el single ligero con acción en la final. El single, cuádruple par y dos sin timonel pelearán por posiciones.
data.translatedTitle: Rowing: Uruguayan Nicole Yarzón achieved fifth place in the Seville World Cup
data.translatedDescription: The celeste closed her work in the light singles with action in the final. The single, quadruple pair and two coxless will fight for positions.

data.title: Mundial: Canadá anunció sus 26 convocados para disputar la cita que albergará
data.description: Alphonso Davies, figura de la selección y del Bayern Múnich, fue citado pese a padecer una lesión que lo dejará fuera del inicio.
data.translatedTitle: World Cup: Canada announced its 26 squad to compete in the event it will host
data.translatedDescription: Alphonso Davies, figure of the national team and Bayern Munich, was summoned despite suffering an injury that will keep him out of the start.

data.title: “Es increíble”: una discusión de tránsito generó choque de diez autos frente al aeropuerto
data.description: El incidente comenzó cuando un automovilista y un motociclista frenaron para bajarse a pelear; uno de los implicados no tenía seguro.
data.translatedTitle: “It's incredible”: a traffic argument caused a crash of ten cars in front of the airport
data.translatedDescription: The incident began when a motorist and a motorcyclist braked to get off to fight; one of those involved did not have insurance.

data.title: “Gracias a Dios los chicos estaban adentro”: balearon una vivienda en barrio La Paloma
data.description: Un padre de familia aseguró que se “tuvo que tirar al piso” con sus hijos para evitar los proyectiles. “Es una inseguridad tremenda”, dijo.
data.translatedTitle: “Thank God the boys were inside”: a home was shot in the La Paloma neighborhood
data.translatedDescription: A father said he “had to drop to the floor” with his children to avoid the projectiles. “It is a tremendous insecurity,” he said.

data.title: Udelar aprobó 11 “principios rectores” y que se elaboren guías para el uso de IA
data.description: El CDC determinó que “cada función universitaria” adopte su rúbrica con “ámbitos específicos” para implementar inteligencia artificial.
data.translatedTitle: Udelar approved 11 “guiding principles” and that guides be developed for the use of AI
data.translatedDescription: The CDC determined that “each university function” adopts its rubric with “specific areas” to implement artificial intelligence.

data.title: Mónica Xavier fue electa presidenta de la Comisión Interamericana de Mujeres de la OEA
data.description: La elección es “un reconocimiento al compromiso histórico de Uruguay con la promoción de los derechos de las mujeres”, resaltó Presidencia.
data.translatedTitle: Mónica Xavier was elected president of the Inter-American Commission of Women of the OAS
data.translatedDescription: The election is “a recognition of Uruguay's historical commitment to promoting women's rights,” the Presidency highlighted.

data.title: Expedición a la Antártida: una maratón y el silencio que ruge en el continente más remoto
data.description: En marzo de este año, un total de 391 personas viajaron al continente más frío y ventoso del planeta para correr.
data.translatedTitle: Expedition to Antarctica: a marathon and the silence that roars on the most remote continent
data.translatedDescription: In March of this year, a total of 391 people traveled to the coldest and windiest continent on the planet to run.

data.title: Lo despidieron de agencia de viajes, siguió vendiendo y 20 clientes lo tildan de estafador
data.description: Ramses ya fue denunciado, pese a que dice que devolverá el dinero. De hecho pusieron su foto en Montevideo.
data.translatedTitle: He was fired from the travel agency, he continued selling and 20 clients called him a scammer
data.translatedDescription: Ramses has already been denounced, even though he says he will return the money. In fact, they put his photo in Montevideo.

data.title: IM entregó más de 1.000 contenedores intradomiciliarios a vecinos del Municipio G
data.description: La comuna también removió 28 vertederos de la vía pública. Familias de Nuevo París, Villa Teresa y Sayago Norte recibieron los vertederos.
data.translatedTitle: IM delivered more than 1,000 intra-home containers to residents of Municipality G
data.translatedDescription: The commune also removed 28 landfills from public roads. Families from Nuevo París, Villa Teresa and Sayago Norte received the landfills.

data.title: Joven de 26 años fue denunciado por amenazas y disturbios en el Hospital Español
data.description: Una funcionaria del centro de salud aseguró que el hombre, en CTI desde el martes, rompió vidrios y dijo que “iba a matar al personal”.
data.translatedTitle: A 26-year-old man was reported for threats and disturbances at the Spanish Hospital
data.translatedDescription: An official at the health center assured that the man, who had been in CTI since Tuesday, broke windows and said that “he was going to kill the staff.”

data.title: Csukasi afirmó que “la carne uruguaya es nuestro buque insignia” para la apertura de nuevos mercados
data.description:
Con la presencia de autoridades gubernamentales, la Cámara de la Industria Frigorífica conmemoró los 150 años de la primera exportación del sector. La Cámara de la Industria Frigorífica (CIF) conmemoró este viernes en Montevideo los 150 años de la primera exportación de carne. Durante el evento, que contó con la presencia de autoridades nacionales y empresarios del sector, fue homenajeado el histórico dirigente Daniel Belerati, quien dejó la presidencia de la gremial a finales del año pasado, luego de varias décadas de trabajo en el sector.

data.translatedDescription:
With the presence of government authorities, the Chamber of the Refrigeration Industry commemorated the 150 years of the first export of the sector. The Chamber of the Meat Industry (CIF) commemorated this Friday in Montevideo the 150 years of the first meat export. During the event, which was attended by national authorities and businessmen from the sector, the historic leader Daniel Belerati was honored, who left the presidency of the union at the end of last year, after several decades of work in the sector.

data.title: PSG bicampeón de la Champions League
data.description: El equipo de Luis Enrique derrotó a Arsenal por penales y se quedó con el máximo galardón europeo de clubes por segundo año consecutivo. data.translatedTitle: PSG two-time Champions League champion
data.translatedDescription: Luis Enrique's team defeated Arsenal on penalties and won the top European club award for the second consecutive year. Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) was crowned Champions League champion this Saturday with a victory in the penalty shootout against the English Arsenal, after a 1-1 draw in regulation time. data.description: A través de la misiva, diputados y senadores del oficialismo hicieron “un llamado urgente a que cesen las políticas de bloqueo económico, y cualquier forma de injerencia externa”. data.translatedTitle: Shembe sends strong warning to social media critic
data.translatedDescription: Ludzidzini – The leader of the Nazareth Baptist Church (Shembe Church), Unyazi Lwezulu, has issued a strong warning to an individual he accused of persistently tarnishing his name and that of the church on social media platforms. Addressing thousands of congregants during a Sabbath Service held at Ludzidzini on Saturday, Unyazi Lwezulu said he had […] The post Shembe sends strong warning to social media critic appeared first on Independent News Eswatini .

data.title: PM challenges Bushfire to double economic impact
data.description: MALKERNS – Prime Minister Russell Dlamini has challenged the MTN Bushfire Festival to double its contribution to Eswatini’s economy from the current E121.2 million. The PM cited the event’s growing role in tourism promotion and economic development.Speaking during a “Bring Your Fire” interview on the opening day of the festival in Malkerns yesterday, Dlamini praised […] The post PM challenges Bushfire to double economic impact appeared first on Independent News Eswatini .
